I am confident that you will be taken care of","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yeibon Ye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2SE4IneJMzH0hmojBD-Nq9yi0h7DN28Ou2sJNXwLHkGHCgFc9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"breakfast good. hotel is a little old style. have a lots parking place. room is ok. but small things need to be improved","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5suiHVRDh-8fYnJWhT7KE&fid=0x0:0x265db771430df1fd"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"CorradoR964","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeYuXGoFc9HnT35lAJ46cKDIsHY7nNIKUKz_f8yINNlqyrU48jCx-4ctPzihRKgde030w=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Very nice hotel in Madrid. A bit far from the center, but this is not a problem if you take the metro.|Rooms are wide and clean and breakfast is really good.|Prices are reasonable","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICHwTWhnmiy2YxLcK8EkQSNTZFq293q_mkc2iHq_3G0XFq_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely family hotel with great people who work here including receptionist, cleaning lady and cook. All were very kind and made us feel good.
Rooms are clean,with fresh towels everyday.
In the lounge there is free water and coffee machine. Metro station is couple of minutes away and the hotel is 20 min by metro from city Centre.
Breakfast is really good with plenty of choice.
I would choose it again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jens-Kaidar Liiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkB3iFkutGFhkmqBPuklWn5PKsN1pDKXVNcFCDRMDYnNb44sm-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice hotel in a great location. Away from the busy city centre and it's really easy to get everywhere using metro service (~15 min to city center, ~25 min to airport, ~30min to Bernabeu). Metro station is basically almost next to the hotel.

Room is spacious, has everything you need. TV has wide selection of local channels + radio channels and also option to mirror your own device screen. Breakfast was delicious and we were pleasantly surprised how wide the selection was. Didn't expect a rather smaller hotel like this to have such a good selection.

Also the reception staff was really friendly and spoke English fluently, which we found out during our stay is not so common everywhere in Madrid. Even the hotel's General Manager spoke to us during the breakfast and was interesed in how are we enjoing our stay and breakfast selection.

Only downside was that the room and the floors were a bit cold and when we wanted to heat up the room the AC was really noisy and the room got hot really quickly so we needed to then again turn it off and could use it only periodically in shorts stints. But since seems like Madrid is going through a unusual and heavy rain season right now in March (it was raining heavily all the time, every day during our stay), we as people from Northern Europe kind of expect and hope that this is just something that hotels in warm climate countries like Spain are not really used to and built for.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B3168BOrobertl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfHhPp0vyvo1Wo3WY4NH1G5QOPAHGBMv_XiebXLZtHzVwVa3wkRhb3dykyKrUCZPlawDA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Their name may be "Petit", but there's nothing small about the customer service and experience provided by Chema and his team.  From the moment we arrived they worked tirelessly to ensure that we were comfortable, with him personally helping us with our bags to our room.  The breakfast buffet was AMAZING each day, with prompt and efficient wait staff attending to our every need.  During the afternoon/evening period if we needed additional cutlery, use of the microwave, hot water, or ice, all was available.  They also helped us to plan our trip to the Royal Palace using the Metro, something with which we were not familiar.  Overall, their warmth, hospitality, and genuine kindness not only makes us want to stay by them again, but to see more of Spain in general!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"bcM8911TC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qdvd3mFTmnQslJajBtyC7hGXBv5KKEN_7z5ZnXByEfDkAAFDmgEV3HW1P9_iXApXyf1XA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I stayed here for 2 weeks with my mother as I was getting surgery at a nearby hospital and needed to stay in the area for 2 weeks for initial recovery. the hotel staff helped in any way they could, provided a loan of a wheelchair, and allowed my mother to bring me a tray from the breakfast room when I was still unable to go downstairs. the breakfast food was delicious and there was all day tea and coffee. the room was satisfactorily clean and neat and there was shampoo, conditioner, etc provided.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Holiday Inn Express Madrid - Airport by IHG
address: Ciudad Pegaso, Av. de Aragón, 402, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
owner: {"id":"113013093983411928073","name":"Holiday Inn Express Madrid - Airport by IHG (Owner)","link":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/113013093983411928073"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"JoMich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qdx0CtChWdL4amzhVtedU6JgNzs3A9KzPS8K998c7-u-mDeTb-7WQwuTD-PPX6BcVA5wg=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The hotel is what we have come to expect of a Holiday Inn express – clean, comfortable, and a great price! The breakfast was wonderful, a typical European breakfast with many different hot and cold options, including lovely fresh melon, and great breads and pastries. My only suggestion is not to have the chic sink in the bathroom that is difficult for a shorter people like me, or else to have a little footstool because the bowl of the sink is so high. The faucet also sprays very forcefully, which makes it splash around. Otherwise, this was an excellent hotel, conveniently located very close to the airport.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yuli Skorobogat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISD_28kOJa0ewTATxWozC8g7K4Lwxg4V-LcofYe__B7Fl87Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is an excellent airport hotel that meets the standard Holiday Inn Express expectations. The rooms, while a bit small, are perfectly sufficient, the beds are comfortable, the breakfast is simple but good, and the room was surprisingly quiet despite its proximity to Madrid Airport (MAD). Crucially, the staff is very friendly and helpful, adding significant value to the stay.
​Although other guests often complain about the lack of a frequent daytime shuttle, this isn't an issue. An Uber or Bolt to the airport costs around €10, making it comparable to the hotel's own shuttle fee of €5 per person.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joseph K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvWK4DBxhBEvnq3l5hfB9i0QJ82ZkuWux85QdKDP9eWU671EuU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I typically have nothing but good things to say about Holiday Inn Express and hotels apart of the IHG family. This Madrid “Airport” hotel left a lot to be desired and left me second guessing my loyalty to the IHG brand.

This is not an Airport Hotel. IHG app and hotel website say they offer a shuttle. The shuttle runs only a few times a day every few hours, someone pointless. Taxi from Airport terminal to hotel was 45 Euro. Shuttle service in the morning back to the Airport did not run at a time that was convient, UBER ride was 25 Euro. The entire reason we booked this specific hotel was because of shuttle service and it was labeled at the airport. We had a 12 hour layover and would just have stayed at a hotel in or actually at the airport.

Additionally:
Hotel towels had obvious set staining. Which should have been tossed or taken out of use for rooms.

Bed was just okay and seemed towards the end of when the hotel would replace it.

Breakfast buffet was very good, probably ranked in the top 3 of IHG hot breakfasts I have had at a Holiday Inn Express. Hotel common areas were clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGg1LS_zm_7UkcX902gm99&fid=0x0:0xa2f02d0af50a02b6"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"nsrosie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeiIm6t64oXJwlfKKV-SU2ENLb40SwZCvBWRts5o7WimonLggB5R8bs4qOdTbCTDXjyRQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I cannot recall how I settled on this particular airport hotel.  We had no complaints and the building seemed nice and new for an airport hotel.  The main issue is probably the distance from the airport.  Certainly it is closer than Madrid but it might be 10 or 15 minutes from the airport on the highway.  The hotel has a shuttle that you can reserve and pay for but we took an Uber for more flexibility.  There is a restaurant that gets decent reviews right next to the hotel.  Unfortunately they ended up closing early the night we stayed.  There is nothing else around the area at all.  Thankfully the hotel serves some dinner.  It was fine in a pinch and we were glad they had it for sure because other than going back into town, options were very limited in the area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amjad Mashal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnaGMOfJOw6Jl02Gl12w8nFo-5s-N3f-b5j2WD8xNAL1AJog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I got this hotel assuming it would be convenient and shuttle service back and forth to the airport. Usually it’s free but they charge for this service and you have to book in advance which I did. I booked it for my old aunt who was struggling on her own after a canceled flight. I told her to be at the bus stop by 9 pm and then her phone died. Turns out the service never went to pick her up and she waited 30 minutes in the cold for nothing and I lost money on the hotel as well and she slept in the airport. Management doesn’t care to help or refund me my money either. Do yourself a favor and go somewhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I had a pleasant stay at the hotel. The rooms were clean, well-maintained, and equipped with all the essential amenities. The staff was professional, courteous, and always willing to assist with any request. The location was convenient, making it easy to access key areas in the city. Overall, it was a comfortable and hassle-free experience. I would recommend this hotel to both business and leisure travelers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Simpson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWtt4ocUqnJd-iPQmHcbLq2Hu9GSNzgn8_b6xcFkThDwfXjILZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rooms, Service, Location - and Food!!
We travel a lot all over the world, currently staying on our way to work and play in Peru, and while we rarely eat in a hotel, we’re very glad we did. It was superb, sensibly priced, well presented and delivered by great staff in a quiet, pleasant venue.
Far beyond what you (or we) might expect from a chain. Well done everyone, and thank you!☺️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"aaa sss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLRUAyCvwthzNmB_QeQ7OIjyeqqzBCMGtfQBXmtnDY1sgBYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is by far the worst Holiday Inn branch I have stayed at, and I have visited many!

The room was very small and lacked basic amenities such as a fridge and slippers. The breakfast was extremely basic, with the same limited selection repeated every day. Additionally, the hotel charges guests for parking, which is disappointing.

The only positive aspect of this stay was the friendly and helpful staff, kudos to them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Madrid Airport Suites Affiliated by Meliá
address: C. de Lola Flores, 4-17, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
descriptions: Streamlined suites in a contemporary hotel featuring an airy cafe/bar, plus a pool & a tennis court.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gene","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXknjRzm__bJOpFuqRVu1zIrBacESFO0XZfe0F5-ntOcAMqOgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stayed end of January due to missed flight at Madrid airport. The suite was spacious & clean. The supper was a great buffet with soup, meat & salad options. The breakfast buffet was amazing! 🤩 Fruit, yogurt. Many types of bread & rolls, charcuterie, eggs, bacon, pastries... Everything you could want including unlimited hot and cold drinks. What let the place down? The rooms were COLD and there didn't appear to be any way to control the temperature.  And the airport shuttle!😱 **** Forget it! ****🫣 Get a taxi, Uber or whatever. I waited 2 hours for shuttle from the airport to the suites - each time I rang I was told it would be at the airport in half an hour... finally I took Uber (cost just under 15 euros ) & got there in 20 minutes. Leaving the suites, I was offered 7.15am or 11am....both unsuitable for a noon flight. Again I used Uber (cost just under 15 euros again) AND I could pick my journey time. Note to the Suites management: don't even mention the shuttle bus if you're not prepared to manage it properly!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Muhammad Kaunain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIb1NHpuYJmRlAnNa5KoC1V-Wz4YVrxoFluFdFQS6DPBP8_Iw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have stayed at the Madrid Airport Suites Hotel for two months, and the experience has been outstanding. The property maintains exceptional standards of cleanliness, safety, and comfort, making it ideal for families as well as long-term guests.

The staff exhibit exemplary professionalism and are consistently attentive and cooperative. Our apartment was spotless upon arrival and meticulously maintained throughout the stay. Housekeeping services, including cleaning and linen replacement, are carried out with impressive consistency and precision.

The hotel features ample outdoor space for walking and for children to play safely, spacious lobbies, and a large underground parking area. Its location is highly convenient: a bus stop is directly in front of the hotel, the airport is only about 10 minutes away, and central Madrid is approximately 23 km away with straightforward public transport connections.

High-quality food is served in a clean and pleasant dining environment.

Overall, I am delighted with my stay and highly recommend Madrid Airport Suites Hotel for its outstanding service, excellent facilities, and exceptional hospitality.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Orozco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0p7Y8-efwPhGHJI1YZ4XLhA2x7na38gh5Z5a8BXY6351zeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I was a bit worried about staying here after reading the reviews, but I didn’t really have a choice because my Iberia flight was cancelled. The room was very clean and tidy, the service was good, and the food was pretty much what you’d expect from a comp hotel.

My only complaint is the airport shuttle. I waited over an hour for it, and when it finally arrived it was a small van, so some people were left behind. I also had to take an Uber from the hotel to the airport because the shuttle was already full.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johnathan H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi5_ZKUpv9uyyWP1qA0uUXW7zEueYkUD_k8wMMh43IfZq0iSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give this disaster of a hotel negative stars, I would. We got dropped here after our flights were delayed by 14hrs by AirEuropa (another top level company in need of a positive review).

The room was filthy from the moment I arrived — cockroaches crawling around like they were the actual tenants. The sheets looked unwashed, the bathroom was a biohazard, and the smell of neglect hit me like a wall.

But the worst part? There is zero security here. Strangers were roaming the halls unsupervised, and someone actually tried to break into my room and steal my Patek. I’ve never felt so unsafe in a hotel in my life. The doors seem like they could be kicked open with a sneeze, and staff didn’t seem to care at all when I reported it.
Refugees everywhere, I feel right at home, just as if I was in London!

Between the infestation, the grime, and the complete lack of guest protection, this place should honestly be shut down. Best thing here was the exit.

Save yourself the trauma and stay literally anywhere else — a clean park bench would feel more comfortable and more secure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I had a pleasant stay at the hotel. The location was convenient, making it easy to access key areas in the city. Overall, it was a comfortable and hassle-free experience. I would recommend this hotel to both business and leisure travelers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Damo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXvof0ZpQCuKJ2UfgO7lTgvo6JPCDxiV4lRTysFbbe6ew8aNA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We stayed here before our international flight. We had to pay extra to check in early. There was only water in the room, no tea or coffee. Luggage storage and bag weighing were all extra charges. The room was clean, I could smell the bleach. On a positive note the shuttle bus to the airport was free and we could watch planes approaching the runway from our room.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daria S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVp5-G2x7rI3pVPMA231evL_5ULIJIJZlGXTkO2SHzr6xPjWAlOcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very confusing having so many different opinions about the hotel, but we had to stop here since our flight got delayed — we had to stay overnight here and Iberia gave us this room in the voucher.

Room looks great, we did ask to have a nice room and the nice gentleman at the desk said they he will try to do his best — he did. I really like having a nice sitting area.

First we were not really happy with the dinner included as it wasn’t as high end as we used to eat BUT the stuff is incredibly nice here, as well as their wine.

We ended up ordering Uber Eats with 30% off for the delicious Pad Thai & watching tv show in our bed.

PS: they deliver beer via Uber as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYWkT0jUnRg17OE7VKzBpS&fid=0x0:0x8d618c77e8a5930e"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Robert Thorne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNkCX-KKFQ_Um-sALHjo9JpMxKCfygh29yikzQSFLnqk1YsToM4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We got sent here because our flights were canceled. The food was decent, and the folks there were nice. It's not really close to anything in Madrid, but we took a Bolt into the city.  It wouldn't be my first choice, but it's a decent option.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Good rooms, spacious, clean, the only thing is that they don’t have any windows.
Good service too.
You can hear other people in the hall of the hotel and you can feel the metro too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Auton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSAWB69YBJ9D00F0PUZnn85P_zTuiXk8_ggSarROcPO4G7DK4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Very expensive for a hotel with no amenities included…€300 no breakfast, no bar, no restaurant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thierry Clain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfXmoQErUUknCUghYq3BgDT-XMT7a0Wn8jK1jBDLlG-lq74Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mauvaise expérience avec Booking et Aerotel. Ma fille étudiante Erasmus a réservé une nuit dans l’hôtel Aerotel Madrid Airport situé dans le terminal 4 de l’aéroport de Madrid le 02 Juillet 2025. À son arrivée à l’hôtel, on lui a signifié que l’hôtel était complet et en surréservation. Elle a été obligée de passer une nuit blanche dans le terminal à attendre son vol du lendemain. Pourtant dans les conditions générales de Booking il est spécifié que l’hôtel est dans l’obligation de trouver une alternative au client ce qui n’a pas été fait. Lors de la réclamation auprès de cet hôtel, ils ont osé dire qu’elle ne s’était jamais présentée à la réception ce qui est faux. J’appelle les parents d’étudiants européens qui se trouvent hors de leur pays à la plus grande prudence car ces entreprises ne pensent qu’à l’argent est à leurs actionnaires et se fichent du bien-être des gens. Quand vous leur demandez le remboursement pour une prestation que vous n’avez pas eu, l’hôtel et Booking se renvoient la balle. Booking c’est fini pour moi. Ce qui est incroyable dans l’histoire, c’est que l’hôtel a été payé deux fois pour la réservation d’une seule chambre par deux clients différents et j’appelle ça du vol. J'attends toujours mon remboursement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adriana Aguirre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC4FJasJ2QyczvHAoYmeMod8CUsW_hM_q9RKWPIUJd0RggbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"BUENA UBICACION PERO MAL ORGANIZADO.
NO FUNCIONAN LOS TELEFONOS PARA QUE TE DESPIERTEN.
EL HOTEL NECESITA "MEJORAS", PAREDES MALTRATADAS, FOCOS APAGADOS, NADA DE "ATENCION PERSONAL" EN EL BAÑO.
SUELOS SUCIOS.
LES FALTA MUCHO QUE APRENDER A LA NUEVA EMPRESA CHINA QUE COMPRO EL HOTEL.
PRECIOS EXAGERADOS POR LO QUE OFRECEN.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nicolas de pierola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxA3oWUkbsg_xkpe3PxA6HhNgm8dwuU-rRhnOQw4svw5jIj44=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mucho desorden para los pasajeros falta atención personalizada","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZ13Cv8_CA1JgxlltqkJLidLwYJZxmS1w1FENIQBBt998lsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Nava Khorram Ahmad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5N_5tjH3R1Ye5bF4dJqe_rEshfPLd_ulhljZcB5kddfhXrBbp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very basic accommodations, ideal for an early flight as the airport is less than 10 minute drive away and they have a free shuttle, if you’re a light sleeper the walls are very thin and you can hear other people snoring, but otherwise solid for one night","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dimitar Vachev","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvX-E9lL27UDSBwk2iFNyd123agVbkBJjh9c0Q0ZBGhNlrK2uZEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The location is great for a night stay between flights, free shuttle from and to the airport. title: ibis Madrid Aeropuerto Barajas
address: Av. General, 49, Barajas, 28042 Madrid
descriptions: Unfussy airport lodging offering free Wi-Fi plus a 24-hour bar & a restaurant.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Arie Zur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpkrbMBZJ3Q-_uv9CzScdmC-VVaVTSmA41wATPoJ_V86gLHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"In a nut shell: Good Hotel Near the Airport.
The hotel is in the Barajas area, not far from Madrid Airport. There’s a metro station about a 10-minute walk away, and it’s just one stop from the terminals, though you do need to walk about 10 minutes with your luggage to reach the metro.
The hotel looks nice and is kept in good condition. Our room, like most IBIS rooms, wasn’t very big, but it was comfortable and practical. The bed, just like the room, was compact but very comfortable. The shower was great, and the room had a decent A/C, a hair dryer, and very good Wi-Fi.
The service was very good. Breakfast is simple but tasty and enough to start the day. It is served daily between 4 am to 10:30 am.
Prices are reasonable too.
Overall, this is a good choice for an overnight stay between flights. We arrived early in the morning and left the next day at noon, and getting to the city center by metro was easy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8nHEV8qecxhy3Cey2a0a2&fid=0x0:0xec98beb202d82911"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"A decent hotel for those who need to stay near the airport and have an early or late-night flight, as was my case. title: AXOR Barajas Hotel Madrid
address: C/ de Campezo, 4, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
descriptions: Laid-back rooms with sleek decor, along with a restaurant, a spa & airport transfers.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Julia C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3NKK-Lr68aOPrgzpwRkTUpk-LXqPXVa63AIM87NOnNpIVRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I stayed at Hotel Axor Barajas after injuring my leg and undergoing surgery. I chose this hotel through Expedia because of its good reviews, expecting professional and considerate service. Unfortunately, my experience was extremely disappointing.

Upon arrival, I was told that my payment had not gone through and was asked to pay again. I had already completed the payment, and only after I showed proof did they finally provide the room. This caused unnecessary stress and showed a lack of proper management.

When making the reservation, I clearly requested wheelchair assistance due to recent leg surgery. No wheelchair was prepared. There was also no luggage cart available. As a result, I had to struggle with my luggage while in significant pain.

The condition of the room was also unacceptable. There was visible dust throughout the room, and the bathroom door would not close properly and kept opening on its own. For a hotel that advertises itself as an airport hotel with good standards, this level of cleanliness and maintenance is simply not acceptable.

Overall, the hotel demonstrated a lack of organization, poor attention to detail, and little consideration for guests with medical needs. I would not stay here again and cannot recommend it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristijan Topalov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRuPKLmzoF7BNRyW-vrDLf0N80lXj4Pl16Gwe04sHJRTM6eA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The hotel is conveniently located close to the airport, which makes it great for short stays or layovers. The area is quiet, so you can get a good rest without much noise. The rooms are average in size and have almost everything you might need for a comfortable stay. However, the amenities felt a bit low quality — it would be nice if they upgraded them a bit. Overall, it’s a decent place for a night or two if you need something practical and close to the airport.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8DU0Mpghk6MmnGKL5_Tmj&fid=0x0:0xcf433a02430e3ceb"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"helenfUk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfsTQkcy2KndgDISqLavaj05iVMNn3XOI6udcho2AN-fABBAw5poEMIHSoJIZdEEshKkA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We had a one night stay as we'd travelled from the south east of Spain to fly from Madrid on a long haul flight. |The food in the restaurant was good. The shuttle service to the airport was good|I speak Spanish but when I asked the receptionist to speak a bit slower she smiled and carried on speaking rapidly. I managed to understand her. Just something to bear in mind if you have lots of different nationalities passing through|I thought it was expensive for a one night b&b stay","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"fluffy quaker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjT4Ddc4jyRwC88PpLx2WcmmrKtZ09jLuTJgtryrNEz84CiM_s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The staff at the reception is very rude, impolite and lack patience. We booked a room for three people but when we entered our room there was only two beds. We had to call the staff to set up the third bed. When we tried to plug in the hotel kettle it exploded and there were sparks of fire . And it cut the electricity in our room. We called my reception about our problem and it took them 20 min to send someone to fix the electricity in our room. The fridge is not cold at all and the shower changes temperature every 2 seconds (without turning the knob) making it uncomfortable. I would not go here again. Worse hotel stay","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trip.com Member","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeCck1CfANpZm9bBk3PHtP97Kh9k25HZfvq9yAWlN3BaIyjSHUPEfWkhAJmuYiJsH-_6g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Lovely hotel for a stop over. Lovely staff, but well under staffed. Poor barman was run off his feet trying to do too many tasks. Consequently the bar waiting time was ridiculous. Management seriously need to look at staffing levels. It just is not acceptable.Otherwise a lovely hotel with a fantastic FREE airport currier service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shannon Cox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtho7fdk2niocaLHHwzq6uXdvWlAZSqdcXCs7gjNdp5Sp9b1M_wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"If you need one night to sleep near the Madrid airport but have low expectations then this hotel is fine for one night.  It is near NOTHING except the airport so thankfully we just stayed one night and took the free shuttle to the Madrid airport the next morning. The staff is not super friendly unlike every other hotel we stayed during our month-long trip to Spain.  They gave us (family a four) a smoking room with two twin beds so we had to go back downstairs and stand in line AGAIN to change rooms.  We booked through a third party booking service and had requested a room with 4 beds.  We were then changed to a room with two twin beds (that would be for my husband and I) and my teenage boys got two twin bunk beds that were barely long enough for them to sleep.  Does this hotel not have Queen or King beds??  Room service took almost 2 hours and the lady who answered room service was unfriendly and impatient because i told her i was just ok with canceling it because it took so long.  She told me 'all the food is premade' and there is no cooking - just heating whatever you order - gross.  We ordered a pastrai sandwich and after and hour i called and she said 'oh i have been trying to call you - we don't have that'.  How was she trying to call me - my phone never rang?  Hotel is dark, rooms are odd, beds just don't work for most adult humans unless you are short and want to sleep alone in a kid bed, and the staff is perpetually annoyed.  The best part of the hotel was the airport shuttle driver.  He was so friendly and so happy he sang all the way to airport.  He was my favorite part of this hotel because he was a genuinely happy person.  Airport hotels are never going to get high marks this one is about a 20-25 minute cab ride from the Salamanca District, but this one is not high on my list at all.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin WANDERMAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_2JkPzKXRt0FnI92dTc754k_6jW3_mpmwAQkustrTzVcxwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"At the recommendation of QATAR Business Class Cabin crew, I decided to give this hotel a go during my recent transit in Madrid. The hotel is conveniently located just 10 minutes (by car) from Madrid International airport. The hotel provides free shuttle van service to and from airport for hotel guests. The studio that I checked-in to is nicely laid-out and functional. The front desk team is ever friendly and ready to assist. Special mention to Martina, Martha and Alba - who walked the extra mile to make my stay there ever more comfortable. Not to forget the F&B team led by Javier - whom I counted on for memorable dining experience at the in-house restaurant. I was pleasantly surprised by the delicious and qualitative seasonal chef’s specials menu on offer during the period of my stay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIjF80eeTLQ5tTSxQ8qLTU&fid=0x0:0xcf433a02430e3ceb"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Brisa Gonzales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhTKkbMW4b1DZEbqg2WAuY9FZE2q1Fh55VAIA3vcKNy4kuYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This hotel for sure is no four star hotel.

First off, the girl at the front desk gave me wrong information serval times. First regarding breakfast, as to whether this was included with my reservation. She didn’t ask what room number, just said to show up and it’s free. That it WAS included in my room which she had just helped check us into. So, I figured she had seen it on there.

Therefore, the next morning I wake up my family for breakfast to find out once we’re downstairs it’s not included. Fine, whatever, had it anyway. Eighteen euros per person.

I wait for her shift once I see her the next night, to ask her again specifically since she’s the one who said it was included to begin with. Then she actually looks up my information to tell me it’s not. Ok, I accept it and move on.

Then I ask if there’s a laundromat on site here at the hotel and she (same girl), tells me yes but I have to bring my own detergent. Ok, again, no problem. Walk with my family all the way to Aldi and back, to find out what she told me was, yet again, incorrect. So frustrating!

The hotel does have laundry services but obviously you can’t do it on your own. Which is what I specifically asked her for.

The iron we were provided barely worked. The bathrooms have a frosted glass door that does not lock, which was inconvenient because we had additional family staying in our room. The rooms are comfortable I will say, but the bedding is itchy and the fabric just felt irritating to sensitive skin which both my daughter and I have. Air conditioning just doesn’t cool the room down and if you take out your card while you leave the room it’ll completely turn off everything. Keep that in mind if you stay during the summer. Card must be kept in to run the ac while gone.

When we came in we didn’t know how to turn the lights on, which they forgot to explain at the time we checked in.
Oh and also on our walk to the grocery store, random cops stop my mother and I asking for our passports since this street which the hotel is on is a well known area for prostitution. Yes, that was shocking in plain mid day. Apparently alot of the nearby apartments hotels are used by the hour and this is common in this area. I asked one of our Uber drivers to be informed after the incident.

The pool was unopened and unable to use. The gym had far too little equipment for my husband. This was just way too much money for the experience we had here. Never again. I thought it would be super nice and make life easy for us but no, I should’ve just done an air bnb for much less in a better location.

Finding the shuttle from the airport to the hotel was a bust also so keep that in mind. I don’t know why they assume you’ll just automatically know where and what to look for when you get off the plane. We followed the instructions and definitely struggled with the kids lugging around luggage to find it and make it to where pick up is. Just to get there and the shuttle was full so we had to grab a taxi.

Definitely would not recommend this place to anyone. We stayed three nights but I will never come back here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC13wI0CfAVmC6-CxBFQfvP&fid=0x0:0xcf433a02430e3ceb"],"When":"2025-10-27"}]

title: Ibis Budget Madrid Aeropuerto
address: Pegaso Tres, C. dos Provisional Iveco, 27, San Blas-Canillejas, 28022 Madrid
complete_address: {"borough":"San Blas","street":"Pegaso Tres, C. dos Provisional Iveco, 27","city":"Madrid","postal_code":"28022","state":"Madrid","country":"ES"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Brian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPo8x-2FsW_AXqgiMfi6ka5cUbuCDGgJfyZUYNKDDXq_oDLSWU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stayed here on an international layover. From the reviews I didn’t have high hopes. I even considered sleeping in the airport for 5 hours, but I’m glad I didn’t.

While this isn’t the most spectacular place out there, it was everything I needed that night. I was exhausted. Getting in at 2300, the front desk staff were friendly and accommodating. The room was small and had a bed, that was what I needed. I had a high floor and didn’t hear a sound. I got a few hours of sleep before continuing my journey. I can’t imagine how I would have felt being on the airport floor.

It’s not as close to the airport as it seems but I’d compare that to some US airports that are far removed from the hotels as well. Uber and taxi will be a factor in your booking, but that’s not the hotels fault.

Thanks for the quiet few hours sleep I needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela Lander-Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjhfBo-rUCRlv9apCQD0joyOAT6-tFjb2E5IPoGeZrOc50bdSDxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The hotel was ok, small but ok. We really needed extra pillows badly but they didn’t have any. We needed extra blankets but they only had one. Besides that our stay was fine. I wish there was an actual bathroom for more privacy. It would be nice if the toilet “door” had a lock or at least a magnet to keep the door in place. I wish there were more towels, they only leave one showering per person and that’s it, none for the face or hands. It would be nice if they had those folding luggage racks. Price was good for a 6 day stay. Room service was good everyday. Customer service was good","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruth Valle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxI_QTZQOHPs15hzHfVmcWXWzcSa2XXuiA7ZiUjMzvgmBNAcmyWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I rather enjoyed my stay at the Ibis hotel, especially with the spectacular view out the window from the 6th floor. The vending machine stole 2 euros from me though and I didn't report it because I thought I would look stupid doing so. I then no longer made further attempts, like to get coffee out of the machine. I thought it was weird that the girl at the restaurant couldn't inderstand that I wanted French fries and gave me chips instead. I said patatas fritas. How is that chips??? Anyway, I survived that miscommunication and I pride myself to have taught Spanish for like 30 years in the US. Well, you can't blame the hotel for that, still, weird experience. I also loved the location right by the Restaurante National. Great place to have eaten my lunch, menú de día for $16, very reasonable I thought and well done. No communications issues at that place. Ok, the room itself was nice. I loved the concise small layout. I posted a review on my YouTube channel for my subscribers. Oh, good thing they have a 5 euro airport shuttle because the taxi ride is 28 euros. Overall great place and I will visit again on my next Spain trip this summer. Maybe the vending machine will work out better for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Luong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXBkA4fwtatmAYQbde3AO6jEI-DAwAy6yIIZOVEAXOqWY6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"i had an overnight layover at the airport and booked this hotel for rest. upon entry, the rooms and clean and simple. one other review wrote that the light kept turning on in the middle of the night and waking them up but i ignored the warning and booked it anyway. well that also happened to me as the card sensor for the light stopped sensing the card in the middle of the night and the default bright lights came on and woke me up. had horrible sleep because of this. sleep was the only reason i booked the hotel and sleep i did not get.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bobdobb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfHhPp0vyvo1Wo3WY4NH1G5QOPAHGBMv_XiebXLZtHzVwVa3wkRhb3dykyKrUCZPlawDA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Modem hotel with good facilities, including bar, restaurant and dedicated hotel to airport shuttle. ||Rooms are modern snd distinctive, with good blackout blinds -something essential for a good night’s sleep. Many hotels get this so wrong by providing poorly fitted curtains that leak light. Well done, Ibis for getting this right! ||Breakfast, food and drinks offer were good and cost effective. ||Overall a good choice for visiting Madrid but be prepared to use taxis to and from the city, as public transport is a bit tricky.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0JqZU6x4YPJNnC89CnBs6mtDnTVmnXWT9vR0Ie66LbjWY81w3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It's a reasonable place for the location and money. Nothing spectacular but neither are the other options. The rooms feel like they
were designed by engineers and accountants with durability being the main concern. A bit like a fancy prison cell.

There is an insanely long check-in procedure.  The poor staff have to spend 5+ minutes for each person.  A modern hotel like this should be efficient but they're not.  Seems like there's always a queue just to check in.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marco Puliatti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmyK0AdBCB9u4tZya2kCVL-N8oHtFwIP91fEzhDMK5OF1MXBZLag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We were quite disappointed with the service we received during our stay.
When we arrived, the receptionist who greeted us seemed unhappy to be there and welcomed us with, “What do you need?” which felt unprofessional.

Upon entering our room, we discovered that the window had been left open. As it was around midnight and close to 0°C outside, the room was extremely cold and uncomfortable. We returned to reception to report the issue, the staff member on duty did not seem concerned and did not offer any solution. When we requested extra blankets, we were told that none were available, which was surprising for a hotel. Instead, we were offered additional pillows. A pillow?
The overall attitude of the staff made us feel uncomfortable, and rather than receiving an apology or assistance, we felt dismissed.
Could you please clarify whether your hotel is part of the Accor group? The level of service we experienced did not align with the standards we would expect from an Accor-branded property.yhe","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vibhu Verma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNfV-g5UA4Ny1XUQC8bMcIAKU79qM0WBSvEwAZPeRbKo_ttawn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The rooms have no intercom and every problem needs to be discussed by physically going at reception. While outside in Madrid, I called the hotel to check about food availability but nobody picked up the phone despite being on hold for 7-8 min twice. The ceiling wasn't even plastered and cracks were evident but reception claimed it was "industrial look". Breakfast was good and receptionist was cordial while sharing information.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hotel Madrid Alameda Aeropuerto Affiliated by Meliá

descriptions: Warm quarters in a modern hotel with a cozy eatery & a bar, plus free Wi-Fi & an airport shuttle.
owner: {"id":"102135490942130589251","name":"Hotel Madrid Alameda Aeropuerto Affiliated by Meliá (Owner)","link":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102135490942130589251"}
user_reviews: [{"Name":"H5007NKigors","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QdcKHisBXAOJmIugCgnKbcAscQkQI1t40WdQAMXk1g3ttzWj18FtKnHxNeSUm5OfHPMtQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"A perfectly fine hotel close to the airport. When I went to front desk, Sweet Susana looked up my reservation, entered my ID info...and happily told me my room was ready. So, I began my stay on a wonderful note.  When I checked out in the am, shuttle service arrived early.  Needless to say, check in and check out was BEST ever.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sequoia147","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeSe9ibNVY65MpgeQh70I370foM0-7tEPyVc9CIfSq5Ekli093sZJVPBoLD5d5qPK_2rw=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"This hotel will always be my go-to when flying in and out of Madrid.  The location is excellent with plenty of restaurants and bars within short walking distance, there is also a grocery store right around the corner.  I stayed here twice and the hotel staff was provided both times an excellent check-in and check out process.  Upon arrival, if needing transportation for the next day, simply let them know what time you would like to take the shuttle.  I also used the shuttle coming from the airport to the hotel from Terminal 4, that was very easy as well, simply wait at the \"Hotel Bus\" stop and look for the shuttle with the hotel name on it.  After you book your reservation, you can send a message to the property and they will provide you with the instructions on where the stops are and the timetable.  The breakfast was excellent and provided a lot of options both sweet and savory.  During my first stay, I forgot my phone charger with adapter in the room and I called them promptly to see if they could intercept it.  They were very communicative and responded to me that they had located it and would keep it there for me until my return for my outgoing stay.  Here's a tip if you booked a room with breakfast included but are leaving before breakfast is served: they will pack a \"picnic bag\" for you, this included a ham and cheese sandwich, a drinkable yogurt, orange juice, and apple or banana.  Finally, the room was fantastic -- exceptionally clean with all the right amenities:  in-room safe, small fridge, kettle and assorted teas/instant coffee.  It seems this hotel has been recently renovated and it was beautiful and comfortable.  And to my surprise, the room was very quiet. Truly an A+++ experience as far as airport hotels go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Frost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-k6pUNhmA3Gir9McO_YEHpvc7slb3hB4YXWvUqPtZ3qsiXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The location closed to the airport was great, the rooms and bed comfortable and I liked the terrace too. Staff were friendly but on arrival I was given a room with somebody already in it. On departure I was told the shuttle bus that I had booked the previous morning was full and my name wasn't on the list. These two administrative errors cost them a 5 star review","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maricely Veryser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNT3_zMmwxFU57ezplwpdpz1PmooQ_ld0iVQaGYDbPUSutSLfV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great customer service and rooms super clean. I recommend staying here. Breakfast is also really good, I also recommend it. They have a shuttle that takes you to the airport which is a plus!\nPool is closed during winter in case you were wondering. But the hotel is very well mantained!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"264andrews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Positives: clean, easy to get to, restaurant surprisingly good. Exactly what you want from an overnight airport stay.||Caveats: none really. Ambience is limited but it’s not what one is looking for","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexandra Fraguada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLiLKGvOD6PtNxjOnRWWAB5xTiOtYtGW-W0ZH3XNXq_otAyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The hotel itself is great but we chose it due to its airport shuttle. Since it stops at every terminal, and we unfortunately were not headed to terminal 1, I would suggest choosing a time 15 minutes before your actual desired time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keena Hudson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTjA5MeWvtHiUyZybJawA0FLvAJBb-SLglfL9Dz6Wi0Z0KdOBmow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So glad we chose this hotel for our airport stay. I appreciated the extra space for sorting bags.\nIt's in a residential area so lots of restaurants around. They also have their own shuttle by bus to the airport that leaves every 15 minutes. title: Meliá Barajas

descriptions: Elegant hotel offering Mediterranean dining & an outdoor pool, plus a bar & free 24/7 shuttle.

title: Tach Hotel Madrid Airport
address: C. Timón, 35, B, Barajas, 28042 Madrid
descriptions: Bright rooms in an informal hotel with free shuttle service, plus tennis & a sleek bar/eatery.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"d nyadesoj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcAkR5TMcpm8hSKTlxtrj5GPW3HCzFDBfe1VFsiUrkVSk_tA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Booked two rooms for a night. Arrived between 7:30pm-8pm. Easy check-in. Short walk to elevators. Well lit facility. Very clean. Great rooms. Used the dining facility after arrival and we were well served. Hotel close to Barajas International Airport with several option  to get to/from airport. We had a number of large check-in luggage,  so opted for Uber.  We didn't get an opportunity to check out the surrounding area, given our short overnight stay, but we were able to get a good night rest at the hotel before our next day flight. I would definately recommend the Tach Hotel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Cusworth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjtBkkknGMYxJSD4SL19PNqGu_yLnFVfzLvtIA0medP_VS5oe2AQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very happy with the hotel. The hotel is clean and the rooms are spacious mad comfortable.

The only bug bear is that standard rooms do not include a kettle which is odd.

Beds are firm and comfortable. Shower is very powerful and the rooms included a smart TV.

We will never return to Hotel Tasch. Breakfast was a complete disaster because of the staff member in charge of opening the breakfast area — a tall, skinny man who claimed his name was “David,” though it was obvious he was lying.

We arrived just five minutes early, and instead of any professionalism, we were met with rudeness and hostility. He was abrupt and aggressive, as if we were committing some sort of crime by starting to serve ourselves a bit early.

It is unacceptable for a hotel that works with hospitality to allow a rude, untrained employee to treat guests this way. This kind of service completely ruins the experience, no matter the location or the price.

I do not recommend this hotel to anyone. There are plenty of other places in the area.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hotel DWO Yuste Alcalá

user_reviews:

Other than that, everything was excellent. The staff were very nice, the breakfast was very good, and the location is great, especially if you’re going to IFEMA. If you want to go to the center of Madrid, it’s a bit far (Uber costs around €25) but there’s a metro line right at the door.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"coolkiwi79","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSgqtqtwBpS3ckto4UV9NilVITNYHhg8IZdaALyIRUUXyV6Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I'm an Accor member, so obviously gravitate towards staying at their hotels. I had originally booked at the Pullman, but it closed for renovations and I had issues accessing my booking, so I had to cancel it online but re-booked at the Novotel.

On arrival, we were booked into the Deluxe Suite (had paid for that) which was in the newly renovated part, but my parents-in-laws (same booking in a standard room) were in the Novotel next door. They were honest, said there would be some noise but it was the separation that we didn't want so chose to (effectively) downgrade to the older part of the hotel.

Lim on reception was brilliant and very helpful during our stay. Our room was older but at least convenient to our family across the hallway.

We did have a few issues though;
The door around the corner to the patio and pool area (closed in January obviously) was kept open the whole time (except one night) which made the corridors cold and seemed to be a waste of heat.
The water in our showr/bath was tepid, just hot enough to shower but not comfortably (the basin water was fine), so we had to boil water in the kettle to warm up a bath to bathe our two toddlers. However, the plug didn't seal well so the water drained out slowly so it was a race to heat the water and bathe the kids before it all ran out LOL.

Otherwise, the room was fine for our needs with the sofa bed made up and a queen(?) sized main bed too.

A few other minor issues but these were sorted in the end, a big thanks to Noelia on front desk along with Lim.

Overall, a few niggling issues so I knocked a star off, but it is very convenient to the Metro, 3 stops to the Airport and easy to get into central Madrid with only 1 change on the metro. So, location is handy although it is a commercial area - very large park nearby to go running/take the kids if you wish. An El Corte Inglés only 10mins walk away too for a bit of shopping.

I'm sure it would have been nice staying in the new rooms, they look nice in the photos, despite some issues I would return in the future. Brilliant location in terms of getting from the airport and into the centre of Madrid. About 10 mins from airport and 25 mins on Metro into centre. Breakfast was great. Blackout curtains were a delight and the bed was comfortable. No coffee machine in the room which I enjoy before breakfast but that's just personal choice. We had an issue with the safe which the staff corrected by the time we came back to the hotel after being out all day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"SA AD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfON9JtzRvNCOcFM5vyUOR87yoscbAdbTGuxmY5xwUeiKyvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stayed there for a 2 night layover, it’s a 6min walk to the metro/bus station and you can take the metro to the city center. We stayed there to be close to the airport since we had an early flight.
It’s a 10min ride to the airport.
The room was comfortable, but we could hear the shower leak all night.

There’s a 24/7 supermarket next door.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCELOrXCYBJLWhzF6SGXD55&fid=0x0:0xb5114d3f83e67e39"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Abby Ritt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU254xe7Ql1oc-nUw4BNU5UbiMVPUR4tXku-ZhJRB0Wwuw_8Cxz5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a good experience here with my husband! The hotel was very nice looking on the inside, very fancy. The staff was very nice to us too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christian Woodhead","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLITlB0VvTk-tzKxbjxjTV4zlgbepKYd9TKUSJ6PsGXUMNWOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Clean and tidy, and the beds are comfortable. The breakfast needs baked beans🙂. We was’t informed about the pool being closed even though the weather wasn’t good enough. The bathroom and the toothbrush was nice and soft and the toothpaste wasn’t too minty, just right👌. The bacon was bussing, too good to bee  true🙀.
I wouldn’t stay again as it’s slightly too far away from the centre even though we travelled on the amazing metro service which is cheap and easy to use.
There are a lot of restaurants and bars close by but they are of low quality.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInHmlHbVr37HRZ0TWQzH5Gr3MkVX64NPrw5_GaIrHkUZVTmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Second time staying here perfect for my type of weekend away, plenty of local shops, bars and restaurants minutes walk from hotel.

Very good breakfast and friendly staff. Looking forward to coming again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"iliasse Laaroussi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgAgT36DA7A1uJ0CTv--yla7r_3Z2ehcCG4X_2qYDH3Vw9MXRb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our stay was for 2 days and it was perfect overall. At the reception, they were incredibly friendly and nice — they spoke fluent English and even offered me a free parking spot, which I really appreciated.

There’s always a “but,” of course… The man in the breakfast room was extremely rude and unprofessional — no greeting, no smile, nothing. We arrived well within the breakfast hours shown by the hotel, yet he kept repeating (to us and other guests) “you have 10 minutes to finish,” coming back every few minutes like an alarm. If someone can’t do their job with respect, they should leave the position to someone who will do it properly and with a better attitude.

Other than that, everything was truly perfect.
Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hotel BESTPRICE Alegría
address: C. de Albasanz, 30, San Blas-Canillejas, 28037 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nadejda Albu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbu4dolEutEhDZLgSOCCHpVh__BImWL-g0HwXeryrkEaATJUvJ1A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stayed here for a few days as a team of athletes, and the experience really exceeded our expectations. We felt great throughout the entire stay, the rooms are clean, comfortable, and perfect for resting after long, active days.
The location is super convenient, very close to the airport and well connected to the city, which made our schedule much easier.
Price–quality ratio: excellent!
For us, it was exactly what we needed, and we would definitely return.
Highly recommended! 💯✨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"RachelUrquhart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfnSFWXMd1oJu73a6IhdtgibYcjse2HKQTHeghNQd9Cyw8DYQQJZDCyh-TD68ehXuY-FA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"No complaints. The room was clean and everything was well maintained. The hotel was about an 8min walk from the metro and it seemed safe. The location isn’t close to the major attractions but you can easily hop on the subway. The price is reasonable. The staff were helpful when needed. The housekeeping staff cleaned each day","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vladan Kabas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1zXOVKfen9qnl3eklTTawu6KrCjMEoWOP0rl38YKam3HxqdM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stay in this hotel was excellent.  Location is calm, 5 min walking from green metro station that is leading to city center. Price/quality ratio is perfect. Rooms are large enough, bathroom is spacious, heating works good. Everyday there was cleaning, and every 2nd day towells were replaced. Beds are comfrtable. There is free tea/apples in the lobby, which is nice :)
One potential add on: I would recommend to add hotel slippers in the room during winter period as the floor midght be cold. Big recommendation for this place, staff is great (available 24h)!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A. V.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMDpuRIRQtwHteZWUYRSK0aSXRLGMmPW6ooD59EVlfrNlG6DIt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great hotel! Clean, well located and it has everything you need, especially if you arrive late in the day in Madrid. 24hrs service and the staff are friendly and helpful. Will definitely stay there again nect time I’m in Madrid and would 100% recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Harpham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNPUOyR4VipcQFdk3KV4hGNhMOeorHIHdxxUSvApEnogyBqQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic hotel for exploring Madrid. It’s 25 minutes on the metro from the city centre. Pretty much brand new so everything is clean and modern. Rooms have everything you need - not luxury but really clean and well designed. It’s very quiet at night. Plenty of places to eat nearby, including the place for breakfast, which we had each day and was great value. But most of all, the staff were warm, welcoming and full of helpful info from start to finish. Would definitely come here again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEtlyTNZgJHqxi8vvGdhnE&fid=0x0:0x59d2562cb9c0c7d5"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Marriot Marriot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0IxehAHDsrlPdrFn-47I2tVnurSATOyqwFPfZ9OptznxkxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My stay in this hotel was very pleasant. The rooms are comfortable, quiet and very clean.
The staff was  incredibly nice and professional.
I had a few special requests during my stay and the staff was very kind and  helpful.  In addition, communication with the hotel by WhatsApp/email was most excellent.  I will definitely look to stay in this hotel when I visit Madrid again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Šmíd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrKbpsBwVgPFbtN43J3IMr4XnOh5BRKPt1YheUH3NQ_rgB3_J8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a great option in Madrid, I really recommend it. If I had to highlight one thing, it would be the staff. Every single person is very friendly, helpful and always smiling. We stayed for bussiness, requested a quiet room and they really took care in fulfilling it. You are always greeted with a smile, the rooms are nice, the breakfast is in a nearby restaurant and you have many options. We had a great time, thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VeenaH47","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QewvQXK08PhtQgCu1fT7TcdWcgcaXdOmFk48xW5xlmLo-Eqy0UOp2YqveGvl0etYz5BzA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"My husband and I stayed at the hotel for 3 nights.the location is close to a metro station and there are also plenty of restaurants and bars close by, also a supermarket. The reception staff were very friendly and helpful, we were made to feel very welcome every time we came into reception, they made every effort to answer any questions. The room was simple but very comfortable and clean. The bathroom was a good size with everything we needed for our stay. We paid 8€ each for breakfast each morning, this was provided in a cafe 2 minutes from the hotel was very good value. There was a good choice of breakfast ranging from a fry up to churros, a hot drink and orange juice were included in the price. We enjoyed our breakfasts in this neighbourhood cafe, speaking a little Spanish helped. I highly recommend this hotel, it was very simple but provided all we needed for a comfortable stay.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"JMatos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoqlVEjs7EL0Ypcxub1L2t2jf-dh9lnZfiuzZinDiYSlVGhYDDfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It’s ok, but the staff are not always welcoming nor helpful. They seem they don’t like their job, so they don’t care to treat people kindly. Furthermore, I presented a request to lower the volume that was too loud, sometimes reaching 89db or even 97db! How come the staff simply do nothing to sort out a problem like this! There were at least 5 children watching the movie under this so UNHEALTHY ENVIRONMENT!!! Yes, because being exposed to such an UNHEALTHY situation for about 2 hours will bring hearing loss certainly. No doubt about that! And it gets worse, because 25 minutes later the employee I had talked to him before simply did nothing! And when I approached him again to say that I was leaving the screening room because I couldn’t stand that TOO LOUD VOLUME anymore , he only said: “I thought they have already sorted out. Do you wanna write a complaint?” and he and his peer just laughed. Unbelievable! As I say to my folks: don’t go to this awkward cinema, because it’ll not be worth it. If you have other options, pick the other options and avoid this one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHtIajwQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Etienne Maricq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjYkr1lsQz_EAW1VKP7X6ZU_hf2k9m0r66YrT3MF7BR3nnEe8n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Took me several intents to register in the Cinesa iOS app that looks like it could get stability improvements.  The cinema facilities are ok, with subsidized underground parking and a few choices in the food court. It’s main merit is the range of original versión movies. Saw The Mule by Clint Eastwood in VO of course and the theatre was packed
Sound quality is ok, the elevators though are a little slow and too few of them","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4_9ugsQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2019-3-9"},{"Name":"Desirée Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1eBPC4O0m3niQE-hQ5-sMZKzE5QkmH4sEagZqR1dGU6nbCvNh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used a 35% coupon from LIDL!
I found out from the APP that there are promotional activities for LIDL after registration. You can enjoy a 35% discount when watching movies. The operation is very simple. Copy the discount code, then click the link below to select the cinema. Remember to paste your coupon as the price will change. After checking out and receiving the electronic QR code, you can go directly to the cinema to enjoy it!
The cola and popcorn are really huge. I simply can't finish them all!
I suggest not filling it up so full. It might spill out, especially if it falls into the elevator, which is very dangerous","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDiz-uq6M2RZJX3t684QwH_&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Alexander Belochkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHmUeAN5MO1lsv1FCF3_NmtiMje8muM_JQtnxEQ-aTRyEpYmq7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"What a poor experience we had.. It’s hard to believe but we were waiting for additional 20 minutes watching various advertisements (cars, butter etc 😵‍💫) before movie finally started. It made 25 minutes in total as we came 5 min before the indicated beginning time. The other people seemed more experienced and were coming later causing a lot of discomfort though.
It would have been better if XL sala could impress but it didn’t.
Lastly, paying almost 6 euros for parking (discount included) made it all even worse 😑","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iago Ciotkowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnEx-HO0nppATgfphy-4LhcT10B29x-fHDxyus1kaYr6IaWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very big cinema. Nearly all of the films can also be watched in original version, which makes it one of the best cinemas in the area if that's what you're looking for","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3glxRQgn9URltFrFYk9DK_gG1cvnnHaOf9k_Il-iDho5mEVVbMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Films in English/VSOE, great👍 but Accessibility Dangerous 💀⚠️. Escalators ↗️go up but only one small lift🛗 to go down for hundreds of people and an interminable wait 😡 If you are elderly🧑‍🦯 or physically impaired, 80+ concrete stairs await you in a badly illuminated stairwell⚠️
❌MANAGEMENT: THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE in the 21st century!❌
Pay for car park on level - minus 1  but I couldn't reach level - minus 2 by stairs as door was locked from one stairwell.⛔🆘 ♨️ MANAGEMENT :YOU NEED A NEW EFFICIENT ELEVATOR!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Víctor TP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjXJe97L0aE_8bIs9VlL0vbReVvdVjh5W9q8Kpj7eacLhdoq6IWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's good to spot places where watching movies is not so expensive (around 4 euros less than the Spanish dubbed versions). So if you manage to understand other languages or your reading is fast, I highly recommend you to try the original version movies here. I saw a German movie, it was less than 7 euros. Totally worthy! 🍿","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jean Francois Forgeot d'Arc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlUx-OaCiAidPUIRf6Rydxc14XuxMV-fQ52fzfRo0CLRxygEuM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Large screens and greater choices of movies. Having said this, extremely difficult to park in the area, huge queues for buying drinks or popcorn. But most importantly, people are not prevented to enter the movie projection room after it starts... 20 min after movie begins, 7 people were entering and bothering everyone...Not a customer and quality focus, they make business by volume....","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"MADARIAGA Magdalena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJg4CR003-qsmqAGvlhWV-e7YJGn93COtXTA_SNReWyMFmjxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Such sour flavour with this place I decided to explore other cinemas than coming back here even is closer to my house. They had this blind box even in which you're supposed to get a box for each purchased menu. The first time, they never offered me the box when I purchased my menu and I was not aware I have to ask for it. 2nd time even if I requested the box, they said the event is valid only if you purchase the menu from the bar and not from the screens. 3rd time they told me they have none available even though the posters were still on the counter. I mean,if you put special conditions to some event, make sure everyone is aware of them from the beginning not investing them whenever you want. If the product is sold out, just remove the advertising posters. I feel scamed either by the company or by the employees. I don't want to even go on this subject. I has to wait literally 5 minutes in a \"queue\" for them to finish their gossip while it was just me and my parents waiting to get our order whele at least 7-8 of them were \"very busy\". I was not even aware they placed the popcorn bucket on the counter as they just throw it there and left whiteout even saying anything. I was patiently scaning the menus on screen until my mom approached me aking if I need anything else, and when told her Im just waiting for the popcorn, she show me the bucket. They even had the audacity to giggle behind my back while heading to the movie theater.As an ex frequent customer my advice for this place is to hire proper customer service oriented staff instead of trying to find way to improve \"customers satisfaction\" with overpriced food/drinks/items. And a proper instruction on actually respecting and offering the events items will be a plus.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jorge González Moreno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDYcUhPc2o3wfKvG-id0x21BDXO44Ad1d0909XstPK5GJZOLE2Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Premier seats with USBs were great. Good facilities, clean and COVID measures as gel, separation, contactless admission","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDi6ZTiswE\u0026fid=0x0:0xb0e49fb5fa171ddf"],"When":"2020-12-8"},{"Name":"Ventu Antequera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3fav68xZK8bptZ1Gh4d3RSsui6H8lm4j-pCeQEj3_18MjGqAZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great cinema but maybe a little expensive. If you know when to go, you see a movie for a very good price thanks of their offers. Very well located near the Madrid airport. They have movies in English. Inside the cinema is available a bar with food (🍿 popcorn, nachos, and more) and beverages. Very comfortable seats and we'll controlled atmosphere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiAiDujoFNRvFuv0GbpnLt4ekluY31vaY94fMeK70zi3TuWCXs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"For 3D movies, first you pay a 3D supplement, then you buy glasses (the 'lens' is plastic film, not durable at all) for 1.50 per pair. Overpriced for an average sized screen.\nPopcorn (and a soft drink) for 10.90?! Come on.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elena P.Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZyO6WI_nk5Kr10g7JADWmJPYjtaXd14B0BNdZINRR_yeUoGFKrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We watched a movie that was already in theaters for at least a month, so the room was the smallest one. The problem was that it was really dirty. We found popcorn and bbq sauce everywhere. It was really disgusting","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adriana Curletti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQwWLlxvBK1qwyTfnJrejIwnxvYmjY-rD5bvqoqI8plm8hU0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful historical movie theater ... brand new on the inside in the very middle of the heart of Madrid...VOSE system which allows to enjoy the movies in the original language with subtitles in Spanish if you please!!!... you can also get your ticket on line and get an digital QR... no paper mess...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Ybañez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1npDD4D49wBnH3FNe7BrnEd_0_-NDZcabKoews3F502SdTcRN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was so great. Maybe the movie was a little loud for me but for the rest it was great. They respect the covid rules and the staff is so nice ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Johnny Cadenas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlapWu8NtHzGTeaozpfC6c-neEs8fz4kg5zpQjN6ZrZn0Gay1u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"How can it be that the cinema is so dirty at 12 when they just open? It looks like it hasn’t been clean in months. Disappointing","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Maya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXazRaLVuweU0TyMKLcAN6yzGwKc_oxUubOLIP2BGEhxRDswy0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved this cinema. Tried a cinema with couches somewhere else and these are way more comfortable for a long movie. The vibe is great. The sound is very good and the screen. Popcorn is good. The bathroom was surprisingly nice and not like other cinemas. We're gonna be coming here more now.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCC8gDFzS0DcyoL3Kd8lvNP&fid=0x0:0x52ac0d63ee3e76f6"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Lynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7cpi0MyQtOU7XQM_iygyNg67ZSSGrVeaYasNW-h6w0pmRxCYS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This cinema has been one of my favourite in Madrid for so many reasons including how warm and welcoming the owner is to the patrons. Unfortunately, after the renovation of the cinema the new staff hired does not seem to show the same level customer service standards - they are cold and unwelcoming like the man with the earring and the female staff that is so quick to turn the lights on as soon as the credits start to roll. I hope the owner in the future will hire staff that share his philosophy of wonderful customer service. I would love to give this cinema a 5 rating
that it deserves if services returns to the level before the renovation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7WcsQL-_YjeB8ikBAzP5P--Xr9uZHDVblH8z78yaEZTujZulB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this new cinema. So unique. Caleido is my new favourite place in general for everything.
Having this cinema is really great. Amazing sound, comfortable sofa-like seats. Good popcorn and cool bathrooms.
Plus very pleasant customer service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDxuYCUfQ&fid=0x0:0x52ac0d63ee3e76f6"],"When":"2023-6-11"},{"Name":"Amanda Donnelley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8InSUuIi1XDi6HdPNsvA5PbUmWTZuF3UUM0Ol9_In8dX2gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best VOSE movie theater we have found in Spain.
