[{"Name":"Lucas Palacio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaS1UijbaDVsxTPEU1TOzKAi-O014zJFVZRBcMp_Ft6C3X4_6F8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Realmente amé este cine , se nota renovado y todo muy limpio , me gustó el autoservicio en la compra de pop corn y dulces .

La sala está muy bien . Tamaño de pantalla justo y el sonido increíblemente bueno .

El espacio que hay entre las butacas es algo para destacar también

Recomiendo este cine 100%","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5C_Ev19RoifJgfFJgFNly&fid=0x0:0x1b3753abec8404f0"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Jose Jalai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSkT0fRRyCxBvOUJH7qRyT3v8U6HftAFSrBG7mYKMGJJgo8Ys4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"MUY BUENO y RECOMENDABLE
⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

Hemos visitado el Cine Plaza Coslada en familia y la experiencia ha sido excelente.
El ambiente es muy acogedor, perfecto para disfrutar de una buena película en un entorno cómodo y agradable.
Destacamos especialmente los precios, que son muy asequibles, algo que agradecemos mucho siendo familia numerosa.
Además, el acceso es muy sencillo y hay facilidad para aparcar cerca, lo que hace la visita aún más cómoda.
Sin duda, un cine muy recomendable para pasar un buen rato en familia sin gastar de más.
¡Volveremos pronto!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-EdkZLf-_Sp2iQSCYFTrw&fid=0x0:0x1b3753abec8404f0"],"When":"2025-6-22"},{"Name":"E AP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMRkI6NUaXhG-TfSSluSJ4PdmD-43xWK5s2ZyrvybmAD6VXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Las butacas tienen pinta de.ser.muy antiguas y rentas, cómo las de toda la vida. ¿Son reclinables? ¿Se puede.modificsr algo la posición de la espalda? Al ser unos.cines nuevos quizás tenga esas opciones...
¿Alguien me puede ayudar?
Gracias.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Unai Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7YKAf2CalvDY_KV2YdmJ5FFQ7zQobZTPNENnO6t3YYq0n0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Fui a ver 28 años después, la sala es bastante pequeña, la pantalla no es de las mejores al igual que el audio, si queréis ir a ver una película ma cual no sabéis si os merece o una infantil no está mal, pero para películas mas serias no os merece","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3m0z1OtoRjhHBNRfixuTe&fid=0x0:0x1b3753abec8404f0"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"alba galindo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVm73YEGN7sw83ufpJp4BjwZURpDbNZopxCJn11Y2-Zdp4q5RV-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es muy cómodo, las salas están bien acondicionadas y al estar escalondas no te molesta nunca el de delante. Los precios algo elevados y no le doy 5 estrellas porque las veces que he ido tienen el 90% de los inodoros cerrados para que no se utilicen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4MKBsJhBbL4oVsQGiYKNm2KBccIT5pjohk8tRilRCqvIpMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Experiencia mala, hemos ido a la sesión de las 19:30 hemos llegado dos minutos tarde y las puertas del cine estaban cerradas, entiendo que llegamos tarde pero aún así no estaban los trabajadores en recepción para poder decirles algo, estaban todos encerrados en un cuarto. No nos han dejado pasar y para acompañar a todo esto, los trabajadores que hay ahora, son muy bordes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eric Peña Besoli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc6kP8JUWCZHZzW_6nvC0kaQzF9KwoY6uP4-CmMnkFRsbiLqep=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Gran experiencia en Cines Plaza Coslada, sin duda ha llegado la nueva generación de cines.

Muchos tótem para comprar entradas tanto dentro del cine como fuera repartidos por el centro comercial, fácil acceso (escaleras o ascensores), totalmente habilitado para personas de movilidad reducida.

Aspecto elegante y novedoso, auto servicio tanto para la compra de entradas como para acceder al cine pasando por la compra de palomitas, chucherías y bebidas (si tienes dudas hay personal del cine para indicarte lo que te haga falta) se acabo el servicio a granel y que te sirvan las palomitas, solo tu tocas lo que comes.

En cuanto a la sala, pantalla y sonido:

Las salas son lo más, nuevas y confortables, muy agradables de estar, la pantalla está por encima de la media, tienen reproductores destacados, el sonido falta calibrarlo pero van por buen camino.

La única pega fue que la película empezaba a las 19 y empezó a las 19:30, entendemos que era la semana de apertura y faltaba un poco coger el ritmo a los trabajadores con los aparatos y su funcionamiento.

Volveremos en busca de las 5 estrellas. Muy recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID21_noew&fid=0x0:0x1b3753abec8404f0"],"When":"2022-5-27"},{"Name":"Susana Cabeza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHEXwcdTAe1GkLrv-9-eL9S7RJhAGWOS30sFg8JJPppWjsO9qhyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Los cines están bien en general. Las salas están en la misma planta. Baños adaptados. Se entra a través de tornos. La web es intuitiva y tienen oferta de bonos. El pero se lo pongo en las luces de las escaleras de las salas. Una vez se apagan las luces generales, las de las escaleras son molestas y se reflejan en la pantalla. Tienen papeleras de papel y plástico. Otra cosa que deben cambiar son las pajitas para las bebidas, ahora las tienen de plástico.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID29L_nhAE&fid=0x0:0x1b3753abec8404f0"],"When":"2022-5-7"}]

[{"Name":"chen levy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0QgD_gqTlXwKtBpxuK407GKy3lqZEDZXO6CULgXQaOd1WKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A cool VIP cinema with a warm and cozy viewing experience — it truly feels like watching a movie at home 🎬
Super comfortable armchairs, a relaxed atmosphere, and kind, attentive waiters who make the experience even better.
Perfect for a fun, pampering movie night. Highly recommended! 🍿✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgzNsTG7JnNA_GWKyO6qK0&fid=0x0:0x86ef21c474b2f305"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Rainer Sebus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJi6TkIePwKambaOwGyHkYGDn6wdDxMz8LVd33IqYGg9ivfqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great cinema y exceptional experience

We like this cinema, comfortable seats, luxury menue and in cinema service.

But today I’ve made a very special experience:
I forgot my wallet during the last movie. Not only they found it, they shared they phone number and whatsapp and informed me!
But not only they did all possible to hep me - the content of my wallet was complete and nothing was missing!

Thank you to the whole team for saving me and for being so incredible reliable, honest and friendly! You are an example!

Best experience ever!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Noble-Beeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFNyIuz4uLoClMLsJ2-CMtxYIiGSeiXqzAiwnE8hhQroQ2w18IOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This was my inaugural experience viewing "Avatar 3" in a Spanish-subtitled theatrical presentation and first time at the lux super theatre. The cinema's entrance presented a remarkably clean, aesthetically pleasing, and sophisticated ambiance. However, upon entering the theater, I noted the restroom facilities were singularly located at the rear of the premises, necessitating a considerable walk from the main viewing areas.

I appreciated the convenience of in-seat food ordering. Regrettably, the burger I ordered, despite requesting it medium-rare, arrived significantly undercooked. Furthermore, although I had arranged to receive my crepe after my meal and subsequently utilized the service button to request it, it was not delivered until near the conclusion of the film.

A significant discomfort throughout the screening was the excessively warm temperature within the theater. It felt akin to a sauna, suggesting either a lack of air conditioning or its operation in a heating capacity. This, combined with the faux leather seating, resulted in considerable discomfort for patrons. I strongly recommend activating the air conditioning and potentially offering blankets to those who may find the temperature too cool, as the room was uncomfortably hot by the end of the 3.5-hour film, including advertisements.

The staff, however, were consistently kind and polite, which is the sole reason for the two-star rating. Aside from the commendable service, the menu and food quality were unsatisfactory.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Howard W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwehXjkfqD3sZjAAgJUj7akN1KRtboTR08co9cNaRjeu3AlaU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is great. The chairs are super comfortable - but really not worth ordering food. Snacks like pop-corn and drinks they deliver fine. But having visited quite a few times, I have learned that hot food either arrives cold, incomplete, or not at all. Just save your money and enjoy the reclining seat and marvellous view.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessie Kuo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV029-cvNrenk_yGJ___J8pMQxTr6zK6Y8Zk7KyvoUDT8K9uJsP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved my experience here—so worth the extra money for an upgraded movie night! Saw Babygirl with friends, and the seats were incredibly comfortable. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniel Farrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0WkJKRxRlXu0V-f-Ul4t9lwMvSMYQKbDUY8DLC3jZoL-o3tA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was a nice mall with a decent selection of shops.  The top floor was quite hot and uncomfortable, and the atmosphere was a bit run down.  I wasn't overly impressed with its glamor.

The parking was relatively useful if you have a small car.  I find it frustrating that they limit parking so much in general in Spain.  If you are in anything larger than an SUV, you can skip this stop.

The Dunkin was a nice touch though!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQCCqTE2J5oQwULrvuyzrr&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2025-7-18"},{"Name":"Tom Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKakUsBKh3lbWplL_C7crmzVx2wI2ZqDt3ZD0cjsuahDgMEJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Be extremely cautious of the people around this area, you can’t tell who are good people who are bad people.  Most importantly, thieves and criminals are watching you, awaiting for you to be distracted or make mistakes.  We were robbed on the first day we arrived to Madrid, we rent a car and travel to this area in hope to find a bank to exchange money and grab a bite.  It was 12 noon and broad daylight, with my car parked along the street stepped about 30 feet to the money exchange place, with less than 15 minutes, they ransacked my car and took all my luggage, backpack, everything else they find in the car, thing like sunglasses and jacket.  They did so swiftly that I didn’t even noticed, as I get back to car and drive to my Airbnb, that’s when I opened my trunk and noticed all my luggage are gone.  My wife and i stranded without any personal belongings on the first day and feeling very distraught.  We have hear lots of tidbits about pickpockets and scammers but this experience show that there is more than that,  thieves and criminals must have on lookout at a constant pace, watching everyone in-n- out, arriving and leaving awaiting for us to make mistakes.  Granted, I forgot to lock my door, we were stepping away for only about 30 feet and still in broad daylight (noon time), but yet they managed to robbed us clean.  We are talking about 3 pieces of full size luggage and few other large item, we were in a busy /crowded area, I am sure many of the business establishments must have witnessed the whole thing unfolding and probably have seen this quite often.  After experiencing the bad ordeal on the first day of arrival, we were so disappointed of Spain, we booked a flight home.  I written all this just to let people know that, Madrid is not safe and you can find yourself in dire position if you don’t careful.  Thieves and criminals are watching you and awaiting to rob you whether it’s day or night.  We canceled the last leg of the trip to Barcelona and come home right after the experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrjNTkGR-EcSgQdNmXWVQlp-P4RaZdlb2TD5ba47RXmT6wnziuog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty good for a city mall! Parking is good, there is a parking lot and a parking garage. They have all the major stores, H&M, Primark, all the Zara family of stores, C&A, Decathlon City, loads of places to eat on the top floor, a Mercadona to do your shopping and a movie theater. I am rating it a four because I feel that they don't keep the bathrooms up to snuff. The times that I've been there, I've found dirty stalls with unflushed toilets and no soap in the automatic dispensers. I understand it's the customers doing this, but they should have someone coming round once an hour or so to check this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICF-dCpPg&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2023-10-29"},{"Name":"Bubble Ha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBQ6OBgGqLdNppM4K6PJ759fYleuYvLD6B6cC-TB_G4MvIltwB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great experience shopping at this mall. Very clean, lots of space and good restroom facilities. Only thing I could not find was an information board or shops listing. Hence one star less.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"franchesca avila","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn1loxQ3ZhbHfB8dEuFJ4nUzy0Oqc8gR1So97T4EeIA61htIAUhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice and clean,has lots of good stores and kid friendly...love the restaurants...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9eJrL_ZSzQUmNb0Y2GHXd&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"Jose Luis Torres Caceres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9_6hcoSNrweYMI1WgaQQYQa4RFKgYHrM1JYjAnGshyZXTvbdD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great selection of stores and nice shopping experience. Not close to any Metro station but taxis are easily available at any gate. Plenty of restaurants and coffee shops, clean restrooms. Visited at the end of summer and air conditioning was kept nice and cold.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dean Elliott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVwDKYCwrh6-cQAuT43-wjFQHZND4N454Pr9_QfY6Kwzc7-f_4SA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good. Excellent barber inside opposite Mercadona. Kevin from Pereira, Colombia. I wish Spanish people were as friendly as Kevin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hector Zelaya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7PhKa9Rmxl5_1uYGtydt9vQ6ooFXTGEdZL0kCuklIWfYbZsdTYg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We made the trip from Gran Via to Plenilunio. After several stations and a 15 min walk, we arrived. It was worth the trip! Plenilunio is beautiful, trendy, and well kept. We had a great time with my wife and kids. You’ll find multiple food options on the 3rd floor and stores, including Primark, Zara, and others. You’ll enjoy it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG-OT52AE&fid=0x0:0xdbc107e10df5fb01"],"When":"2021-10-20"}]

The location on Calle de Fuencarral makes it extremely accessible by public transport. They show a good variety of films, from mainstream blockbusters to original language versions. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ctgb2","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItC9iDa9r9g_651odkZll6vFcFOS4APKRO34THBDIzmKIUQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped by Alcalá Norte mostly by accident while exploring a more residential side of Madrid, and it felt very different from the big flashy malls near the center.

This place is clearly built for locals. Not luxurious, not trendy — just practical. You’ve got supermarkets, everyday clothing stores, small electronics shops, and a simple food court. The kind of mall people actually use for errands rather than spending an entire afternoon shopping.

The atmosphere is calm and normal. Families doing groceries, teenagers hanging out after school, older couples sitting with coffee. It feels real compared to tourist-heavy areas.

Food options were basic but affordable, which was honestly refreshing after city-center prices. Nothing gourmet, but easy and convenient.

It’s not somewhere you travel across Madrid to visit — but if you’re nearby and want to see everyday life instead of attractions, it works perfectly.

Overall:
Not exciting, but authentic. A neighborhood mall rather than a destination, and that’s exactly its charm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Davies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdSTIM222cwStEOhRt2EALfmVqUWOwP149WtsB61NuZ00xoLIwUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is good value but the shopping center is very strange.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Urban Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZY0HoHOb7lzycQDWjKey0rY0ABGKAZdibLczqX3_UWre4TRE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pathetic. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cines Verdi is an absolutely charming independent cinema that I thoroughly recommend to anyone looking for a more authentic film-going experience in Madrid. Located in the Chamberí district, this cinema specialises in showing original version films with subtitles, which is a real treat for cinema enthusiasts. The atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming, quite different from the typical multiplex experience. The screens may be smaller, but the quality is excellent, and the seats are comfortable. I particularly appreciate their carefully curated programme of independent and art-house films. The staff are knowledgeable and passionate about cinema. The ticket prices are very reasonable for central Madrid. It's a lovely spot for anyone who wants to enjoy quality films in their original language.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benjamin Eg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdvuhpybsr5HUT5xosEciNsCpupXrkfHEFhaFjJfwBvtjmUXc8iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A really really cool and retro cinema. Prices are fair (though you must use at least 6 euros in order to pay with credit card at the snack shop) and the screens are good.\n\nThe only bad thing, which is a major thing to me and I really considered giving three stars, is that the service is incredibly bad! Not one smile but instead a lazy and rude attitude from the staff! Especially those at the snack shop! Such a shame.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4mdm0DA\u0026fid=0x0:0xe974329bf008c9bd"],"When":"2017-1-29"},{"Name":"Duke (Duke)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1xhwxEpkF0JRMq-k-cRafWMJJH8FEmJkh9qpQnujYG5Pbj6ZX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The website does not work at all. International delivery could be a bit cheaper, otherwise very good!
Definitely recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Penelope Gore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSANMw4MSnmbvpLdSp3PvVG7w0_tUhNckb-08YtbjwlLys1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I bought a Spanish language DVD from DVD Store Spain. I had a fantastic experience. The personal service made the purchase easy. I was offered a choice as to postage cost and the DVD arrived in Australia very quickly. I would definitely purchase from this store again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diego de Acuña Roldán","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUppNm6HupbOVAtiXhh4Q1Y45ZGyspcOi_hcykItk9jYMPIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un completo descubrimiento esta página de venta de cine, el catálogo es inmenso, va mucho más allá que los grandes almacenes de siempre, el trato y la atención al cliente es fantástica, realicé un primer pedido y todo vino perfecto. Como amante del cine es ahora mi lugar de referencia para comprar. Que siga así siempre, porque voy a seguir comprando sin duda.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alvaro A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBtWDPlVRU8LdDxXHtvt6sr3nQCKv3HNAwTRvC0zRFvBuZd-IW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Me sumo a la opinión de un usuario de hace 7 meses en el que afirma que al parecer retractilan/re-precintan DVDs (en mi caso una serie completa en pack) previamente usados o manipulados como si los vendiesen nuevos a estrenar de fábrica.

El día 12 de noviembre del 2024, hago una compra en su página web de la serie de TV “Fringe” a un “módico” precio de 85 € por el pack completo en castellano, que acabó siendo un poco menos por una serie de descuentos aplicados (cabe destacar dicho sea de paso que el precio de referencia por lo que he estado viendo del resto de distribuidores es de 80 €).
El pedido me llega el lunes 18 y nada más desprecintarlo me encuentro con la sorpresa: huellas en los discos, rayones por todas partes en los discos, picadas en la caja de cartón, picadas en las cajas donde van los DVD… (adjunto fotos de todo en esta reseña).

Me pongo en contacto con ellos explicando absolutamente todo al detalle y, tras indicarme que no saben lo ocurrido ya que “viene sellado de fábrica”, me dan 2 opciones: devolverlo y me lo reembolsan o me envían un reemplazo y recogen el defectuoso. Elijo esta segunda opción.

El martes 19 me confirman que el pedido ha salido y que lo recibiré seguramente el miércoles. Así acaba siendo: el miércoles 20 un repartidor de la empresa Tipsa (opción que curiosamente no está disponible cuando haces una compra ya que solo te permiten enviar con CTT o con Correos) me entrega el pedido de reemplazo y se lleva el primero. La historia se repite; nada más desprecintarlo me encuentro con la sorpresa: rayones en los DVD, picadas en la caja de cartón, dos de las cajas de plástico donde van los DVD medio rotas… (adjunto también las evidencias del envío nº 2).

Vuelvo a ponerme en contacto con ellos explicando lo sucedido y tras pedirme disculpas se limitan a decirme que “como pudo comprobar el producto estaba precintado, nosotros no podemos saber si tiene daños ya que no los abrimos” y echan la culpa a la editora/distribuidora diciendo que se lo habrán enviado defectuoso. Ya me extraña que 2 packs viniendo de fábrica de una distribuidora vengan tan sumamente mal. Jamás en mi vida me ha ocurrido algo parecido. Voy más allá, he comprado DVDs y packs de segunda mano, usados, por tanto, y han venido en infinitamente mejores condiciones que esta vergüenza.

De este segundo envío me ofrecen devolverlo y recibir el reembolso, cosa que he rechazado porque evidentemente la serie la quiero.

Sirva todo esto para alertar a posibles usuarios que piensen comprar en su tienda. Si vendéis algo de segunda mano, hacerlo saber, pero no juguéis con los clientes, no nos toméis por tontos, ni engañéis a la gente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPgO6fXw&fid=0x0:0x5c3bc772c87b511a"],"When":"2024-11-20"},{"Name":"Mari Carmen VN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKi7z3HyrwvLBYMfSMGGOBXXCpsoWqMhoOxp5ftKUxoporI4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy profesionales: servicio impecable, precios competitivos, y un catálogo de películas y series antiguas muy interesantes. Volveré a comprar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MIGUEL RODRIGUEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqfS2owT48nYAQyRFOFFthGuvB3_46zVloLmeZPKd_WzFdb4k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fueron muy profesionales conmigo, pues me había equivocado al hacer un pedido y me lo cambiaron sin poner ninguna objeción","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Víctor Olcina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW3u9x9wuTnT6YyeOFhNTnwYtH5r8Z4RGiUOiQUNNehdXjuoD4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Imprescindible para los amantes del cine. Tienen auténticas joyas que no encuentras en otros lados. Además, el servicio es excelente: Cumplen con los plazos y las pelis llegan en buen estado. Su sistema de compensación de puntos también vale mucho la pena, ahorras mucho. Muy recomendable!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jorge Parral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmfsotJF2tdN0xprwX8k69oGekXeNoi4aHYqbs6-Pm3YQhBwDL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El paraíso del formato doméstico en Madrid. Eso sin mencionar que el personal empleado es de lo más amable que te puedes encontrar. Recomendable 100%","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOKw1bbJ9rHKRg&fid=0x0:0x5c3bc772c87b511a"],"When":"2025-6-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aiden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYSm6zhd-CSRY3AoywB7scR56leCbUQQQr5oyKv8bSm_p1xNxgQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The cinema is high quality with convenient online or in-person booking. They offer original-language showings of most movies, which is a big plus. Although both the snacks and tickets are a little expensive, the prices seem to be pretty typical for most modern cinemas. They often have custom popcorn buckets/merch for the 'big' showings, which is always appreciated (even if the buckets are ~€30).

I have purchased their TooGoodToGo bag, and was pleasantly surprised by what I received (from what I remember, it included a hot dog, popcorn, soda, and a candy bar) for the price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8u1d-Vopv_SkItO9YQGHf&fid=0x0:0xae6550e1ef47da01"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Emilia Rabat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcPxwQsHlZsVpo8Z4Su6P9qMsolpO1wtZUxUbefPlpZL9gUq9r0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The location of the cinema is unbeatable. It is a good cinema with a good disposition of the necessary elements for the acquisition not only of the tickets but of the snaks and soft drinks. As well as the tickets for it.
I like that there are rooms near the bathrooms, in other cinemas they are far away.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKbGHsiCX91XHC5XhjiKMM&fid=0x0:0xae6550e1ef47da01"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Chetan Bhanwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUR3ES8hZ3n2CRUnSdxWuX5ZAsxsh2TT8Z0x2ap2TQXs8O-yf_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is where you get a great quality experience, nice one to enjoy movies here in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcQw1fbg5VdoBEXBZcuDDlZPhx-3_Tw-mAyAyTZ4Oh578NXAjt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must to go and enjoy movies with your popcorn in Prinsipe Pio mall/station #Cinesa

[{"Name":"Grace Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzZHXPKOitq2ssNxxZT8caLmJzVQtlvxKjeqpqZoNzVlh-gy0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had the most lovely time watching the wicked premier double showing tonight the staff was exceptional. Going above and beyond to make there guests happy. Juan Luis helped me in concessions and was so nice and friendly and happy to help me even when it was very busy. I have nothing bad to say about this place. As someone who as worked at a movie theater myself for 6 years I can recognize a theater who cares about there customers and staff.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beatriz Bassadone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKP9EYweDzMm26JX5nlOO46hatD07yhjP7z3_pwBlhho_bia7i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SUPER amazing service, i was running late and my friends left the entrance guy my ticket and he helped me rush to find my room just in time","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Devansh Joshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLICIenBzxCJiEqDvLgYsvmvMAyuaQRiiuNTGnw3lRDw_7o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Overall experience is ok as seats and sound system is good but the screen brightness and pixel resolution is not up to the mark. It is not only this theater I have experienced this same as in Cinesa La gavia as well might be everywhere the screen quality is poor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcos García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVB4eU9kxHjiTMiAkUc5_kvrqaFmLLgeAaF5JWu4OOpdPGFdiT73w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The facilities are good enough. Even if the food is not the best, it's pretty edible.
The lounge is usually clean and busy. Now in the pandemic, it's more quiet but still very clean and tidy.
All the staff is very friendly and wear masks properly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diego Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6OrGccdkicXi0sIJhfTJ4sAk3VqXdcAFGFg1KFCZy6FLCCrKD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is by far my favorite movie theater. The staff is super nice, everything is super clean and it's very close to Renfe (C5)

Update: Still my favorite movie theater","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Timothy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU01SZZx4xHdf2QGtI80vWvQNAm7jlQ8-fVlhxIyTKdjD_sUzMxPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 stars is pretty fair I think. I’d emphasize some good points about this place:
- this chain of cinemas is really convenient. By that I mean - easy to buy tickets online/cash/or in special “atm” provided inside the cinema.
- because of the good online and “easy to use” system for tickets there is almost no line..
- inside the cinema you can get any food and drinks, even Jamón what was really pleasing for me
- the cinema itself offer good deals of monthly tickets with really good price
- people understand English
- really easy to find your cinema room, ether though it’s huge couple floors building
- toilets are clean","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp48ibogE&fid=0x0:0xf08e5c586405b565"],"When":"2023-8-28"},{"Name":"Gabriela Segnini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJeR_wv1ZxbUIEekO--SNe291VrDn4_-p6BQQSMPJOXdCIWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Faulty ticket system that gave repeated seats. They kept us waiting for ten minutes before going in, then they gave us bad seats and split our group because of a mistake on their end. We talked to the manager after the show and rather than apologizing for the bad experience, they made xenophobic comments.

Never coming back here.

-Rooms are very small and very close to the screen.

-There are no ramps

-Far too expensive for the very poor service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Adrián Pérez Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8JkhhjxFYyq85c1xF5O1TT1C6xqeYRas5F36HfLvF3gL0HZET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place is nice with many movies to watch, the service is fast and everything is pretty clean. The location is a bit weird.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cines Renoir Retiro is a splendid art-house cinema that offers a refreshing alternative to the typical multiplex experience. Located near the Retiro Park, it's perfectly positioned for combining a film with a stroll through the beautiful park gardens. The cinema specialises in showing original version films with subtitles, which is absolutely brilliant for those who prefer to watch films in their intended language. The screens are intimate and well-maintained, creating a cosy atmosphere that enhances the viewing experience. I particularly appreciate the carefully selected programme featuring independent films, documentaries, and international cinema. The staff are helpful and knowledgeable about their film selection. Ticket prices are very fair, especially considering the quality of films shown. A wonderful spot for proper cinema enthusiasts in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anastasis Tzanis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVd_cqy8jA4PiMgakfrE3RJpcrgyOLh-iRNLP08hxI8mjaf8mfe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience. I saw Marty Supreme with my son. Comfortable seats, sound…

What surprised me a lot is that there were no advertisements at the start!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Maria Tijerina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUN2vlCdnJoVVzCMvczORJZNy6fp097DcqnE5mvO5JL7UyEJ4mK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service is fine. The cinemas are small compared to those established in shopping centres; therefore they only have four movies shown simultaneously. I cannot give it more stars because the hall where I watched The Oppenheimer film (hall number 4) was very hot. I don’t know why the staff do not turn the AC on in that hall. The ground floor was very comfortable with the AC on, but that floor is only used to buy snacks, the cinema halls are on the first floor. I originally considered going more to this cinema because they offer movies in the original language, the building history and architecture but I doubt it now. I didn’t enjoy the sweating experience. If you don’t mind the heat and sweat while watching a movie, I recommend you give it a go to Cine Renoir.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpiJTjsAE&fid=0x0:0x51a9af2c6457db94"],"When":"2023-8-15"},{"Name":"Round The World Girl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0y5QV-9nEp-7-z2MpSwPmrSFXc749CzbaBQNP7EkLLpV56-t9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here on a Wednesday to watch a discounted movie (under €5). Yes the theatre is a bit dated but it was perfectly fine. I watched a “Version Original” film in English that had Spanish substitles. So happy to be able to see VO films not to far from where I’m staying.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEz8_i_wE&fid=0x0:0x51a9af2c6457db94"],"When":"2019-3-1"},{"Name":"Manuel Velazquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7dqAEY0OMFYKAIGkc_3QsBz0DLVtJGgXgyP7uL-H0U3Dv7WKv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"All good just maybe they could turn on the lights a bit at the end of the movie.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQtNWiSA&fid=0x0:0x51a9af2c6457db94"],"When":"2025-3-2"},{"Name":"iTo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBPbwGQbFgpDz5BQH2yMYbh0AKCwAR912HrDwTAzmrxQcT_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Good cinema that feels safe and follows the COVID safety protocols. The screen rooms are too long for the screen size, so I would not recommend going to far away from the screen. Also, the sound doesn't sound like any surround sound system, but more like stereo.

Good news is that the movies are in original version, but with subtitles in Spanish; I would recommend them to have a couple of sessions per week without substitutes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristiina Day","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxD7Rle6GdP_FoDJXqP2IKoxQxxNQrOjApe131n_k-dTBeG7AS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I love this theater. It is small but has friendly staff and is in a quiet part of town with nice restaurants.

I saw a review that the a/c wasnt working during a viewing of Oppenheimer. So i started looking at other places that I know and saw the same comment. I decided to go to Renoir Retiro anyway and the a/c was working just fine. Glad I did.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"peter camilleri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIouCABK3QqER5IxqxFSNwhQJhSLFHFOhqtGSOAygS4yPYSPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great, seats blocked either side of my booked seats, felt very safe. Masks worn by all and hand sanitizer. This is a great cinema for original language films. Only complaint is the audio always is a lower level than I would like.","Images":null,"When":""}]

No recomiendo para nada esta app, tiene fallos, le falta información, no ves lo que te van a cobrar hasta que compras la entrada y luego te meten cobro añadido, nefasta deja mucho que desear.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Belén González Muñoz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYD_0slOyzKCK2Pq6W7_c85mIZL1Kgc8KSFx8toMrQSrbbOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Esta aplicación te permite disfrutar de la misma película a menor precio. [{"Name":"isis. pol","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7rxHSkBC7lwREDLrVaX6Pu7zoJvHQbdN--PjQuGFbUHZdG4sjKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this cinema, although I had expected the façade to be much more monumental. It's actually quite tucked away, which surprisingly adds to its charm. This movie theater is an absolute must-see for all lovers of the Seventh Art.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD28WIQmUJ5SpSIbTCnXeKC&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Monica Taneja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfaoaqidbSFeMXC2Vp7B9BF6U4KV_suubNbG4K8BlrQidGrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Must do for cinephiles in Madrid! Showing a mix of old spanish or American movies. American movies are shown in english with spanish subtitles. Tickets are currently free, but you have to go to the box office 2 hours before showtime to get your ticket and they will sell out. Timeliness is very important and they don't let it late comers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iva Opacic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWqpiH_An96Xz8XjuBV86i_AsYU6Hq-aEkdF4AA6rPCAYbeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really special cinema. We liked watching old movie in old cinema. No food or drinks allowed inside. Box office opens 17:00 h. I think it is 3e for entering. We saw a movie for free I think because it was a film festival. 2/3 of tickets they sell online 1/3 is left for box office.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw8Oj_Kw&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"Vivian Rizo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKC3FQZLEytRYI4vw8hGLdUjs8FQlqwZOLceoZdOzMWXUWe0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"beautiful theater. there are ongoing renovations right now (oct 25) so the tickets are free! check online calendar to see which movies are playing. cafe is temporarily closed. ticket office is on the right side and is open at 17:00 tuesday to sunday. there’s a bookshop next door. arrive 10-15 minutes early. the temporary entrance is at the door on the left side of the butcher shop. no late entry!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samuel Viñolo Locuviche","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYUTiOdFMcVSx6iiu8NCB-0zV_lgfHyCTcAwKWAnuOZXK_GFqSyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Cine Doré, the oldest cinema in Spain, is a beautiful venue with two screening spaces and a cosy cafeteria, which hosts all kinds of films -old and modern- and film seasons at very affordable prices. Tickets can be purchased online (up to 5 days before the screening) or before the screening (they always keep 1/3 of the tickets for sale on the spot). Sometimes the screenings also include a presentation or a talk with some members of the film crew after the screening. Foreign language screenings (non-Spanish) are always shown in O.V. with Spanish subtitles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD3bnt0AE&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2024-4-13"},{"Name":"duckula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLU4kGEu5HaYhUn84EL2J4lbEpuOzyAj8wjnZKsCOlFVICB8-E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the box office to get your tickets from 16:15 onwards. Located at the side of the building along the street. Check schedule on their website but tickets can only be purchased on site here.

👉 Attached pic of box office window. On the right where the guy is standing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID0-5SX4AE&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2019-10-26"},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update 2024: We went for the first time to a film (Neil Young´s Heart of Gold) on the open air terrace at 22.00. A great experience.

2023: Hadn´t been for a long time. Great cinema showing classics on big screen in Sala 1. Beatifully renovated with films in VOSE original with Spanish subtitles. Also great value.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrvuCEKw&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2024-7-7"},{"Name":"Pedro Nogueira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3KtjzYDy7zOyqvrxcHWoCSJPF2abNqn0pWekF-a4oFXGUf2eN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"More than worth it and for only 2,5 euros or free, depending on the screening. Beautiful place inside and outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDUnJLiVA&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2019-8-16"}]

The 3D is poor quality and the ticket is about 15 euros with the glasses. They need to work on the 3D movies more because apart from it’s a poor3D quality the true colors of the movie changed a lot when you put the glasses which is not normal plus the glasses lens is paper not even a plastic real one 🤣If you want to watch a 3D movie definitely go to another cinema! [{"Name":"Jose Luis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcJo45lMsohaUXVX1dSPbsLW1drqVOAKR_aHOKi9y0eTBGeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quiero dejar constancia de la experiencia excepcional que he vivido con Amado de cinepremium y su equipo en la instalación de mi cine en casa y del sistema completo de domótica. Desde el primer día sentí que estaba en manos de auténticos profesionales que ponen alma en lo que hacen.

Amado (el gran jefe) ha sido impecable en todo: su dominio técnico, su visión estética y su capacidad para entender exactamente lo que buscaba. El nivel de exigencia y de supervisión en cada detalle no se ve todos los días. Se nota que disfruta creando espacios que emocionan.

El resultado final supera cualquier expectativa. El cine no es solo espectacular en calidad de imagen y sonido, sino que transmite una sensación especial desde el primer segundo, te olvidas del mundo…. Y la domótica… simplemente perfecta.

Es muy difícil encontrar un equipo que combine profesionalidad, técnica y emoción de esta manera. Los recomiendo sin dudarlo a cualquiera que quiera transformar una idea en algo extraordinario. Han conseguido que un proyecto ilusionante se convierta en una experiencia emocionante.

No quiero dejar de hacer mención especial a Juanjo, (jefe de obra) simplemente un crack!
Y por último a Fernando, otro manitas de los que ya no quedan.

Un fuerte abrazo y a seguir haciendo realidad más sueños!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuel DDP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7MMCnfqM8n0R_tvDVgBprRj05y68va-2wGhJkPAb9s9v44lz_QA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quería una sala de cine en casa con insonorización, y después de comparar varias opciones, elegí CinePremium por su servicio completo de llave en mano.

El resultado es espectacular: la sala está preciosa, cumplieron con todos mis requerimientos y el sonido es exactamente como lo imaginaba.

Ahora, cada vez que me siento en mi butaca y disfruto viendo una película con una calidad impresionante de imagen y sonido, pienso: "¡Tengo un P**O CINE!"
Gracias, Amado.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abel LG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLx3mhCVNFqiXLOvEyf9u_Ja5Zf_M-oMbjojWDLGY-3jYiVRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hace un tiempo contacté con Amado, de Cine Premium. Los profesionales encargados de la instalación fueron muy amables y explicaron todo lo que estaba sucediendo, asegurándose de que entendiera cómo funcionaba cada parte del sistema.

La pantalla es simplemente impresionante, con colores nítidos y luminosos que hacen que cada película se sienta más realista. Los altavoces también son excelentes, con un sonido claro y envolvente que te hace sentir como si estuvieras en un cine real.

En general, estoy muy impresionado con la instalación de cine en casa. Fue un proceso sin problemas, y el resultado final es simplemente excepcional. Definitivamente lo recomendaría a cualquier persona que busque llevar su experiencia de visualización de películas al siguiente nivel.

Fue una grata sorpresa tener esta empresa tan accesible en Madrid y a Amado que con su conocimiento me sorprendió y no es de extrañar ya que lleva muchos años en esto y se nota que antes que empresario es un fanático del Home Theater y las nuevas tecnologías. Como aficionado, siempre me ha asesorado muy bien, y aún siento un cliente modesto, no ha tenido ningún reparo en ayudarme y atenderme tan bien como a sus clientes más pudientes. Rapidamente me dio mucha confianza y desde entonces soy cliente suyo. Sin duda es un referente en este sector y para mi son los mejores ya sea para mejorar tu instalación o bien para encargarles un proyecto entero de cine en casa. Un 10 para Cinepremium y un 10 a Amado.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cine Callao is an absolutely brilliant cinema located right in the heart of Madrid. The building itself is a stunning piece of architecture from 1926, and stepping inside feels like travelling back in time whilst still enjoying modern cinema facilities. The auditoriums are spacious and comfortable, with excellent sound systems and properly large screens. What particularly impressed me was how well they've maintained the original character of the venue whilst incorporating contemporary technology. The staff are friendly and efficient, and the location on Plaza del Callao couldn't be more convenient. Whether you're watching the latest blockbuster or catching a special screening, this cinema offers a truly memorable experience that combines historical charm with top-notch entertainment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony Muhye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0RqoZ5Hojo1nBp8kg8Jri6OlNezhBOtKY77dmZBbxNadE3R3t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This review isn't about the cinema experience itself, but about an interesting hack related to the cinema. No food allowed, cinema experience a bit disappointing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S. Sofie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmS3fbRGPLspRB41d73L72-gJbmR4p9IoyIHzlA9LgX9h1VA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went here on a Wednesday night to watch “The Apprentice” and were delightfully surprised that the tickets were only 5,9€ - only to find out later (as we literally wanted to come back the day after!!!) it’s only a Wednesday offer.

So guys! Pro tip! Go watch a movie here next Wednesday!

This small cinema is a great place to go. Had a very cool old school authentic feel to it, with the vermillion colored movie screening hall. It’s definitely not one of your modern go-to cinemas with a wide election of blockbusters and quick carbs in the form of ice cold colas and buttery popcorn.

This cinema is like a delightful breath of fresh air. It shows a cool variety of non blockbusters and caters to a more narrow audience. Many movies with original sound (and spanish subtitles) making it possible for travelers like me to relish and enjoy in the newest movies.

The bottom floor was under renovation - in the middle of being painted, it seemed - but the bathrooms were clean and had a slight Hollywood golden era look to them. Super cool and very on-theme.

Would definitely come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ALEN HADZIC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZLhpy68A607EPSL4j-KE2wSgaDPbbJ_nZ8RrUUMSMEz4LEBtb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had a fantastic time at Cine Renoir. The theater was comfortable, and the sound and picture quality were excellent. The staff was friendly and accommodating, making sure everyone had a great movie-watching experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louis “Worldtraveller”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZjehkFguiS7B7_8wBiJh7hNIOxOhQKLuFv8WJyJ3Krk_F99g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cheap tickets on Mondays and Wednesdays and one of the few cinemas in Madrid where you can see VO (subtitled original versions). title: Federación de Cines de España
address: C. de Campoamor, 9, Centro, 28004 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"RAFAEL TABOADA SIGUERO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXB5vaJuxExHt5VE-lX1E3YH_BVUT4atrC6ShDdNWO-vNk9d5o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Una muy mala experiencia en la sala de Yelmo Plaza Norte de Madrid.

Soy un espectador que se vio muy defraudado en la última experiencia vivida en uno de los cines Yelmo. Publico este comentario después de haberme puesto en contacto con ustedes en su web y no haber obtenido una respuesta, tampoco el exhibidor dio una respuesta en la indicase las acciones para solucionar estos defectos limitándose a contestar casi de manera automática.

Si uno valora la cantidad de problemas que todos tenemos en nuestro día a día, puede que lleguemos a pensar que estas cuestiones son poco importantes, pero si lo analizamos desde el punto de vista de la cantidad de profesionales que intervienen en una producción, los esfuerzos de guionistas y director por contar una historia, el coste de una producción semejante, el interés de la distribuidora por servir un buen producto y, por último, la importancia de la responsabilidad del exhibidor de ofrecer la proyección en las condiciones óptimas al espectador, es entonces muy fácil llegar a la conclusión de que no son temas menores.

El pasado lunes 12/01/24 asistí en la sesión de las 19:30 en la Sala 7 a la proyección de Noferatu, con la Garantía Cine Yelmo que hace alusión a aquellas películas que recomiendan ver a sus clientes por la calidad de la misma, en los Cines Yelmo Plaza Norte en San Sebastian de los Reyes Madrid. Pese a los defectos que presentaba la proyección, nos pudo el interés por ver la película y aguantamos hasta el final, momento en el que pude trasladar estas cuestiones a Diana, la empleada encargada de los cines.
La primera anomalía que quiero compartir con ustedes es que la proyección no cubría la totalidad de la pantalla, que estaba casi más próxima a una relación de aspecto de 4/3 que a un formato de pantalla standard de los utilizados en las proyecciones actualmente.
La segunda es que, aunque con una proyección más pequeña, ni siquiera las convergencias del trapecio de la proyección eran correctas, estando claramente distorsionadas.
Por último, la tercera es que, en una película donde los negros y claro oscuros son tan importantes y tienen tanto peso en la producción, los laterales de la pantalla se encuentran lumínicamente contaminados por las luces azules de seguridad situadas en los escalones de la sala, con lo que todas las zonas oscuras no eran negras sino azuladas y con poca definición.

Las explicaciones de la encargada fueron poco convincentes, ya que trasladaba la responsabilidad al distribuidor argumentando que ellos proyectaban el formato que les habían facilitado. Sobre las convergencias indicaba que era un defecto que conocían y era debido a la altura en la ubicación del proyector y, sobre la contaminación por la luz azul, no dio ninguna explicación.

En resumen, una muy mala experiencia que sufrimos todos los espectadores y que sufrieron todos los que asistieron a ver esta cinta. Desde mi posición de cliente y espectador entiendo que, si el formato o la sala no reúnen las condiciones, la película se ha de retirar de la proyección. El cine es ante todo magia e ilusión y esta falta de profesionalidad y celo en alguno de los eslabones de la cadena crean las condiciones ideales para que los espectadores sigan descendiendo en las salas.

No quiero extenderme más, me despido solicitando que reflexionen sobre la importancia que todos y cada uno tienen en la industria cinematográfica.
Como cliente buscare siempre otra sala para disfrutar en las mejores condiciones de la proyección.

Reciban un cordial saludo,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alejandro Infante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUg45xG8j-u2-TvHBGlv8M_GMmHr8LyFPPwLC8uCgP87KcUyv3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Agustin Llorente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEeKFVkfXK-Wapis4sSyWn4RH3LM2n2ez8tEj-nrhW6wMlDEsCDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

A mejorar: la temperatura, en invierno hace frío.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"isabel rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR5tmlk4nNzNjedp2j_CJNEWEznFcEUSOVceqFbXhkhX210mxe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Me encanta el plan de los cines al aire libre. Es una pena que el de Cibeles no esté numerado porque siempre tienen aforo completo. Y aunque se vea bien, la gente mayor no lo ve tan bien desde cualquier ángulo. Además, las sillas están demasiado juntas unas con otras y no son muy cómodas para los mayores después de una hora. Aún todo esto, es genial ir a la antigua central de correos a ver una película con los cascos que te dan para ponerte el volumen que tú quieras en ese entorno. Nos encanta. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEIVbbZDNE5Gulwyqp_mLp_hg-01i2PryDZDkiTdsgju_x-0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Last November 14, 2025 my friends and I went to this venue to Los Morancos show. The facilities are in good conditions as well as the sounds. We are in the 2nd floor and we heard the whole show very well.
Los Morancos Bis a Bis show was awesome. We're not from Spain and always wanted to see Los Morancos
performance.
It is a prison comedy in which the Cadaval brothers end up in jail due to a new law restricting humor, called the "Mustard Law." Inside prison, they must adapt to a hostile environment while their characters, such as Omaita and Antonia, try to devise a plan to free them, which only worsens the situation and generates humorous moments, current events parodies, and musical numbers. We laughed a lot and enjoyed the comedy as well as the songs. We had a really fun time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCh21rcDuq9DOJYjJC8NMeu&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0VFy_lveSJ2b8wCKy3HjqqyCms0hIPvFYFQIKkUX451INv2t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Layout of the rooms were weird; I had to go down 2 floors to get to the bathroom + it's not very accessible for persons with reduced mobility, lots of stairs.

Beside this, the space was good, seats were comfy + good quality of sound.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSqJGlyDsQUrfQt6eJgKLU&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-6-14"},{"Name":"AO “Fine diner”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJq0oEfngTFbaKzFs5xOZA_M5RsXKiWEyxBJnQt5mAy9g_bXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Well located, small enough to have a good view. They don’t have escalators and there are only 2 bathrooms in one floor, hence there’s a big line to get in, they should fix that asap.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw2eC6mQE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Kyriakos Cy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6sIcixwmQACY1Nmt-MKX9-fjeKs-eHJGIye4AgW5cQm9bs9uJWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Capitol Building in Madrid, also known as Edificio Carrión, is an iconic landmark located on Gran Vía. Famous for its distinctive curved facade and the Schweppes neon sign, it exemplifies 1930s Art Deco architecture. The building houses a cinema, shops, and offices, and its rooftop offers stunning views of Gran Vía and the surrounding area. The Capitol Building is a must-see for architecture enthusiasts and those exploring the vibrant heart of Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL69SSkgE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Kevin Blackledge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYxfgscLO_WNesnd0rdOv_T07aJRB0wZV8Pk3_SQhJ0H4p5WrHLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went to see the ballet at this place,  the ballet was the Nutcracker and was excellent,  but finding the place seemed a little difficult.  I would give it 5 stars however because of the lack the information given caused us to run across town I'm taking a star off. There was no indication that the nutcracker was even being performed at this venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1uNzWkwE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2023-12-22"},{"Name":"Andre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8HeBZkxvHh3pYAuHftZiTl7T06cWYIQH_z2bAHh38U6uMV5M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Went there to see a music concert. Staff was very disturbing during the full concert, always running after anyone filming or taking a picture as if people were about to commit a murder. Very disturbing to anyone trying to enjoy the music. I of course understand there are rules, but the theater management does not need to overdo it and make things worse than what they are.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Dorman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvXB5GQs1HAsnCTD9_NvOuuH04lU3W491OKJEpjnbxqwDKtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Comfy seats. 2° outside and quite chilly inside too. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicolas Laur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0ZS0KPANkEdinPBm0_M7Manax8_2BPecYEyUaogx0ighK7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"First cinema experience in Spain..
Do your best to avoid aisle seats and make sure other people sit next to you to block out the much too bright blue aisle lights.

Biggest issue is sound, room 11 speakers saturated a lot, quite underwhelming. By that I mean not for loud explosions but most dialogue scenes :/

Movie theaters in general and this one as well let in late people; so you'll be bothered 10 min into the movie by flashlights and/or wake up.

Other than that you feel it's quite a movie lovers theater, cool vintage posters, old cameras exhibitions and nice staff members :)

On a sidenote I was pleasantly surprised by spanish audience, little to no talking and no phones out during the movie. (Although lots of popcorn everywhere and coke cans left on seats at the end despite the bins front and back)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDsVJO-6p68WCKgPa9rQk6z&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Teena B T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURct3MXzRWZQvvv4bcBnVzzpzVnP-bVsmdWVfJysdIwD7q526c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Small but pretty decent cinema and for a 5 euro ticket, the movie I watched was fantastic so I guess it was worth it. I would happily overlook the theatre size and other factors and will definitely return for more good films if the prices are so generous. However, two stars because something I really didn’t like was the lack of empathy from the man at the ticket counter when I was struggling to communicate with him in English. He made no effort at all, just shaking his head sideways vigorously , expressing his irritation at everything, which I thought was extremely small minded.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dominik Sakowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKnGAGn98grVcMkOll5kubfeDXEfHVN2ov767BPX9S5-Ead8l5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve been to better movie theaters in third-world countries. Renoir Princesa’s layout is such that if someone (as long as they're not short) sits in the seat in front of you, their head blocks part of your view of the movie. I’ll also add that these seats are average in comfort, and you’ll have about as much legroom as you would on some economy-class airplane seats. The speakers are comparable to a TV’s built-in speakers—you can get better and more immersive sound quality at home with a simple soundbar-and-subwoofer setup. The screen size is mediocre; I’ve been to backyard movie nights with friends that had larger screens for outdoor projector setups. On top of all this, don’t expect much if you decide to use the restroom during your visit: stall doors without functional locks, non-working hand dryers… a true embarrassment in the center of Spain’s capital city.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0VFy_lveSJ2b8wCKy3HjqqyCms0hIPvFYFQIKkUX451INv2t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I expected a bigger place and got disappointed because the rooms were very long so when you're around the last rows, you feel very far and it can get hard to see. Also moving around can be difficult because there is no middle path to go through.
But beside the layout of the room itself, their staff are adorable and the price is okay to see a movie.
Be aware that they propose the movie in their native language.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kanga ranga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuk-irHZ7FRIC9zNAlU4zwhO6Vd0Z8i8a3YEVZ_YjNIkuPAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"One of the few cinemas in Madrid that screen movies without being dubbed to Spanish, however the roomas are too dark, so dark that impossible to look for your seat!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Victoria P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnw78gTcOZvaF-oDF0sa--B2IkBLKHpMILldogmNXuM2x-V3nr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"location is great, close to Plaza de España, but that's where the positives end. the way seats were located in our room was questionable since they didn't go up by rows, they all were on the same level. and the screen is small so in row 9 i could only see the heads of people in front of me. the sound was too loud, and the room was cold, which made the whole experience uncomfortable. popcorn wasn't good :( buuuut the movie was good, if you haven't seen The Batman with Robert Pattinson yet, i recommend!! and it was on my birthday so i still enjoyed my time there a lot","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWvfuklwE&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2022-4-1"},{"Name":"Patrick Giroud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYFhtjplYq1GSbXFBV0ipvV7O0UWj04x89cMqx0x2Wd2_plA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It's was more like a Garage than a cinema. The staff was very pissd and lat me that know. The Price by the shop was cheap i paid for 3water 0.5l 4.50€. Ticket price was 9.20€","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1uC4CA&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2017-9-17"},{"Name":"Gabrielle Mathy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLL1LWH1lxa8sW0SFZQ4EAgbv8ts4RwUlPOXW6iATsw_2BPng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I used to come here to see movies in English but haven't been in several years. They have updated the screen and seating along with the general decor making the whole place so much better than before!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb-8Wa-wE&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2024-8-9"}]

[{"Name":"KP G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2Rg9DiQ29ajhUkI-XwqOIh23_chg3Bw9nylChO9JBI-09zvil=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous small cinema, showing good variety of films, including charming older films (Like Cinema Paradiso).

When I was there in January 2026, the showings were 17h (5pm) or later, weekends only.

Theater is small but comfortable. Felt like a speakeasy, due to location. You walk down a small path to get to the entrance, at the side of an apartment building.

Blink and you’ll miss the path to the entrance. Look for the sign with movie schedules at the head of the path/sidewalk.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsxAXkk7GhjnB9mwaDbmBR&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Geoff Marshall (Geoff M)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFsK-oHNx3harVywAojKLdP8J_WuhShUkfvh5MjRtcZyvhonk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Small intimate film theatre, don't expect the usual hollywood schlock of tacky blockbusters and popcorn. This is for discerning movie goers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Peakin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvUv6jHNsihS8YLYBW2zfuvgWlhnm_pH_TmLXvUAODdMddAjU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great experience nice staff","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Duvalié Carbajal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKSnmtWKgW0YvE-p0gKiH-ZpnyXiz8GWO49xmF-4olTtOk1fKq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Conda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhui12yu5U-fbOqmaRme1twKx0_XGHnwSLOyABr0h3lv73Zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una maravilla de Cine Estudio  con  una magnífica programación, un sitio intimista para cinéfilos. Ayer estuve viendo "The Chronology of Water". El personal de la Sala encantador. Lo recomiendo totalmente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9-HJGf0lddm6xVsDnYgOH&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Juanjo Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw4z226uLeYvTHnPaNG6_E7msO5biqdhVyQb-hiRkl336OwaM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Va a hacer un año de los pases de 7291 en esta sala.

El Pequeño Cine Estudio ha tenido conmigo un comportamiento como exhibidor que dista mucho de la ética y de lo legal. Tal como hice público en su momento, continuó proyectando mi documental 7291 sin mi consentimiento y, aparte, se negó a pagarme la cantidad de taquilla que me correspondía.

Al ser imposible percibir este pago con las condiciones acordadas, presenté una demanda en el juzgado. El hecho de ser un profesional independiente, que no necesita tratar con ellos inevitablemente en el futuro, me ha permitido denunciarlos sin temor a represalias empresariales.

Finalmente, y ante la perspectiva evidente de que iban a perder el juicio (y por tanto, de que deberían pagar los gastos derivados de este procedimiento), el Pequeño Cine Estudio se ha avenido a saldar la deuda.

La vida es justa de vez en cuando. Y en este caso lo ha sido: los dueños del Pequeño Cine Estudio han tratado de quedarse con un dinero que no les pertenecía utilizando unas maneras soberbias y arrogantes, y se han enrocado en su postura durante mucho tiempo porque se consideraban impunes.

Estoy feliz y aliviado por ello.

Al Pequeño Cine Estudio no lo hace pequeño su nombre sino sus dueños.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"juan carlos hurtado delgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWby7_BNwEkzVljJUVi9duEDACxlejWzxhGP5-PSuRagtmhKI3AIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Después de casi 40 años , volví a entrar en éste Pequeño reducto de Buen Cine.
Además con un Clásico de Elvis.
Creo que es la primera vez, que veo a Elvis en Cine.

Muy bien, además con el peludo y mi amigo Grandes Seguidores del Rey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDY7iSzkodPBIaNv6ALd2IS&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"CASTRI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjU-rDL6C6F-tsTQEqBsDOpAnS6mVIPnEo7LaqXI3bJ6sqglM_6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio fantástico para disfrutar del cine. Una sala de "las de antes" que aguanta el paso del tiempo. Hubo una época que los cine estudios como Groucho, Fantasio, Falla, Los Angeles o Regio, hacían de Madrid un encuentro cultural para el cine absolutamente diferente al circuito de estrenos, con programaciones especiales, mejores precios, sesiones triples y películas diferentes. Cuidemos el Pequeño Cinestudio y disfrutemos de su sala porque es "El último de Filipinas".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID346GKsQE&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2024-11-18"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Fabiola Schroeder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO6592hArwXbPJUx1xit0aX_vNrfUxW-n13gmm1fXWe8ABFXY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos tenido la inmensa satisfacción de ver el viernes el musical de Sonrisas y lágrimas. Maravillosa adaptación de una película que marcó un antes y un después en el cine. Nos deleitaron con sus voces cantando las diferentes canciones en un musical de excelencia. El vestuario muy ajustado al original y la escenografía estupenda. La sala es ideal. Muy recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCH4huDRIn-QTEGAdpOGCj4&fid=0x0:0x290f271f750dd674"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"M. Teresa G.R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdNu2uP-KFLB4wnDuKzQndXjWr89Q4KWUxB_SQ3RkvPUGrTbTp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Buena visibilidad, buena acústica y butacas cómodas.
En invierno los frioleros no estarán muy a gusto porque la calefacción está baja, además hay que hacer cola en el exterior porque abren puertas con poca antelación. Yo asistí a la función de las 20:30 de un sábado.
No hay servicio de bar ni máquinas de vending.
A unos cinco minutos andando hay un parking gratuito de un centro comercial.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula Pascual Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDRnRqda4J4nDUrnct6GdxKoRD1W2e2ljsUsw0UgpktB1oC5xy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mi reseña no puede ser más negativa debido a la absoluta falta de sensibilidad y profesionalidad que experimentamos hoy.

Viajamos desde Los Molinos (unos 70 km) con un grupo de personas con discapacidad intelectual para ver la función de Tarzán de las 17:00 h. Salimos a las 15:15 h, pero debido a un atasco inesperado y a una equivocación con la dirección del teatro, llegamos allí a las 17:10 h.

Para nuestra incredulidad, se nos prohibió la entrada de forma tajante y se nos echó del edificio. No hubo consideración alguna, ni un minuto de flexibilidad, a pesar de las circunstancias especiales y el gran esfuerzo de logística y coste económico que supuso movilizar al grupo (autobús, acompañantes, entradas).

El resultado es que el grupo de personas con discapacidad intelectual se quedó sin ver la obra de teatro.

La única "solución" que se nos ofreció fue esperar hora y media en la calle para ver la última media hora después del descanso. Esto es una ofensa para cualquier grupo, pero especialmente para uno con estas necesidades.

Es totalmente vergonzoso. Hemos visitado numerosos teatros, cines y salas de conciertos y jamás hemos recibido un trato tan cruel e inflexible. Además, es indignante que en su página web presuman de ser un teatro accesible para todas las personas cuando la realidad de su trato demuestra lo contrario.

Ya hemos decidido poner una reclamación formal en el Ayuntamiento de Coslada. Este tipo de comportamiento no se puede tolerar.

Cero recomendable. Una experiencia desoladora.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fernando F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0VVCtPR_YiJDCp1hAAia2yFZt8M4HZzGzebyPMSW4R10K7smh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Moderno, con mucho contenido cultural y grandes planes. En mi caso estuvimos viendo Romeo y Julieta. Un musical precioso, muy bien ejecutado y cantan de maravilla. Se aparca relativamente bien, aunque no sea en la misma puerta claro. Es un buen centro cultural y teatro en Coslada.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6mubHzQE&fid=0x0:0x290f271f750dd674"],"When":"2021-9-26"},{"Name":"A.
