title: Municipal Cultural Center Federico García Lorca
address: Av. de Eibar, s/n, 28830 San Fernando de Henares, Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"JOSE LUIS Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlAs5EsTF3RdsdhTpk1DiQSBNVZC_JbAFCRxYp-d5HjQdhfBCu7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Sunbre lo indica","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcos Fernández Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbyUgEAvQXFzrYFjLEMYjZD8xbuoAysxEqOVXVgfpCNKjRnzsL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Todp","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Jalai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSkT0fRRyCxBvOUJH7qRyT3v8U6HftAFSrBG7mYKMGJJgo8Ys4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Una única estrella ⭐️
Lo principal es UNA AUTÉNTICA VERGÜENZA que con el calor que hace en la calle, nos metan allí a un montón de personas y no tengan la dignidad de poner el aire acondicionado.

Valoración crítica sobre el Centro Municipal de Cultura Federico García Lorca de San Fernando de Henares, basada en la experiencia reciente y en las características más relevantes para los visitantes, aunque el centro destaca por su buena acústica y accesibilidad para personas con movilidad reducida, presenta importantes inconvenientes para el público: la climatización es deficiente en días de calor intenso, lo que dificulta la estancia; el aparcamiento resulta complicado; la cafetería permanece cerrada desde hace tiempo, restando opciones de comodidad; y las butacas, demasiado juntas, pueden resultar incómodas en eventos largos. Estos aspectos afectan negativamente la experiencia general, especialmente en jornadas calurosas o para quienes buscan mayor confort y servicios durante su visita.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKrsPyzoGI3rA4y50Kpo35&fid=0x0:0x461cffe17964f6cf"],"When":"2025-6-24"},{"Name":"yolanda rubio heredia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtRXa3OGvsNoMhG5iwhGQfTyi5le5G7nuvSD1tq4dy13BxX12i=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El sábado 26 / 6 /25 actuamos en este teatro.   Y fue lamentable. ¿ y el aire ?, ¿ dónde está el aire ?  En estas fechas con la calor que hace que este teatro no tenga aire acondicionado me parece vergonzoso. El teatro lleno de gente y de personas mayores , abuelos que van a ver a sus nietos y que tenga que pasar el calor que pasamos. Ellos desde butacas y nosotros en los minis camerinos. Alquilar el teatro es una pasta y por tanto tiene que estar en condiciones de poder alquilarlo. Suerte que a nadie le dio un golpe de calor. ¡¡Ayuntamiento De San Fernando de Henares!! Con el dinero que se recauda al año en general de todos los vecinos ya podríais poner aire acondicionado . No tenéis vergüenza ninguna . Para prueba un botón ,aquí os dejo un vídeo de cómo la gente se quejaba antes de empezar el espectáculo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXM4Ky5_UvWYUHMLgWQRw4&fid=0x0:0x461cffe17964f6cf"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"cuentosdeazucar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJlOCGAtLnwKnvUmK0cMEChvLAY4WkNjvoU8YdbanVqt3aNa6a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Esto es una vergüenza . Contratamos este teatro y tanto bailarines como espectadores vivimos un terror con el calor! Hubo gente que se mareó. Nos quejamos y nos dijeron que tenían el aire roto hace un año y no lo arreglaban pero ocultaron esa información a la hora de contratarlo . Fue un tremendo horror . Una absoluta vergüenza .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLbb88vJZyyB_9rO9K5bYbVobQok-RfIRx5xh3KnPAUzY5QA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un Centro con multitud de actividades para todos los públicos. No lo conocía y me ha sorprendido la cantidad de cosas que hacen, idiomas, costura, artesanía, restauración....
La profesora de costura y de inglés, fenomenal, ambas con mucha paciencia y dan genial las clases","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-g4DaUQ&fid=0x0:0x461cffe17964f6cf"],"When":"2022-12-7"},{"Name":"Beatriz J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTZqeE41L9tAHVNzisGO5ojnB34wvZ0D3w233h4XIZUBBA7ZbnAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"VERGONZOSO!!!! Había niños, personas mayores y no había aire acondicionado. Con una ola de calor impresionante. La gente lo paso mal. Familiares que se tuvieron que ir sin ver a los suyos por miedo a un golpe de calor. Si no tiene condiciones adecuadas no lo pongas a disposición, mantenerlo cerrado. No todo vale por dinero. Una auténtica vergüenza!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blank SSS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyS-Kc-cC7VYpIXl0PZkM0SRfhd7l1rQH9GaIAlV1tPaU-Eok=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estuvimos hace poquito viendo una peli (sorda) la peli una maravilla pero la persona que nos vendió la entrada majísima y super atenta y agradable!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Take in consideration that the WC is located in the second flour so you will walk 2 levels of stairs up .
But that is the only downside .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michel Robeers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8nKBW1IxNze0FzoKkDdw8ssJTj1FC7tiYpu2SMX7PNDNZgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very fine theatre. We enjoyed "The Lion King".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRTQSkI_DEDa9UbpIol--2&fid=0x0:0x9c47c76e1a59edf5"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Alek Zivkovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsvpRyRNluwfF2kVkK4MC4gmUO92cf601UJAn6SlX2fyRkdJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"An Unforgettable Performance, But the Audience Detracted From the Experience

The show itself was truly spectacular — a remarkable artistic achievement that left a strong impression. Unfortunately, the overall experience was affected by the behavior of the audience. There was excessive talking, unnecessary commentary, and general noise throughout the performance, which made it difficult to stay fully immersed in the moment.

I sincerely hope the theater takes steps to improve audience etiquette. A live performance deserves respect and full attention — this is not a football match, nor a playground substitute.

With better audience management, the atmosphere would fully match the excellence of the production on stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charles Staubli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJpLJ9txo2VE7Q2E66cryhCQXuf7wUNBmwAosnzwxSw7gTn7a5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to The Lion King show in Madrid with our young girls, along with their grandmother, and all three generations found it wonderful. It was well organized, from the entry process to the refreshments.

A spectacular performance with excellent staging and beautifully creative costumes. Our younger daughter, who usually gets bored quickly, was so engaged that she joined the standing ovation, proudly holding the mini Simba keychain above her head that we bought during the intermission.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernhard Kohli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjjQa5dQqjMrJ-iqH84Ov373Um-jUA78u4obylJImleqQUHIB4tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Seats were very uncomfortable with no leg space. Less spaced apart than in other theatres, although a constant current of air was noticeable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLoJju2QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2024-6-24"},{"Name":"Jorge Espitia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyNQMon4IiEVUC0wNzlyTTMWuqXsoVuYiWZBb95ASPprIkcvq4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I am not sure if this was a direction from the show I saw, or the theatre itself but once the show starts they are not able to accommodate people in. I enjoyed the performance, nostalgia time for me aside saw the movie when I was 10 years old ❤️
Make sure you are on time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA_f7h8QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2025-2-11"},{"Name":"杨景贻","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKs2mZ4XmGPeVpWJeqq0m6THyq4sxZO60XCNBeCt6Cvc9jEvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to see this show during my travels in Madrid because the original version of the musical is very famous in my home country. Even though I don’t speak Spanish, I was deeply moved by the powerful performances and beautiful singing of the cast.

Beyond the excellent production, I want to give special thanks to the staff of the theatre for their incredible kindness and support. Before the show started, I had already taken my seat in the Club section, but due to the excitement and energy in the crowd, I experienced some physical discomfort and had to lie down in the hallway to recover. A gentleman in an orange shirt kindly helped by calling the staff for assistance (I regret not being able to thank him in person afterwards—your help meant a lot to me!).

Staff member Marc, along with another gentleman (whose name I couldn’t confirm but to whom I’m equally grateful), came quickly to check on me. Marc retrieved my belongings from my seat and kept them safe, and stayed with me while I recovered. Even though the show had already started, he told me what was happening on stage to keep me included.

Once I felt well enough to return to my seat, they arranged for me to sit in a more ventilated area with no nearby audience, close to the exit, and reassured me that I could come and go freely if I felt unwell again. Later, when I started feeling cold from sweating while lying down, Carmen Brailio Fer kindly brought me my coat and showed great concern for my well-being.

Thank you so much to everyone at the theatre for your care and support. You turned what could have been a distressing moment into a memory of warmth and compassion. This experience made my trip to Madrid truly unforgettable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"AnaJulia Perrotti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJpSn9thuzRQOLdXnUOD_vIMl9lUaBkvDUZcZDvIvGdbAUVt79wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s a few meters from the subway station. Second floor seats do not have good visibility.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwwvXeoAE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"ReachingSpain4Him","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWd4VlidDuLrGeIVEqiJC3tj1xnTi9IKLAzac7OFS61_Wcolys=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time seeing a show like this.  It was well done and the crowd reactions were amazing.  Seats are a little tight but very nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZlub73QE&fid=0x0:0x3ae55088f5585e81"],"When":"2023-9-30"}]

[{"Name":"Nicolai Bustinza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6R7OhEagLG0aJ_4cRrPGwAEC2iMdu9RuP9l8pj_743_PQbEnwgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estuve en el Teatro Serrano, en Madrid, y la experiencia fue muy buena. Asistí a una función y la acústica y visibilidad eran excelentes, haciendo que disfrutar del espectáculo fuera cómodo. El personal fue amable y atento, facilitando la entrada y el desarrollo del evento. Es un lugar recomendable en Madrid para disfrutar de obras de teatro y actividades culturales.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArg8Lc1Ygf8SnkPhT4Lmrw&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Fernando José Gálvez Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVk3gTK47bePxjCpuINCgqFHnZdbEyfQ-CguyXvNDY9ZedBTmFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"He ido dos veces, las obras que vi eran buenas. El problema es que los asientos de arriba son muy pequeños, si eres muy alto (como yo) no entras en el asiento y las rodillas te dan con el asiento delantero. En el caso de los asientos de abajo me parecieron más grandes y cómodos, a pesar de ello, la inclinación de la zona de asientos de abajo es pequeña y es fácil que si estás atrás alguna que otra cabeza te tape el escenario.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"iZASKUN BV","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxYB7_m5IOOCrsfPCAnDzSTet3IJTeJgfOYI-uudtsW2KymA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Acústica muy mala, no se entendía ni lo que decían los actores. Visibilidad pésima.
El personal de sala permite a la gente levantarse una vez comenzada la actuación para cambiarse de asiento desde una fila a otra precisamente por esto, molestando al resto de espectadores que nos aguantamos con nuestra entrada. Escenario muy pequeño.
Las obras de teatro que muestra son de un estilo moderno-chabacano-surrealista.
No conozco a nadie que haya salido contento de varias obras que ha visto aquí y menos del espacio.
Hay salas de teatro alternativo mucho más teatrales. Esto no es un teatro, es un edificio reconvertido.
La gente apelotonada a la entrada, sin unas filas claras para pasar la entrada.
Muy decepcionante.
No apto para movilidad reducida. No es nuestro caso, pero es algo a tener en cuenta en un teatro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fuápete Prodo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUY0WOd8yvV_N5YCj8zPi2WR-o0sPGXB7NDgm6OCjt-kzztui-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nunca pensé que los asientos de un teatro pudiesen ser más estrechos que los de Ryanair! Pues aquí los tenéis.
A no ser que queráis salir con artrosis o reumatismo, no recomiendo a nadie venir a pasar la tortura de estar sentado más de 15 minutos con las rodillas reventadas o el cuerpo doblado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClGLllNST2l9ZSbQTxcAfB&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"CLARA E. RODRIGUEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJL4bc1n5hKj85mV-2lgA-yNtjt-lrMr5HKpvejF2D1iSnKJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"La interpretación es fantástica. Si estáis buscando una obra purista esta no lo es. Pero la adaptación es ideal haciendo de la obra algo de total actualidad. La recomiendo sin duda.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBc_UpfhC-FCQ7q6dj6CCJR&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Juan Yanes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-3fJm9_zHbCfZ-teQOv942Ai0dmNmra1EYQmVk-iRJQ_HBOKw3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos ido a este teatro para ver una obra de Yllana, ha sido muy positiva. El teatro es parecido a un palacete, fuera de lo convencional. Muy bien conservado y elegante. La sillas bastante cómodas. Buena visión hacia el escenario. Buena acústica. La atención del personal de sala, muy profesional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSTYQLLEEZYuZ0-xrhb7qb&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-7-25"},{"Name":"Yuxing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_uRitNyv37NeZqHOKPuV5Ke69yKHqiaWsJ7dqEFURRMMp1RjPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos a ver Cloe Quijote de la Mancha de Olga Margallo y súper ameno, divertido. 100% recomendable. Las instalaciones del teatro (butacas cómodas, climatización agradable, baños limpios) y organización genial.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHJenOn1V1ITvVmy9EeJ03&fid=0x0:0xd0a20a0af4bcbbc6"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Alberto X.B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVm_pYEkzJGp-kqBKpKF44eaCuRhEVcqhS2pdCjKUvhvIJ8W71x=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ayer vimos 'La loca historia de la literatura' y nos decepcionó tremendamente, a pesar de lo que el título prometía.
Un humor infantil sin gracia, propio de una reunión de amigos tomando unas cañas, disimulado con continuos gritos y movimientos exagerados, y una visible falta de talento en el guión, oculta con las habituales reivindicaciones "Woke" -"Qué malos somos los hombres, pobres mujeres"-, la consabida Guerra Civil y constantes e interminables matizaciones de género (autores y autoras, herederos y herederas, románticos y románticas...) que alargaban frases y párrafos desesperadamente. Reírse de la calva de un espectador, tampoco ayudó.
La actuación terminó con el obligado "hip-hop" inentendible, a juego con los tiempos, que afianzó la sensación de haber perdido el tiempo -también en el desplazamiento-, así como el dinero invertido en las butacas (muy caras).
Lo mejor, su corta duración: 1h 10m","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Into the wild","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ4tdDogI88h5-zDEAzSOrDcOLjNakGNX1WKDhcGgOxCQ1d-I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Walking into Teatro Real feels like stepping into the cultural core of Madrid. The setting opposite the Royal Palace gives it natural gravitas, and the auditorium’s red and gold elegance mixes smoothly with the modern engineering hidden beneath its 19th century look. The renovation in the 1990s delivered the clean, balanced acoustics the house is known for, and the stage machinery is advanced enough to handle ambitious productions with real precision.

Programming is confidently international, with major opera titles, top-tier casts, ballet, and contemporary projects that keep the theatre anchored in Europe’s leading circuit. Operations are polished without being stiff, and the overall experience feels refined from entrance to curtain call.

There is also a modern edge. The photovoltaic installation on the roof has turned the building into a reference point for sustainability in historic venues. It is a subtle but telling contrast to the classical architecture.

Teatro Real is one of those places where tradition, technology, and artistic ambition come together, creating nights that feel genuinely special.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVP3-MYh0WYdlswNpQ6fuo&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Jack Rowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj44WCbMr4sud9dVIxWrbyIfnuNVsl9-WLR-YROdDAOFXyqGq35Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful backstage tour in English by Timothy. Very knowledgeable, generous with his time and gave us a tremendous insight into a pretty mind-blowing theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYr-l-RwX7Ro-UHy10zRNr&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Miriam Noyola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgVIsUixO8fM_KsCIn71tKnKA89l1kvfxvNVIy384yY1fglsC2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by Teatro Real and loved the energy, beautiful building, amazing surroundings, and spontaneous performances happening in the Plaza de Oriente. One of those places where culture, history, and everyday Madrid all meet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeTnWJDLoZl-_EO73qAWrC&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Sveto Rakovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXELv1h6KNSxjLBZ4irfEkGKjzrypoUHg3izpRjZZ_yFLu388A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Certainly nice to see, but in my opinion not necessary if you are in the city as a tourist. in front is statue of Isabelle II, also not a must see as a tourist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAb65lscm-oMU27MSlmJGEr&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Zygmunt G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNkLPL5Gp69yUUiKsMmnW4VmZBUipJsIYlzaV1IffHmDNofg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is very nice opera house, and important one on the world's operatic map. Casts are usually very good, and producers like stage and music directors are always better than average. Theatre is modern, accessible for disabled. Ushers & people serving directly to public are nice, friendly and helpful. I had a bad side seat, and I moved to better section. While I was waiting for last moment to take an empty seat, no one was bothering me (not like in Vienna - where to do such switch would be like almost a crime...)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvv8_XWA&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Мария Винюкова","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM9e1S363yEckbJibL-ZXDgT3sOXVCEcB4RZVObQFfsYK-27s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent theater. I saw the National Ballet of Madrid perform and really enjoyed it. Tickets need to be purchased well in advance, and it's best to arrive 15 minutes before the show.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlKYyQNBDoHE03GFNMBsf-&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"S Madani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISVAMLLdVIr741j0lMNHfJjaWt4i9olBnCFD7OEFB8-IVFPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carmen at the Teatro Real
Madrid, 13 December 2025

Don José did not impress me at first. Too swiftly he recognized Micaëla — as if the long and perilous journey of a woman alone meant nothing — and too swiftly he uttered “my mother,” with the distracted reflex of someone suddenly reminded of laundry to be picked up. The moral gravity of the moment barely had time to settle.

Then there was the small but telling detail of the arrest papers: José typing them, only for his superior to present them as if they were his own. It felt oddly Kafkaesque — reminiscent of the Barnabas brothers in The Castle, who insist they are K.’s assistants despite the fact that he has clearly never seen them before. Authority without authorship; responsibility without agency.

And yet — it grew on me.
José grew on me.
By the end, he made me cry.

The card-player with the curly blond hair — Frasquita (or perhaps Mercedes) — played her role to perfection. There was an irrepressible joy in her presence, a love of life that at times seemed even greater than Carmen’s own, lighter and more instinctive, less burdened by fate.

Micaëla’s spectacles and Escamillo’s trousers were striking choices: small visual decisions that subtly anchored character. And when Micaëla leaps from the building with a gun, the moment flirts with simple amusement — but only on the surface. Beneath it lies something far darker: a woman fighting for her life against impossible odds, courage mistaken for naïveté.

This will probably be my last Carmen of the year — after Prague in January, Lausanne in the spring, and London and Würzburg over the summer.

What a work Carmen is.

Muchas gracias.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlPmbdxFBmgwT0E0i_0kGP&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Mario Ovalle (Dito Ovalle)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsNi48C5vFzKSe7iBLjus1BgklqVEs5EJzsRS4mPt3I2fQL2vYAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow, wow, WOW! The building is very well managed, very nice. Seats are comfy, sound was great! I saw la traviata and it was worth it!
You have to buy ticket in advance","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBi0lUqkLKj2D-qnq1SEOht&fid=0x0:0xa28363ebaaa7adae"],"When":"2025-7-24"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Murat Kurnaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXf4YYkZmLbR298wNKcW-1MPUhyh9ohOYCw-HRm_dE7u93O0MWh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"“Stepping into Teatro Calderón is like walking through a century of Madrid’s cultural heartbeat. Originally opened on 18 June 1917 as the Teatro Odeón, the elegant building designed by architect Eduardo Sánchez Eznarriaga rises on the former grounds of the Convent of the Trinitarios.  ￼ In 1927 it adopted its current name, honouring dramatist Calderón de la Barca.  ￼ With over 1,000 seats, beautiful stained-glass panels in the foyer by Maumejean and ceiling murals by Demetrio Monteserín, the venue blends historic grandeur with modern stage productions.  ￼ Shows ranging from musicals to dance-concerts are regularly staged here; ticket prices typically start around €15 for some events.  ￼ Whether you’re a theatre enthusiast or simply exploring central Madrid, this iconic auditorium on Calle de Atocha 18 offers both architectural splendour and vibrant live entertainment.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfe-jAV4uIe1GQGOM2wdeT&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"L J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl7yumBYUimlYOiFYZGSJb1YjrXI10zG0Ui-FCS2_Z6RrU98p8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Incredible experience viewing "La historia interminable, El Musical." I must admit, I do not speak Spanish but the show was exhilarating. Of course there were parts of the story I did not understand but still very enjoyable.

As for the venue, it was good. The view was clear and the area was kept clean. There is one issue which is the leg room. I am average height (5'8") and I felt very uncomfortable during the show. The show lasted two and a half hours. This is a very long time to feel cramped. Therefore, I have dropped a star.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhq6jtxwE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2023-3-17"},{"Name":"Nicole Cunningham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9x3i6hs_OpoaEbv5FevvBdCk2ErTm9nzClEO16x0ZRSwsyqR30Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My partner and I saw Houdini the Musical. It’s a good production but as it’s still new we would say that there are “bugs” to workout.

One of the things they could improve is their ambiance of magic. They tried to have a type of guided tour at the beginning that seemed cool, we got to see various things about Houdini and his life, but in practice was a bit confusing and claustrophobia inducing.

Apart from this we loved the show! Well acted and the music is fun. Spanish is my second language and even though I didn’t understand every word it’s well done that I could understand the plot and still enjoy myself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK1YHysZGv3kGcAwZ-3WwXsmOW96Q3r4Lq60bOTJg0cc7X5WA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was at the matinee performance of "A Chorus Line" yesterday. Hughly disappointed as Antonio Banderas was not in the show! It was a great show with all the performers giving their all.

This theatre is beautifully restored and retained its Italian features. My front stall seat was a squeeze to get in and I'm not big size!

The front of house stall are very friendly and helpful. Definitely worth seeing a show here when you're in Madrid. It's a lovely theatre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG_qfSiQE&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2021-10-31"},{"Name":"Jihad Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvIhXwG2CrPp7tlXAYFTyH7AGUM5Y10ZK_kvrg2nWq8BG9ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🕍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5ZKVWcFAOqJo9OZd7GGnZ&fid=0x0:0x532790fe7a68f71f"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Sunny Rux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0lUs_xuqW8kEWMUWO-6KpLCltnMKMeJpSg75Nf60CxskcAhdk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Comfortable seats ans cozy atmosphere. We saw “La historia interminable” musical and was a great experience, even though Spanish is not our mother tongue. Our 9-year child was thrilled and totally caught by the show, same like us. title: La Caja Lista 2, Teatro 4dX
address: C. de Canillas, 48, Chamartín, 28002 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["7–11 pm"],"Monday":["Closed"],"Saturday":["5–11 pm"],"Sunday":["5–10 pm"],"Thursday":["8–10 pm"],"Tuesday":["Closed"],"Wednesday":["Closed"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Diego DHP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuRdmFmoexdynYp9Fp1mgzGRJxL7aM4w2ceU7PIxk-cvQoRElItg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"👏🏽Acabamos de salir del Cluedo de 1860 de La Caja Lista y todavía seguimos comentando lo increíble que ha sido la experiencia. Desde el primer momento se nota el trabajo impecable de todos los profesionales implicados: un elenco muy completo y profesional, con interpretaciones llenas de matices, energía y carisma, capaces de sumergirte por completo en la historia sin desvelar nunca más de lo necesario.

Cada personaje tiene una identidad muy marcada y una presencia escénica que aporta algo único a la trama; todos brillan, cada uno a su manera, y hacen que conectar con ellos sea facilísimo.

La ambientación es otro de los puntos fuertes. El cuidado por el detalle es genial: la época, el espacio, la estética, el tono… todo está construido con una coherencia y una sensibilidad que te transportan a 1860 sin esfuerzo. Se nota el mimo en cada rincón y en cada elemento, lo que hace que la inmersión sea total.

La experiencia, en su conjunto, es divertidísima, dinámica y muy bien diseñada. Mantiene el ritmo, invita a participar, provoca carcajadas y, a la vez, te hace estar atento a cada gesto y cada palabra. Es de esas actividades que debes vivir y recomendar a voces.

En resumen: altamente recomendable. Tanto si ya conoces La Caja Lista como si es tu primera vez, este Cluedo es una apuesta segura. Nosotros, desde luego, volveremos para realizar cualquiera de las otras experiencias que tienen disponibles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBy9Xh7FIVL9s0c4LlKXXft&fid=0x0:0xcfd66c4fc8a27e3b"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Fany Á.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBkDxVRFxZKNkbubtLqrPkabCyKtYFFOsA7K4lf7C-hL18kw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fueron ayer mis padres a la obra ya que fue un regalo de familia hacia ellos.
La valoración que nos han dicho hacia la obra es la siguiente: Muy recomendable y entretenida. La obra Cluedo 1910: Asesinato en la Mansión Northampton consigue que nos metamos de lleno en la historia desde el primer momento. Los actores interpretan muy bien sus personajes y hacen que la experiencia sea dinámica y divertida.
Como único pero, diríamos que hay demasiadas paradas durante la obra: con 2 o 3 interrupciones para preguntas sería más que suficiente, ya que tantas pausas rompen un poco el ritmo. Aun así, es una propuesta original y muy disfrutable. Iremos a probar otra obra con temática diferente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blanca Escrivá de Romaní","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY3U2QFaI7NSul8hmRhGQpry9h2VxJRuLIS8cRK637uLniUcM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos anoche a ver Cluedo 1860 “el Gólem” y una pasada !! Aunque al principio y durante la primera media hora no entendimos muy bien de qué iba, acabamos pasándolo genial, riéndonos mucho y comentando la obra. Los actores lo hicieron estupendamente, fue muy divertido, ameno y dinámico. Sin duda repetiremos el plan probando otras obras. Enhorabuena !!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgP9yy3EKjVo1JZUajkHzV&fid=0x0:0xcfd66c4fc8a27e3b"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"R JR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQKKb_a7RF5rvS2ZGT7M0Ko-VHOGLHXcdnJ0t8jh0wqEVztPx_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cero empatia.

Hemos hecho una reserva para una cena de navidad de 7 personas y porque hemos llegado LITERALMENTE a las 19:03 no nos han dejado pasar.

¿En que teatro no te dejan pasar aunque llegues TRES minutos tarde? ¿De verdad? En navidad Madrid se pone hasta los topes y a veces pasan estas cosas, no digo que hayamos llegado media hora tarde, HAN SIDO 3 minutos!!! Completamente inhumanos.

Encima oigo al señor de dentro con el pelo blanco decirle a uno de los que estaban en la entrada decirle: “échale, esta en la puerta haciendo tiempo para que pueda entrar la persona que llega tarde, echale de una vez”

DEPLORABLE","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JavierG.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYbkp9caGqrEeLzA4nNQGjDGiIss3y0TsNjWkTBquq71iz1kY0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hola, solo decir que estuvimos este jueves y nos lo pasamos genial…. los actores y la presentación del espectáculo fueron increíbles. Al final te sabe a poco y piensas en volver porque quieres hacerlo mejor!!! Enhorabuena a todo el equipo!!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Guchi Ss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKESjwbWUSO6PIXGhtnY4tLJhWDUlqvUJiSP4k-WYbkKpeIDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estuvimos el otro día en Cluedo 1860 y la verdad me parece una idea súper innovadora y chula, el personal es súper majo y agradable, se hace bastante corto es lo único malo :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Montse M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbVmK54nbAqqiljG5M0MPOxL6dL8QWHZjRtLll8Trrs2j7byjKbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El pasado día 9 de noviembre teníamos entradas para el Cluedo. Llegamos y solamente vimos un escaparate con la reja echada. Un timbre, y nadie al otro lado. Nos quedamos chafadísimos. Casi 40€ a la basura, y la cara de boba que se te queda.
Lamento si esta vía de queja no les ha parecido oportuna. Si pudieran por favor facilitar un correo o teléfono de contacto.
Tras contactar con Atrápalo, nos pusieron en contacto con La caja lista. Quisiera dejar patente la profesionalidad, rapidez y ganas de solucionar la reclamación. Un 10 en la gestión de ambas compañías y otro 10 en la experiencia del espectáculo que nos procuraron en el Cluedo. Para recomendar y para volver y conocer todas las obras😍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benjamin B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpgfYowAE-fw_LirkqIQS0cc7C87uW0dXhOnN84tytyFdqv_HZcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Muy buena experiencia. Pasamos una excelente tarde. Fuimos con niños de 12 y 14 años y les gustó mucho también.

Los actores y actriz son muy simpáticos y nos pone totalmente en el ambiente de la época.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Katherina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuUP1KJuSNN-X9JNY0ksIXrqyyIUrDV5WPUZa0qV2PCSCYdiqO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were lucky enough to visit Cabaret musical. I was deeply impressed with the performance, actors and production of the show. Everything was just perfect! Madrid has many great shows but this one is definitely my top! I would like to give my special admiration to Emcee and Sally actors. Such a talented cast. The finale got me in tears. Deserves a standing ovation 👏🏼

I would just like to mention one small thing, the sits are not very comfortable for two hours long show.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQ4PpD_ECnqn1XREaWlVhQ&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"JL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJdjawdOU1mGJpqpHugH7LJtqTKvHFgck6quOTm6tBBJoq2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We see "Los Miserables" (Spanish version). It can't be better. High quality excelent show. Can't mention a but to this 5 stars musical. "Teatro Albeniz" is a really good theater at the center of Madrid (Tirso de Molina area). "Los Miserables" has been really well adapted to its dimensions and can even benefit from a still bigger stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mida Hardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV181SdyA_6MDM7V8Ixb1lUnrkOAG4BvFRBu9ddqiMfqXH-axw_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here to see the Phantom of The Opera play. The hotel is very nice, the teatre itself is good and a bit small stage. However, it fits the purpose for a great show.
Good seating arrangement, piazza for pictures, souvenirs and drinks area.
The sound system and lighting is good. Definitely, a good place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDs-CMGw&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2024-4-1"},{"Name":"Graham Edward Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuJMo1Hn1dBGwCdWXu_YyI9M4OZi0AwgAtqecb93AVQLEY_Co=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Concert of Paloma San Basilo. Good acoustics, comfortable seats, and air-conditioning. Theatre incorporates a hotel. Easy wheelchair access with designated area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1tDPqjn0su1OdJLQco7sX&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"hahparis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6M-H0YeZHXw94yff22xMDDzfd-89iFgSqRtaU4F82AL-8wUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Glad to watch Company during the reopening of this historical theater (a great effort of local people to make it possible!). Very good visibility wherever you sit. The public space is a bit tight though, partly due to the occupation of the hotel (part of the property) restauration space. It is recommended to use the toilet before the show as during the intermission the queue is quite long.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBq_KvxQE&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2023-1-4"},{"Name":"Ian Lester","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoc_Levhl0GKjYsqHMDQpWqttFJPj90LOYIVsp5vfQeWu9LHNc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An absolutely amazing theatre experience...."Cabaret".
We stayed here in the hotel and we couldn't have had a better time. Well done to the team.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marina Pereira Lima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpAiTF84Sh4SZSzXdfjg_7vARyexzMLzEZhm04Ipq_4_mCZn3R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a incredible Theather. We loved discover this beautiful place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-jPe4wAE&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2022-11-23"},{"Name":"Chris Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9kxr0PzKR7l_tKlw68IVET4nA-m9L3Y-8EWpJ1uqa9zawoQHFmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful building in Madrid, great experience to see the Phantom of the Opera.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC38u-hdQ&fid=0x0:0xdb0b8a0bc443290d"],"When":"2024-11-4"}]

Seats can have more cushioning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LifeAccordingToVincent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXcLQFkYI_HC8eXsiOrq_1aW4n2qIaM0fn3X7GLG3EjpNSYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The theater is fine, the seats are fine, the artists of course, are beautiful, but there is a serious issue with the person at the cloakroom. She just doesn't know what she is doing. She would have given my coat to someone else if I hadn't looked. She also didn't put any number on my bag, so I had to beg for her to try to remember where she has put it. A scary experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nurece Gunes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyIHdig1hrRmVl1zmzyeOLBcs6W3u1GeLp43Jg3t_GgBWMNl-MeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a perfect theatre venue to watch zarzuela, opera… The prices of the highest places are low but of course one should know that the visuality is by half reduced. But the zarzuela was excellent, truly beautiful….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOmIXHUA\u0026fid=0x0:0xa6446797bd4dab2f"],"When":"2022-6-26"},{"Name":"Jesse Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmSfsD69nIW16Jo97xsejsarQeF7BzlbUjkDS7J7eZ07--1cX3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The show was one of the most incredible displays of theatre we have ever seen. The Spanish opera was a true delight. We were thrilled that they had English subtitles on the screen, along with Spanish. The more advanced, for purchase, program had an English synopsis of the opera. The theatre is incredible, beautiful, and plush red velvet and gold throughout the space. Our box seats were only 50€.  The singing was excellent and the acting was awesome. The live orchestra was a delight and the choreography was modern and amazing. The opera felt new and fresh, despite being  an old storyline. This is because of the great work of the choreographer,  the set designer, and the director.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5Uc3qYRTJfYUCKO0wQ_7Jv9QNoRebRujETDNywf926R7zeoU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The vibe of the theater was very good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Arkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAwXC_jlc2GDIq-N_PNTtr3FCrjWsNTD2jrw4hXcVYBpxvpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful venue, getting a new house lighting system in. Can't wait to see it glow.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erin Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3AfzWnMiNzvE0iEoIG0yBtajwN9FJEZ0S-BAexIYdR45NsBf8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The theater is gorgeous, and the performance was an incredible experience.  The singers were phenomenal singers.  But additionally they were wonderful actors.   This is not always the case in the opera world.  The costumes were colorful and detailed.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Kayla Mallinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeoWHWHPSda8CwJdcfakX2zh16oV169w07d_gRwOYWDoqkUdI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best experiences of my Madrid trip. It was so beautiful and stunning to watch. You can tell that all the performers are very passionate. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3lBEAPp00GWGoO1BtAW25&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ionut Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NQsKcGxNOVXPemlaS1mBdvu71OMNXMxZe7YjvXwNSFEYRDpT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Experience the fiery passion of flamenco in a breathtaking show where every moment bursts with emotion and energy. The atmosphere is simply fantastic — a performance you absolutely can’t miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOM3xe-o9xDXUtl_PMc9pG&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Alison Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdWAHXlqWJ5BgbZXSoYCXVQ_8nHFEsttMsirEXbFzy6EJTzF6_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what a beautiful show!! I first went to a flamenco show in a small theater in Sevilla which I think was a great introduction to flamenco but this show was spectacular! Everything is so well thought out from the costumes to the music to the fog and lighting. You can really see that passion for the art is in every aspect of the show. However, I was often distracted during the performance. People were allowed late entry which flooded the theater with light from the street, 15 minutes into the show. As an often late person myself, I appreciate letting people in who are a tad behind but maybe try finding a way to let less light in would be appreciated. Similarly, at the past show I went to, photos and videos were not allowed, but here they were which I also found distracting from the art. Flash isn’t allowed of course but many people use it accidentally and again, it distracting the magnificent artistry of the performance. At a different show I went to, they o my allowed photos and videos at the end which allows for people to create memories and enjoy the show more presently which may be a good rule of thumb to use here. Again, absolutely stunning performances. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for flamenco in Madrid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAh0zc1bUxsle6CifV8GUJ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Oofrish V Contractor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI3dFxp6kSwMj92KN7E6vKsZ7_SQBY9sN9EAbCL0LZCYWyD7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A trip to Spain is not complete without the Flamenco experience. This theater was cozy with a reasonable size stage and the performances were very intense and authentic.

Best not to go there by car and stay with other transport as parking is very challenging to find even in paid parking garages.

Enjoyed the performances and would recommend them highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk1iAQFCH9mfoHEng8mFoh&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Noel Craven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFhrqCkqzgZARzXW7vSAXWBb3hEk5FZTog71qIzK4-5gSbDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was expecting it to be a real tourist trap and not feel like a real flamenco but it was very good . The theatre isn't so big and although doesn't have the Tablao feeling it's still a great atmosphere . The show is very good with plenty of both male and female dancers . One of the guys voices was really great . A real gypsy sounding voice . So yes overall a great show for everyone . The theatre staff were great and accommodated my disabled auntie with a wheel chair without any fuss . You get a free drink with your entry ticket which is good too .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvBqL6JpxZeNJ-w0ziRH9&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to experience local culture by attending a live Flamenco show for the very first time during our first visit to Madrid. We purchased premium tickets for the 19:00 show, which cost us 49 Euros per person, including a drink.

Theater hall was small, and despite weekday, it was crowded.

Our seats were in the first row, giving us a fantastic view of the performers. We couldn't help but capture the mesmerizing moments on video and took plenty of photos to remember the night. The show was absolutely fantastic, and we had a lovely time watching it for an entire hour.

The Flamenco show was such a highlight of our trip that I firmly believe it should be at the top of anyone's 'To Do' list when visiting Madrid. We enjoyed every moment of it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ9jaGqJg8vTm3UEJOY4qU&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"IOANNIS N. PEDIOTIS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKfGv6IXnTSDz9RXP9a6IvJcMeApCTXnGqsc7Dh0kAxNV9CbtYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing show.....
Congratulations to everyone who tried hard for that unbelievable job.... Especially congratulations to everyone, 3 amazing singers,  3 fantastic dancers and a guitarist with an excellent performance.....!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7vwnXIo0toUwsZnIOleYd&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Annaliese Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQ4l4ieBwHz4uiLjIauqaJX4YuKoWbTm_-jwyW-YR6HTzq6veCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to a few different flamenco shows while in Madrid and this was by far the best one. The singers, the dancers and the guitar player were all absolutely amazing. I don't know who had more fun, me or the performers. I loved it, thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_Hrb-plsJ7g_ZbxN4_Kdr&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-9-29"}]

Además si vas con tiempo puedes aparcar en la calle.
Yo he tenido la suerte de  conocerlo con una obra del maestro Álvaro Carbonell, promotor del Especial de Navidad con su CHAMBER CELTIC ORCHESTA, con el motivo de Huellas de la Esperanza.
Una puesta en escena maravillosa con una temática con una carga ética inusual hoy en día, donde prima el Amor y el bien sobre manera, donde el bien y mal se abrazan al final, evidentemente convirtiéndose el resultado en el Bien para todos, "que bonito"!!!, casi me saltan las lágrimas...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfkbTlmQE&fid=0x0:0xf3de0734070b3d66"],"When":"2024-12-29"},{"Name":"Jesus HB","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVryDojHkzJXOWR0PTAgIIpps0TMOjNNKdUb2fik49fjxfPwBD_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Desde atrás mala visibilidad y mala acústica... Ni se entendía lo que decían, una pena, en esta situación no volveremos.
Lo único positivo, es el rápido acceso.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cristina Rufilanchas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0uIbyWa6x-42eC4hm2LWZf51_eVvSM7wWULA5Qn7iUqMAYLSTOg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es un teatro un poco extraño. Da la impresión de que el escenario está inclinado, de manera que desde el patio de butacas debería verse mejor lo que hay sobre el mismo, pero no es así porque la inclinación del patio de butacas es insuficiente.
No siendo eso, la acústica es buena. Es accesible para gente con minusvalía física porque tiene rampas además de escaleras.
Eso sí, la zona es imposible para aparcar. Hay un par de apartamentos públicos relativamente cerca (el de la Plaza Mayor, que siempre está a tope) y el de la Plaza de España, que está como a unos 15 minutos andando (que ya serán más porque siguiendo a Google Maps irás dando vueltas como un tiovivo hasta llegar a tu destino).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-5fq59gE&fid=0x0:0xf3de0734070b3d66"],"When":"2022-12-5"},{"Name":"Javier Lara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6BzCmdTWI-ERCviWF4RqE3WkC1yWCKBrRK3lyr5jWar_elGFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Teatro con una gran programación, para todo tipo de gustos, a precios asequibles","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsbHtiF4zQ6TsGH5tqYk7H&fid=0x0:0xf3de0734070b3d66"],"When":"2025-10-11"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"iRINA Ya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfdQdPt5QcRciwrRie-N4Wl-ZotydtoKTy6r7tgOWAKq6kvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It is quite surprising how the culture is mistreated in Spain, and how the theatres are more like an amateur hobby than a serious establishment.
The theater company did it best and it was really nice and funny, while the theatre itself is so small that it was difficult to imagine any play on that stage.
It is smaller than any big school theatre.
After 30 years in Spain, it is still impressing me... so wonderful actors in so small and deficient places, forced to survive.
Spain needs investments in culture, not in football.
Cia Paloma Mejia - very good and impressive job!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC56eHS2wE&fid=0x0:0xab6df9ca2618a16"],"When":"2023-10-15"},{"Name":"Lost Dudes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdQXzMB5ZutxeLt6iEao23WW8Qwp2P652ncd_nHfZUu4cT1wU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Totally irresponsible people, the tickets said 20:00 the comedian was here at the time that the show was meant to start, a line of more than 50 people… the people in the theatre just say…. Go away the show will start at 21:00…. Just because they said so

Just be ready to have a very unpleasant night if you come here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI6KOP9gE&fid=0x0:0xab6df9ca2618a16"],"When":"2025-4-6"},{"Name":"Ashlee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDNhOe50FCbKPwZku8BKUk0I9BRrI5o6N8Ef3t2J6I4lSM3U4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic experience! Will definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manolo Escobar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVba5gNIhJlasgb9lXf1BvbrkR_RC_24c3LG6OVsiRdPKF_FPc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I saw a clasical spanish piece, The Vengeance of don Mendo, with my mother, and we really enjoyed ourselves.  The company iwere really warm and funny. We will return","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela Renée","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSlfySwcpU74LiJCpX2n4-mgkj-LZdrICDOqEsLQOqaj-UE20=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice, small and cozy.

I will definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"graziella juste","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKr7KQ9cSJXbW7lvKdQ5_Dc4T6NQHL1iPXzyMhuVzc4XYqNug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great professionals.... If you’re on the fence, go for the Dream Xperience—you won’t regret it. I absolutely loved it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPnbanggE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2024-12-4"},{"Name":"Jason Boland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLTc2Gn9Vp16jO8zuU9Es01hUDp6HMiXF-LUMp2cgk6O1CJYbO8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"What an amazing show! Aladdin was the best show ever! I recommened this to everyone! I loved every min of it 😍🥹⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDt94aZxQE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2024-2-8"},{"Name":"FarRockBabe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtwcY-jVxz60skaU1n8pXyopb5ziFHbUS8TbvXt6mJ-rk7-vI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The show was amazing! We were stunned by the Tina performer Luna Manzanares. She emulated Tina so well it was scary. I also really adored Ike’s actor who I am pretty sure was Rone Reinoso(?). I mean… the man’s voice is like butter. Also, to any foreigners who are considering if they should go or not, if you are a Tina Turner fan and know her whole story, then it’s fine. The dialouge is obviously in Spanish but most songs are sung in English and the story is clear by the way it was directed. Also, for an idea of the seating, this was a “reduced visibilty” seat, which I didn’t know if it would be bad, but it honestly wasn’t that noticeable during the show. Conclusion: as a New York City-Broadway gal, I left very happy and singing “Proud Mary” all the way home :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG992W3wE&fid=0x0:0xa2334ba031910a6c"],"When":"2021-12-12"},{"Name":"Claire Byrne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD9l99oSD9pvrHTpE_wNxRRO5IRwuEYGjOMtinmCyrefAnbPDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I saw La Bohème yesterday. The opera was impressive, but the first 20 minutes were totally ruined by the letting in of late-comers once the performance had started. In fact, I think that they were people who had chosen an upgrade and were being let in to fill empty seats.
The noise was tremendous and so much movement was completely distracting. I was so shocked and angry. More people around us also decided to do the same.
This might be a nice idea when you have a lively musical, but not opera. Every musical piece is important to focus on.
In two weeks I'm returning to see Madame Butterfly, and Im sincerely hoping the same doesn't  happen.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monica Juarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU34vIEryBFl77DWiRO_7jR4RanYg9dENItRfATb9mlKVs48cv0pQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing!!! One of the best shows I have ever seen!!! The wardrobe, the music, the genius, the stage, everything has been perfectly looked after... it's was an spectacular night full of talent and professionalism. I hope they can extend the season to delight us with more of this great show.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: URBAN Teatro
address: C. de Emilio Ferrari, 33, Cdad. Lineal, 28017 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carlos “K2” Hernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHoZmTR0rTE82TqAiBJluKWTE3F_TBlI80pU6dnryk-87xP1mi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una obra muy bonita y hay que estar muy atentos para no perder el hilo. Muy aconsejable y solo para adultos por la compresión.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIunr99oS45Rf6uGT-rBSgvUiGyDKQSyqUE-yXhY3Luc8eJmoD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fui a ver Romeo el pasado domingo. Me ha impresionado como tres actrices pueden llenar un escenario prácticamente vacío de múltiples personajes y lugares. Lo que al principio me resultó "extraño" .. en poco tiempo me capturó. No notaba las transiciones y me vi "cosida" a sus interpretaciones.. mujeres que hacen papeles de hombres y de mujeres. Sin género. Todos emotivos. Me encantaron las "dos voces de Julieta".
Es una obra muy curiosa. Rara para lo que veo habitualmente...pero me ha impresionado. Las actrices...estupendas (las tres) y el teatro está bastante bien. Pequeño pero agradable.  Merece la pena.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Caravaca Torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbXNAgkYJSV5HTiP3qDiyuPio43O5nJt5oh2Ej__yvM4xjwboAFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un espacio único y absolutamente acogedor. Las clases y los ensayos en Urban Teatro son fantásticas, son otro nivel, muy dinámicas, entretenidas y divertidas. Adolfo, el director y unos de los profesores, te contagia su pasión por el teatro y aumentan tus ganas de vivirlo, de vivir la experiencia. Lo recomiendo totalmente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Judith Romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXD5Y18PyCDu0kgD8pKnQHcOwY64yU8m5XaXr5RsJh6e9c8Pp70AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Iba a asistir a la obra de “incendios” el 26 de Septiembre a la sesión de las 19:00, con mis dos entradas compradas y cuando llegó a la puerta a las 19:03 me encuentro la puerta cerrada. Hasta ahí bien, dado que es culpa mía el llegar tarde, intente contactar con el teatro para ver si había posibilidad de entrar pero estaba el teléfono apagado por tanto me fui. Al día siguiente me devuelve la llamada un señor que de forma mal educada, al explicarle los motivos de la llamada, me empieza a injuriar por haber llegado tarde y discutiendo y debatiendo el que en ningún teatro dejan entrar más tarde de la hora. Acepto que no pude ver la obra pero no acepto las formas de este hombre con muy poca educación.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergio Ángulo Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEn7Nh_72itwfC1SDM5FMmbpmeQR_xzcavnjFtnLclOe2UsP9F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quizäs el exterioe no es un o no lo parece un Teatro al uso, siempre los hubo y los habrá con mayores lujos, más poderío y pomposidades varias.
Urban Teatro, tengo para mi, es divertido, marcado desde el minuto uno de buen rollo. Transmiten el verbo en presente de indicativo, como ha de hacerse en Teatro, seguro que os suena, comunicar, ¿si?
Salgo de la sala con sensaciones, he vibrado en ella, no me ha dejado indiferente, de aquello que te dices - bahh, una obra más -, no , ¡percepción equivocada!...hoy sí ha merecido la pena. " Fuga de cuerpos ", me lo he pasado bien, buenos actores,  con ellos he llorado y emocionado y reído, les estoy amuy agradecido. A sus luces, su sonido, sus maquillajes, sus cuatro muebles o montaje o se llame como quiera dios se llame; la organización, la separación por seguridad Covid, el apreciado público que me acompañaba.
Feliz como una perdiz.
Enhorabuena equipo Urban Teatro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elisa M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4qq27IuctEN-RF8SoptlQG1pbq80EGkQPK-NfPBvh3kKRQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Teatro estupendo. La obra que está en cartel actúalmente, los sábados está fenomenal. Divertida, amena, actrices en estado de gracia y con un clásico renovado. Muy recomendable. No os la perdáis.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mayte León","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2YQxgpfwH-IxizasqAjb4DL2EQOgUoWb4OqtU_ibKU7VJceZovw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"ROMEO
Un espectáculo "redondo",  donde pude disfrutar de tres grandiosas actrices que me transportaron a los jardines de Verona, y participar de la dramática historia de amor de Romeo y Julieta.  Espléndido trabajo de Dirección y adaptación del texto.
!Felicidades a todos!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"José Rondón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-bPfzYhONiVlcMLPVlzMpFQA0Rd-ASp9XQwDA3QkItVXGMHk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Hola buenos días.
Por favor, moderad el volumen de vuestra música.
Tened en cuenta que el local está en el interior de una comunidad y vuestro techo de asbesto o material parecido, claramente NO INSONORIZADO deja salir todo el volumen de la música, causando una contaminación acústica incompatible con el derecho al descanso.

Esta mañana a las 9.45 habéis puesto la música a tal volumen que me ha retumbado la ventana de la habitación, sin exagerar. Así, todos los días que estáis abiertos.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Erica Fontes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8WDpF_JMiyYYtIZdcTGosGrK4bBrC0JaVhw-FgyNubEH12Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a detestable experience there tonight after the show \"Una hermana para tres hermanos\". Before the play and during the play I had a great experience, but I am evaluating the theater staff per se. They basically kick the audience out and all they say is the mantra \"We have to close\". I am from Brazil and normally vacation in Europe every year. I  love Spain and Spanish people and that is the main reason why I am here, of course. I have never had such a negative experience in a theater building in my life in over the 50 countries I have visited. The cherry on top was a very ofensive line I heard from one of the staff members (the younger doorman) when I said that I hoped he would come to my native country (Brazil) and be very well treated there, because that was NOT what he was doing to me. He said he was not interested in my country at all and for anything. However, many Brazilian tourists come to Spain and contribute to the country at least economically. He (this guy) will not of course affect my view of Spanish people, principally because he himself does not sound or look Spanish. Maybe he has an identity crisis (a problem with Latin America?), which I will never be able to solve. All I wanted, as a tourist from abroad and a woman of the theater, was to take a quick selfie inside the theater I went to on my last night in Spain. I understand now they were in a hurry, because about 10 seconds had elapsed after the show was over and they needed everyone to be out. There was a couple outside asking questions about the show, and the staff people did not even treat them nicely because they so had to go. I also tried to talk to the box office lady who was so nice to me BEFORE the show, but she simply ignored me AFTER it was over. Again, the show was great and I would see it again but definitely not at this theater. And when I told the guy (the young doorman) I was going to write a review on Google about the situation, he replied: \"Haga lo que quiera\". I am not writing so he will be fired or anything of the kind, because he looks like someone who REALLY NEEDS the job, even though he is NOT doing it well. I hope that the treatment of the public will significantly improve at this place and offensive stuff will definitely be avoided.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manos Koutsoukos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU6OWv3Ot5bdgHzRQTxrI63nFOZHJ2ry4PwHCQdiAz65uVAn4GJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small, cozy venue, perfect to convey the intimacy (and chill) of the play. I have seen the west end original twice and read both the book and play but this production did send some shivers down my spine. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Olga Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6t8dp0sFrkn6djJCBiZGRwuB8gIWyxg9d-pObcKDI1KkMFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The play very good but the theater doesn't have enough inclination and I had a tall person in front of me and couldn't see half of the stage.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Cintron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1QCm4ufxAarNC6XR1b3gIGD2Brh4wq3b0BMaRIXKmIN01gR9P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice little theater in the middle of the action. [{"Name":"Kayla Mallinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeoWHWHPSda8CwJdcfakX2zh16oV169w07d_gRwOYWDoqkUdI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best experiences of my Madrid trip. It was so beautiful and stunning to watch. You can tell that all the performers are very passionate. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3lBEAPp00GWGoO1BtAW25&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Ionut Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NQsKcGxNOVXPemlaS1mBdvu71OMNXMxZe7YjvXwNSFEYRDpT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Experience the fiery passion of flamenco in a breathtaking show where every moment bursts with emotion and energy. The atmosphere is simply fantastic — a performance you absolutely can’t miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOM3xe-o9xDXUtl_PMc9pG&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Alison Holden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdWAHXlqWJ5BgbZXSoYCXVQ_8nHFEsttMsirEXbFzy6EJTzF6_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what a beautiful show!! I first went to a flamenco show in a small theater in Sevilla which I think was a great introduction to flamenco but this show was spectacular! Everything is so well thought out from the costumes to the music to the fog and lighting. You can really see that passion for the art is in every aspect of the show. However, I was often distracted during the performance. People were allowed late entry which flooded the theater with light from the street, 15 minutes into the show. As an often late person myself, I appreciate letting people in who are a tad behind but maybe try finding a way to let less light in would be appreciated. Similarly, at the past show I went to, photos and videos were not allowed, but here they were which I also found distracting from the art. Flash isn’t allowed of course but many people use it accidentally and again, it distracting the magnificent artistry of the performance. At a different show I went to, they o my allowed photos and videos at the end which allows for people to create memories and enjoy the show more presently which may be a good rule of thumb to use here. Again, absolutely stunning performances. Would absolutely recommend to anyone looking for flamenco in Madrid!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAh0zc1bUxsle6CifV8GUJ&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Oofrish V Contractor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI3dFxp6kSwMj92KN7E6vKsZ7_SQBY9sN9EAbCL0LZCYWyD7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A trip to Spain is not complete without the Flamenco experience. This theater was cozy with a reasonable size stage and the performances were very intense and authentic.

Best not to go there by car and stay with other transport as parking is very challenging to find even in paid parking garages.

Enjoyed the performances and would recommend them highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk1iAQFCH9mfoHEng8mFoh&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Noel Craven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFhrqCkqzgZARzXW7vSAXWBb3hEk5FZTog71qIzK4-5gSbDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was expecting it to be a real tourist trap and not feel like a real flamenco but it was very good . The theatre isn't so big and although doesn't have the Tablao feeling it's still a great atmosphere . The show is very good with plenty of both male and female dancers . One of the guys voices was really great . A real gypsy sounding voice . So yes overall a great show for everyone . The theatre staff were great and accommodated my disabled auntie with a wheel chair without any fuss . You get a free drink with your entry ticket which is good too .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvBqL6JpxZeNJ-w0ziRH9&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We decided to experience local culture by attending a live Flamenco show for the very first time during our first visit to Madrid. We purchased premium tickets for the 19:00 show, which cost us 49 Euros per person, including a drink.

Theater hall was small, and despite weekday, it was crowded.

Our seats were in the first row, giving us a fantastic view of the performers. We couldn't help but capture the mesmerizing moments on video and took plenty of photos to remember the night. The show was absolutely fantastic, and we had a lovely time watching it for an entire hour.

The Flamenco show was such a highlight of our trip that I firmly believe it should be at the top of anyone's 'To Do' list when visiting Madrid. We enjoyed every moment of it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ9jaGqJg8vTm3UEJOY4qU&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"IOANNIS N. PEDIOTIS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKfGv6IXnTSDz9RXP9a6IvJcMeApCTXnGqsc7Dh0kAxNV9CbtYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing show.....
Congratulations to everyone who tried hard for that unbelievable job.... Especially congratulations to everyone, 3 amazing singers,  3 fantastic dancers and a guitarist with an excellent performance.....!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7vwnXIo0toUwsZnIOleYd&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Annaliese Morris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQ4l4ieBwHz4uiLjIauqaJX4YuKoWbTm_-jwyW-YR6HTzq6veCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to a few different flamenco shows while in Madrid and this was by far the best one. The singers, the dancers and the guitar player were all absolutely amazing. I don't know who had more fun, me or the performers. I loved it, thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_Hrb-plsJ7g_ZbxN4_Kdr&fid=0x0:0x27954fcdfe64c203"],"When":"2025-9-29"}]

Carmen Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXY_idGf86CA13EeVojjmIw917TSv-Jn5yKF18wPPKV7emQLEx1hA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevaba tiempo para ir y no me decidía. Fui con amigos y grupo. Maravillosos. Impresionantes las improvisaciones que hicieron que el espectáculo fueran risas continuas y golpes magníficos. Preguntaban frases. Yo les dije una que incorporaron en su fantástica actuación. Gracias por hacer la tarde tan divertida.  Y, como dije a la salida mi valoración sobre 10.... ¡un 15!!!!! 😍😍😍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBiFdl0JT_RSjbSF15nJahG&fid=0x0:0xf2ab751cc914a818"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Tania Heras Baz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmiQ5JyHxd0QVVyAYvee8rJxTUwFAFdYrdDUEsjhKWQX26V_p3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Corta el cable rojo es una experiencia teatral vibrante, inteligente y extraordinariamente divertida. Desde el primer minuto, la obra demuestra la altísima profesionalidad de sus tres intérpretes, capaces de sostener un ritmo endiablado, cambiar de registro con absoluta naturalidad y adaptarse al público y a cada situación con una precisión admirable. Esa capacidad de improvisación y lectura de sala es, sin duda, uno de los grandes valores del espectáculo.

La función se convierte en un festival de humor fresco y ágil, en el que no hay tiempos muertos y en el que el espectador se siente constantemente implicado. En nuestro caso, fue además un plan perfecto para compartir con nuestras hijas Lucía y Cristina, que se rieron, participaron y disfrutaron tanto como los adultos. Esa conexión intergeneracional no es fácil de lograr y aquí se consigue con brillantez.

Salimos con la sensación de haber pasado un rato divertidísimo, cómplice y muy especial, de esos que se recuerdan y se recomiendan sin dudar. Corta el cable rojo es súper recomendable, tanto para ir en familia como para disfrutar con amigos: una apuesta segura para reír, sorprenderse y celebrar el teatro en estado puro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDq-jrL7r1LOj_aGowZFTs-&fid=0x0:0xf2ab751cc914a818"],"When":"2026-1-27"}]
