user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Álvaro Guadilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOd0OWT4CSufFBYiTjeIT5A4TKQx-8IfhPQYI4icmj-g39IBdu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recientemente contraté los servicios de Tatira Teatro para un evento especial, y la experiencia superó todas mis expectativas. Vicente y Mary Carmen no solo mostraron un gran labor , sino que también aportaron un trato cercano y una atención exquisita a cada detalle.

Su aportación fue fundamental: nos proporcionaron una comunicación muy buena entre cliente y proveedor durante el evento. Además, su actitud dinámica y su capacidad para improvisar cuando fue necesario hicieron que el ambiente fuera más ameno y participativo.

Sin duda, recomendaría Tatira Teatro a cualquiera que busque un servicio integral para eventos, donde los profesionales y artistas con los que participan son excelentes, la organización y el buen hacer se unen para garantizar el éxito. ¡Gracias por hacer que todo saliera incluso mejor de lo esperado!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rubén De Las Casas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYxg-s358-vtPD34SP1u4lzqnERFFBYzQTcRixC5wIDZyXKd0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tuve la suerte de contar con Tatira Teatro hace unas semanas para una función infantil que necesitaba montar para una excursión de un colegio, y desde el primer momento mostraron mucho profesionalismo y entrega. El trato de ellos fue estupendo, y mostraron siempre una actitud cercana, flexible y muy comprometida con que todo saliera perfecto.

La obra que presentaron, "Los Cuidadores de las Letras", es una increíble creación original escrita por ellos mismos. La historia trata de dos entrañables "guardianes" cuya misión es cuidar a todas las letras del abecedario y recolectar las palabras que ellas forman. Es una propuesta creativa, educativa y profundamente divertida, que logró captar mucho la atención de los niños desde el principio. Los niños se rieron y participaron con entusiasmo, pero lo más importante es que también se llevaron a casa un mensaje positivo sobre el valor de las palabras, el trabajo en equipo y la importancia de cuidar nuestro lenguaja. La escenografía, la interpretación y el ritmo de la obra fueron fabulosos, mostrando una calidad artística que supera expectativas.

Recomiendo a Tatira Teatro sin dudarlo. Es una compañía comprometida con la cultura y con un talento enorme para crear experiencias memorables. Si estás buscando una propuesta teatral que sea inteligente, tierna y absolutamente mágica, esta es la elección perfecta.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Carrera Mate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK13S2ouCywujbt3Q7gE7QyI3tNJywM55LmFOQI3reWnQLCyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Contratamos a Oficiantes Tatira para oficiar la ceremonia de nuestra boda y la verdad que fue una gran decisión. De la mano de Vicente, al que aprovecho para agradecer personalmente por su gran trabajo y su trato cercano, elaboramos un guion a medida de la ceremonia. En todo momento, tanto él como Mary Carmen nos acompañaron en todo el proceso de preparación de la misma, siempre atentos y siempre dispuestos a ayudarnos en todo lo que necesitásemos, a nosotros y a las personas que participaron en la ceremonia.

Como no podía ser de otra forma, el resultado fue excelente e incluso los invitados nos felicitaron por lo amena que había sido la ceremonia y por la gran actuación del oficiante, por lo que más no podíamos pedir. Por nuestra parte, añadir que fue un placer compartir un momento tan especial con estos profesionales y que nos llevamos un recuerdo muy agradable de nuestra relación con ellos. Recomendable 100% si lo que se quiere es celebrar una ceremonia inolvidable con el apoyo de grandes profesionales.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rosa Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI331sSGwyeAFYIJtHJomM7z4HuE6mXah6tKE9YjQiHH3gL1g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El 22 de agosto del 2020 tenía que celebrar la despedida de soltera de una amiga y no sabía por dónde empezar, así que estuve investigando por internet y encontré a esta empresa de eventos Tatira, contacte con ellos y me ayudaron a organizar la celebración. Son gente muy simpática,  trabajadora y comprometidos 100% con su trabajo. Todo salió genial y sobre todo siempre cumpliendo las medidas de seguridad, ante todo.
Así que si tenéis que contratar a alguien para que os ayude a organizar una celebración o lo que sea contad con ellos, ya que trabajan muy bien.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reyes Cardona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJttP3ok1dwbPKaLyg82-wPFPZlYl-bfDUVfAVC6Pz6_oSH8w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En nuestro caso trabajar con Tatira  es una suerte, es muy fácil entenderse y se adaptan a las necesidades sin ningún problema. Hace poco contamos con ellos para nuestro concurso Smart Show y los participantes quedaron encantados, no paraban de reír y eso es lo mejor que nos puede pasar al organizar un evento, que el público disfrute y  ese recuerdo perdure en la memoria. Muchas gracias por vuestra ayuda, seguid así.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICijITFigE&fid=0x0:0xaea64718e7c0c7af"],"When":"2020-10-23"},{"Name":"Fhisno Morely","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPPF7A4SyTXnxAhx5FF7v04rGvvPzYLHopFahn7PZ-79K2EuX_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Son maravillosos. Se encargaron de todo. Los contratamos para celebrar las fiestas del cole y quedó genial.
Hicieron un montón de juegos,luego pusieron música y terminamos todos bailando. Los actores fueron fantásticos (Vicente,MªCarmen,Carmen,David,Aitor)
Les volveré a contratar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jose manuel valera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfTbm13oZKdb44yE5h8UiUR6oKh2JfcgH8o6eiEYE-TCYazQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Gran descubrimiento, Compañia de Teatro muy recomendable para todos los públicos, tuve la suerte de verlos, en la obra para niños "los buscadores de las letras"y salí encantado. También los ví en la adaptación de la obra "El perro del hortelano" en 2020'. Las representaciones que hacen son muy cuidadas y muy profesionales, gran recomendación.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diana Tome","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsdmMGJ69LRw1sRtBglK_WaU5XB_6PFhVCflwQ6Y7kBkcoIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HOLI RUN!
Quedé encantada con la empresa de eventos TATIRA TEATRO.
Este verano, por todo el tema del COVID, no pudimos celebrar las fiestas de mi pueblo, por lo que quería organizar al menos algo especial para la gente.
Decidí hacer una especie de HOLI RUN, aunque la verdad que no sabía por donde empezar, por lo que contacté, a través de Internet, con esta empresa, TATIRA TEATRO.
He de decir que desde el minuto uno, la atención y la energía fueron increíble, me ayudaron en todo, desde la preparación y organización hasta la promoción de dicha actividad entre todos sus habitantes.
El problema del COVID, esta vez, fue insignificante, ya que siguieron todos los protocolos sanitarios marcados, fueron muy serios en ese aspecto.
En cuanto a precio, no supuso ningún problema, ya que sus tarifas son bastante acordes a este tipo de eventos.
A todo el mundo le encantaron los animadores creando diferentes personajes y llenando de buen rollo a todo el que pasaba. Y sobre todo, los speakers que teníamos en el escenario, que llevaban la animación al máximo.
La verdad que todas las personas quedaron satisfechas y alegres con la actividad, y... un poquito colorados.
Da gusto trabajar con profesionales así. No dudéis en contactar con ellos si en algún momento os pasa la que a mi.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Lo que necesita el barrio son lugares como este.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sonia Muñoz Paños","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsRHy4Bcc9vYveZZjHQ21bgtN4CObn1VqD_k5V_jL_Wo6FWFkJeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lo tiene que todo. Es un lugar acogedor, donde tomar algo mientras esperas a entrar a ver obras cortas de teatro. Es íntimo y las obras son de todos los géneros. He visto comedia, drama, intriga... Y todas ellas muy cuidadas. Son salas pequeñas, lo que asegura una implicación en la propia obra. Las veces que he ido he visto dos obras consecutivas, y entre medias un descanso, regado con una deliciosa virgen y un aperitivo.
He ido varias veces y voy a seguir viendo. Un diamante en el barrio.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D99","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlFqPyWUZeIj0TPFfGeO6clR3KzWLyMCphRcTFCuNRfJqliSsyGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fue una experiencia maravillosa!

Asistimos a una obra de microteatro aquí y nos encantó!! Super divertida, interactuando con el público, buena improvisación…todo!

Al final de la obra también pudimos participar ofreciendo sugerencias para el guion de futuras obras, ya que se trataba de una serie.

Todas las personas allí encantadoras y amables.

Sin lugar a dudas repetiremos 🤩","Images":null,"When":""}]

Designed by Juan Navarro Baldeweg and completed in 2008, it officially opened in 2009 as a 12-story complex that serves as one of Madrid’s leading cultural hubs. The venue hosts a wide range of performances, including theater, dance, opera, music, flamenco, circus, and shows for children. It also plays a key role in major festivals and international productions, making it a cornerstone of the city’s contemporary cultural scene.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAYo8lyC5sYq7jmYv4bw8B\u0026fid=0x0:0x63cc9878be6da6b7"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"M. The theater by itself is new, high tech and a pleasure to be in. We saw a techno dj there; the sound system was fantastic, and the ground attracted to that night was welcoming and fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAv8AF3ipDGM0qhkiX-ogWW&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Inday Love Daily Living","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_Ec-orR2crLrO258ZdD6fA1iFGccxk5XNbqCqq3-QRS8EOId7aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Unforgettable Experience!

We absolutely love this place! From the moment we arrived, we felt so welcomed. The staff went above and beyond to help us, which we truly appreciated.

And then we stepped inside... wow! We were completely blown away. Each room had its own vibe, with incredible DJs spinning unique beats. It felt like stepping into a whole new world every time we entered another room.

The venue is massive, vibrant, and so full of energy. Every corner of it is designed to amaze and keep the good times rolling. We couldn’t stop smiling the entire night!

Highly recommended – we can’t wait to come back in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPpo2hkwE&fid=0x0:0x7a731def889d4532"],"When":"2024-12-1"},{"Name":"Anita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9-n9JxrutvtsYJOHbzl4gr4ook99wgAzIhf2buLeR4DJ17g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What a disappointment is this club. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Beatriz Nafarrete","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIit-3z_gaF68oj0is30CvHSo6rJGY08AUwTGs9dlAYAqEeHA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mónica, a guitarist, & a singer did a private workshop specifically for our tour group, Overseas Adventure Travel (OAT).  Although none of us North Americans knew very much about the art of Flamenco, we were all very impressed by her artistry, her technical skill, her passion, & her winning personality. Her personality was evident from her facial expressions & her beautiful smile although she didn’t say much to us in English & most of us did not understand any Spanish.  The singer in the group spoke flawless English & had a delightful sense of humor. The 3 of them together taught us how to appreciate their art & were wonderful representatives of Flamenco. I highly recommend watching their performances.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"June P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSqM86tFbsGE-8DVMuAZwjXb2ZCykISG0dtw0emMQGmz1OtFXuaw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent interactive exhibition dance with singer and guitarist. She explained history and context of Flamenco while showing us styles of music and dance. Wish we could have seen a real full performance, but this was for an interactive exhibition which gave us opportunity to ask questions too. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Duarte Lagoas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-gvO1_7-Jh_9mayr_JrFHrmvBoIdu0ynGdsn0yCOO7tmhXuPY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience, real understanding of what is flamenco and it's history. Thank your for the beautiful flamenco dancing, guitar music and singing. We all loved it and are looking forward to returning!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx_dn8Bw&fid=0x0:0xb70302a3fd28c60d"],"When":"2023-6-14"},{"Name":"Carolina Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsRgyRNxMNSlRnv6alH5G__Y5hYEff-fq45CRCs_L6eU0ZYftE9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monica is an excellent Flamenco Dancer.
I had the opportunity to see her at Flamenco Experience a few times before and not only she is very talented but transmits passion, has duende, and she is a great teacher too!
If you watch her you will love all her performances! But I definitely recommend Flamenco Experience, a fusion of dance, singing, guitar playing and Flamenco background!
Fantastic!!! 😍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Osborn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-nHy-wWfqCwdO8L0YLhtnu3JA_suw8ob-oaImT6BUrF3TJgwh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a treat having a private performance by Monica and her group. .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJplnQc8yKtX9ttf-HI_LUO5Oh5iymR6zACWXytfqsKtth_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful performance! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ines Cilleros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8v1e5n9fkSdAxNiakrM4FluLVAFeOmXdAcnDWpL5IoBPMAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Para mí todo un descubrimiento, una escuela que no es muy grande, yo diría casi familiar y eso me encantó cuando la conocí. Yo no había bailado flamenco en mi vida ( otros bailes si pero flamenco no) , entré a mitad de curso y me recibió el grupo con los brazos abiertos, una energía muy muy bonita. Me dieron la oportunidad de ser yo, sin juzgar, sin exigir, sin presión de ningún tipo. Estoy encantada ,sin duda repetiré un curso y otro y otro...La recomiendo 100% tanto para expresarte mediante la danza como para recuperar la autoestima perdida. Son geniales!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura San Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJq3NGWvSNBgULX_Is0cjuCCx-Kvtv8za_XLyyxeTki0FMVKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo tiempo asistiendo a las clases de danza contemporánea con Cristian, y no puedo estar más contenta con la experiencia. Las clases son de altísima calidad, dinámicas y muy bien estructuradas. Cristian tiene una manera increíble de sacar lo mejor de cada persona, adaptándose a las capacidades y el ritmo de cada alumno, pero siempre animándote a superar tus propios límites.

Desde que empecé, he notado un gran progreso en mi movilidad, coordinación y memoria coreográfica.
Cada sesión es un reto y una oportunidad para crecer, tanto técnica como corporalmente.

Además, la atmósfera de la escuela es maravillosa: el trato es cercano, cálido y humano. Desde el primer día me sentí como en casa, rodeada de gente que comparte la misma pasión y que te acoge como si fueras parte de una gran familia.

Una escuela totalmente recomendable, tanto por su nivel profesional como por el ambiente humano que la hace única.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clara gimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyKKaalFSrvg9IT3gf4tH112mKeGbx4xARU0gzHVOhOh6ehw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo ya un año en la escuela y mi experiencia ha sido increible, las clases de contemporaneo de Cristian Lopez me han ayudado muchisimo tanto a desarrollar técnica como improvisacion en el estilo y las de ballet con Alicia y Mamen han sido super enriquecedoras. Me he sentido increiblemente acogida por la escuela y todos los que la forman aun siendo completamente nueva y he visto un gran cambio en mi forma de bailar y expresarme, estoy tremendamente agradecida de formar parte de esta gran familia 💕","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Felix Claudet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlfjMnXZjEhSCExV1ejUAofI0pWvQNuz_wrgzA_-Nn65PkoWLl4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo clases de teatro aquí. Acabo de empezar pero pude ver a los compañeros de clase de años anteriores representar un papel con maestría. Y por mi lado que aún estoy iniciando, puedo decir que las clases son super agradables en un ambiente de risas, amabilidad y cuidado. Los super recomiendo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"lola sáez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtML9enfeAJuwYt95JY6kDjLAnDJkGw4HTr2JhcJECZ2Hd0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una suerte disponer de una escuela de danza como esta. Hay muy poquitas en Madrid.  En mi caso, que ya soy persona muy adulta, experimentada en actividades pero incorporada al flamenco desde hace poco tiempo, decir que me siento muy afortunada de haber encontrado este lugar y a Beatriz Barceló, una auténtica joya como docente y como persona, que a su vez y por ello, consigue un ambiente estupendo en el grupo... qué suerte!!! Estoy que ni me lo creo...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Gil Tejedor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxfFudcGZ5CDTjldfQgi-fwk1Bzv_R_FCVgV47ihRY-ceCXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tras varios años en esta academia solo puedo decir cosas bonitas. Además de ser parte del público que ha podido presenciar una obra muy interesante. Absolutamente recomendable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDsxtqVtgE&fid=0x0:0x6c90888727575e35"],"When":"2020-3-2"},{"Name":"Julio Cesar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeZE8rmKRWccU1iiVpwNgJVQAWrjbr7aUz2TdEkrU-OnpAqp7u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Me encanta el Teatro Pradillo, es uno de esos sitios que tiene una ubicación fantástica en Ciudad Jardín, así que llegar hasta allí no supone ningún problema. Lo que más valoro es que, a pesar de tener una carta muy completa, los precios son bastante razonables. No es para nada un restaurante caro, y si lo comparas con otros de la zona, la relación entre la calidad de la comida, lo bueno que es el servicio y lo que pagas, merece muchísimo la pena. Además, es un detalle importante que acepten todo tipo de tarjetas, desde Visa o Mastercard hasta American Express e incluso Ticket Restaurante, lo que hace que pagar sea muy cómodo para todo el mundo.

Eso sí, te doy un consejo: si piensas ir un fin de semana, haz reserva antes. Suele llenarse mucho porque tiene un ambiente muy agradable, relajado y sencillo, perfecto para quedar con la familia o con amigos. Es el tipo de lugar donde se puede estar tranquilo, charlando sin prisas. Para que te hagas una idea de lo que te espera, te recomiendo que le eches un vistazo a las fotos de sus platos, porque la presentación es tan buena como el sabor. En definitiva, es una apuesta segura cuando quieres comer bien, en un sitio agradable y sin que se te dispare el presupuesto.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rafael Camacho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUsyIgnr7GElDaiwqDmVvmk0IUOvjzSN5DkOkeI4jeN1Mi4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He visto El alma como esfera perfecta de Jaime Villaure y sinceramente no hay por donde cogerla. Objetivamente es una pérdida de tiempo y de dinero.
Una pena que el tiempo y esfuerzo  invertido por los actores no tenga resultado. Seguro que hay otras obras más apetecibles.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlLj6Qw0290jVFc1WQY_yI6hdtG9GGc_QJvQ4FCQ4RyR4CdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No es un teatro, es una discoteca que hacen pasar por un teatro. Musica a tope en plena día hasta las 22, que molesta a todo el vecindario. Vamos a presentar una denuncia para hacer cerrar esta discoteca clandestina.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Móvil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvjXhcQDRP3GxNt15BdXE5ZIxNR2_8TE1EqNAP-ewUPew4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Conozco esta sala desde que llevaba a mi hija a los títeres hace siglos, y siempre me ha parecido un gran espacio, necesario, íntimo, familiar... Ahora lo visito menos porque no me gusta tanto su programación (Pendientes de un hilo es la que más visito), pero he estado hace poco y me parece que la opción de hacer los baños unisex no ha sido acertada. Como mujer no me gusta encontrarme con personas que "mean de pie". Lo siento. Creo que el ámbito de los servicios debería quedarse como siempre, porque entonces en lugar de discriminar a unos se termina discriminando a otros. Yo ya no sabía dónde entrar: ¡en los dos había hombres! Y entrar en el que tiene urinarios (porque no estaba claro: fuera en los dos solo pone "Im not a man. Im not a woman"!!) y encontrarse a un tío de pie haciendo sus necesidades es cuando menos desagradable. Lo siento. Creo que la igualdad de género no debe entrar en esa zona tan íntima. Por otro lado, las puertas de los inodoros no cerraban y el papel había que cogerlo del suelo, donde estaba en un rollo. Estaría bien que mejorarais en ese aspecto. Creo que da una imagen de dejadez que no había antes en esta sala. Y por añadir algo más: mejor dar las entradas en el pasillo de entrada, queda más claro dónde te las dan. Muchas gracias!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXu6SHlwE&fid=0x0:0x6c90888727575e35"],"When":"2024-10-31"}]

There are several plays all for them which is great but we found some problems when we went with our two children.
The scenario is good and high enough but the incline of the floor is really not big enough so if an adult is in the row before the children struggle to see, even with boosters.
The sweet shop at the entrance was closed so you better bring your own treats for your little ones.

Enhorabuena! (Entrada gratuita, pero recuerda reservar las entradas los viernes a partir de las 10.00 h en la página web😉)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8N6FNxy414zhb59JPWJUY\u0026fid=0x0:0xc9a53887ca3a9e92"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Luchi Dorian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcKqWzESzn-2VaRilfxcCKlTM5pk91sY9DvaLVLhEh96Z5Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Teatro de Titeres del Parque del Retiro es un lugar magico para disfrutar en familia. Este encantador espacio al aire libre, rodeado de arboles y naturaleza, ofrece espectaculos de titeres y marionetas que hacen las delicias de pequeños y mayores. Las funciones suelen ser los fines de semana y la entrada es gratuita, lo que lo convierte en un plan perfecto para pasar una mañana divertida. El ambiente es acogedor y los espectaculos son de gran calidad, con compañias de titeres de toda España. Un tesoro cultural del Retiro que merece ser conocido y disfrutado por todos los madrileños y visitantes.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Una de las peores "creaciones humanas" que he visto en mi vida. Ningún humor, ningún arte, ninguna comedia, una maraña de movimientos sin sentido. Ni la voz en off ayuda a atisbar qué intentan contar. Una vergüenza. Si leéis la reseña de la obra y la califican de buena, mienten.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Junio '24: La última obra que han estrenado, El Enfermo Imaginario de Molière está muy bien; muy graciosa en esta versión española y muy bien actuada….El Corral Cervantes construido con sus bloques de paja es muy original y merece la pena. Las sillas son algo incómodas así que quizás valdría la pena llevar un cojín!

Abril '24; Fue nuestra primera visita al Corral Cervantes y nos encantó: el lugar, la obra, los actores, el montaje e incluso el olor auténtico a paja. Vimos 'El Oso y otros relatos de Chejov'. Una esupenda y sorprendente producción del Teatro Arapiles16.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9qe6j_QE&fid=0x0:0x45b62ca22622ed8f"],"When":"2024-3-18"},{"Name":"Katy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_nHs7UYN0ZC1zv0VNOiSRZc1t2wMUuRWUECcShAnI5ncqhMo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Un espectáculo al aire libre en Madrid Río, Palacio de Cristal más conocido por el invernadero. Fotos pocas porque había mucho público y atenta contra los derechos de imagen.   Lo visité por primera vez invitada a ver la obra de la Celestina de Fernando Rojas. La verdad es que me sorprendió el teatro y su entorno. Al aire libre pero techado respetando las distancias de seguridad y un orden. Para ser un teatro de verano es estupendo. El recinto en donde está el teatro tiene sus bares, mesas y tomar algo, para pasar la tarde y la noche aunque no asistas al espectáculo. También cuenta con unas pequeñas tiendas de artesanía.
La cartelera cambia  cada día  y se pueden comprar las entradas tanto en taquilla como por Internet
Aprovecho para destacar la actuación de Antonio Campos, añadiendo una foto de un momento de la obra. Un actorazo impresionante, vaya desde aquí mi admiración y aplauso . En la página web del teatro podéis ver las obras en cartelera.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDqj869twE&fid=0x0:0x45b62ca22622ed8f"],"When":"2021-7-18"},{"Name":"Isabel Brea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNdCkIzzZMovcMnKaHtDzgdr929uBZcg1_29cuw64daOigFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El concepto está bien pero a pesar de recrear una corrala, hay ciertas cosas que se podrían actualizar para mayor comodidad de los espectadores... por ejemplo, la visibilidad es regular en toda la sala","Images":null,"When":""}]

Great staff, went for lunch, brought friends back for dinner! Lots of food, really good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCU9MuA62R5Ng2qfVJlDOW6&fid=0x0:0x109f2a7e6cc425a3"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Scott Cleverdon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxUZ7deQRvQX4lt_BuC2op1f0rMneA3UW6Lqq3Na9TTrLVLOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful, elegant and classy.

Teatro Español is a must-visit for theatre lovers in Madrid. Located in the heart of the city in Plaza de Santa Ana, it offers a rich program of classic and contemporary plays, often with top-tier Spanish actors and directors. The venue itself is stunning—intimate yet grand, with impeccable acoustics and a beautifully preserved interior. Its blend of tradition and innovation makes it one of Spain’s most respected cultural institutions.

Brief History
Teatro Español traces its origins back to 1583, when it began as the Corral del Príncipe, one of the first permanent public theatres in Spain. In 1745, it was rebuilt and became known as Teatro del Príncipe, and eventually Teatro Español. Over the centuries, it has premiered works by Spanish literary giants like Lope de Vega, Calderón de la Barca, and García Lorca. Despite fires and political upheavals, it has remained a cornerstone of Spanish theatre for over 400 years, continuously evolving while honoring its dramatic heritage.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1F7syW8vvx6wGkVxfspFN&fid=0x0:0x109f2a7e6cc425a3"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Steve Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWk5ZRt-8L_M3EkHywFbiwf9816YRJHSWa8vUstUmKqqh01n1AV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Charming old theatre with character. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Can","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNslvhVRdHS5a2DPOldz7fU8nbA3R7JngSGWMd6SbjHvobHpr8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the most amazing museum I've ever seen. Everyone working there is very polite. The museum is incredibly detailed and has particularly fantastic fossils. The price is very, very reasonable for a place like this. Definitely worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMaaPLmAy-5IIsZKz9fBvM&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"Syed Jilani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmWDI7kflGQbOE_B-gKNBzjNx8IJRO-qeeYZEawZymUa7PPmIV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Visiting Museo Nacional de Ciencias Naturales feels less like walking into a museum and more like stepping into a carefully curated adventure through time. From the very first hall, you’re surrounded by giants of the natural world — towering dinosaur skeletons, massive whale bones suspended overhead, and displays that instantly spark a childlike sense of wonder, no matter your age.

What makes this museum special is how it balances scale with storytelling. The fossil galleries don’t just show ancient creatures; they invite you to imagine their lives, their habitats, and the dramatic changes that shaped our planet. One moment you’re staring up at a prehistoric predator, and the next you’re face-to-face with meticulously preserved mammals, birds, and insects that highlight the incredible diversity of life on Earth.

The evolution and biodiversity sections are especially engaging. They gently guide you through complex scientific ideas without ever feeling heavy or overwhelming. Interactive elements and well-written explanations keep things lively, making it easy to lose track of time as you move from ecosystems to human evolution. There’s a quiet thrill in realizing how deeply connected everything is — from microscopic organisms to the largest animals that ever lived.

The building itself adds to the experience. Grand yet welcoming, it has that classic museum charm where history lingers in the air, but the exhibits feel fresh and thoughtfully updated. Families, solo travelers, and curious minds all seem equally at home here.

By the time you leave, you don’t just feel informed — you feel inspired. The Museo Nacional de Ciencias Naturales is an adventurous journey through nature’s past and present, one that reminds you how astonishing, fragile, and endlessly fascinating our world truly is.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Moses Jhon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTMzTmKx317bL25VfaSo0yD1VlLLd7gxxf7uMu8Tzd1BCEUzU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"s there a better way to spark your curiosity than stepping into a world where dinosaurs roam and ancient ecosystems come alive? MNCN in Madrid is a treasure trove of natural wonders that had me hooked from the first fossil. The interactive exhibits, especially the human evolution display, make you feel like a scientist on a discovery mission. Pro tip: grab tickets online for €7 (free for kids under 4 or seniors over 65) to skip the queues, and start on the left side of the building for the best flow. Oh, and the African elephant in the lobby? It’s been standing tall since 1929, a silent guardian of the museum’s epic story. Bring comfy shoes and a water bottle—you’ll want to linger for hours","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsBanB9aY1UYEiIrOQx7g_&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2025-7-15"},{"Name":"Summer A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkStxgtyPwdVIJ1k6zDUe9ZikrcD65XzzmzgOE4A98xhEtpMT3xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited the Museo Nacional de Ciencias Naturales in Madrid and was genuinely impressed. It’s the kind of place that strikes the right balance — fun and engaging for kids, but just as interesting for adults. There’s also a cafe just nearby to relax afterwards. Everything in the museum is written and explained both in Spanish and English so it’s very tourist-friendly.

One of the most striking things is getting to see life-size replicas of animals, from elephants to whales to dinosaurs. You can stare a tiger or a gorilla straight in the face — something you wouldn’t be able to do in the wild without putting yourself in serious danger. It really gives you a sense of their scale and presence.

There was a great exhibit on the history of dinosaurs. And one of my favorite parts was a photo exhibition showing animals in funny, human-like poses — funny and cleverly done. The exhibit explained how seeing animals this way can help people empathize with them, which in turn can raise awareness and motivate action to protect their habitats. Thoughtful, while also pretty entertaining.

Another interesting part of the museum is an exhibit dedicated to Santiago Ramón y Cajal, the Spanish neuroscientist who won a Nobel Prize for his work on the structure of the nervous system. The way his research is displayed feels almost like peeking into the early days of modern science — delicate drawings, old instruments, and lots of context. You can also see some of his photography - an interest he had on the side.

There’s also a beautiful old room that used to be part of a private natural history collection from a former mayor. It still has that “cabinet of curiosities” vibe — dark wood, antique display cases, and a mix of fossils, minerals, and preserved animals. It’s like stepping back in time, and it adds a really charming contrast to the more modern parts of the museum.

All in all, it’s a really worthwhile visit — part science, part history, and part wonder. Whether you’re with kids or just feeling curious yourself, there’s a lot to explore and enjoy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8fMKsFQsgujaIWQq8mUUR&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2025-7-16"},{"Name":"Michael Currin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP39nsOd4LZSJSXbjuEyg2bRgo__eldMdZfh1xXPuWucYXmsTVVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The fossil collection of dinosaurs and related animals was impressive.
Also enjoyed the section on dinosaurs to birds with the taxidermied birds.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbDXTdlaDJF0yAUtAS2Se0&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Anthony Kraag","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBVOrMEqTU4Ng7DSUYYRPbIEnGvv6fNYdSjvT3okp4F-Wuww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Museo Nacional de Ciencias Naturales offers an impressive collection of stuffed animals, including an elephant, lion, and tiger, all beautifully preserved and displayed. The dinosaur fossils were another highlight—fascinating to see up close! Furthermore, there was a stunning photo exhibition showcasing beautiful images of animals, captured with incredible detail (by Tim Flach)
The exhibits are well-organized and educational, making it a great place for both kids and adults. The museum has a classic, old-school charm but still feels engaging. Plus, it's very affordable!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAotX3zAE&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2025-2-7"},{"Name":"SM Othman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWITlDmHJnZaPhLNddQ8ra0b3AZAvQP2-PpjTBAW4RsjS-SoHxa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited the Museo Nacional de Ciencias Naturales in Madrid, and it was an incredible experience! The museum offers a fascinating journey through the natural world, with a wide range of exhibits covering everything from paleontology and geology to biodiversity and ecosystems.

The dinosaur skeletons and fossils were particularly impressive, captivating visitors of all ages. The displays were well-curated, informative, and engaging, making it easy to learn while enjoying the visuals. The museum is also very family-friendly, with interactive sections that are perfect for kids.

The building itself is beautiful, and the staff were welcoming and helpful throughout my visit. Whether you’re a science enthusiast or just looking for an educational and entertaining activity in Madrid, this museum is a must-visit. I highly recommend taking your time to explore all the exhibits—there’s so much to see and learn!

I’ll definitely be coming back next time I’m in Madrid!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv8J68ygE&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Carlos Melgar Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK4eXDd_2Rd_9e64PgSMjfdygc-r_b0wbPtdjNNs3kcDK-fuCxFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Entry fees: (August 2024)

- Free entry on Sundays from 17:00 -20:00 hours.
- Normal entry 7 euros.

Spectacular museum!!

Great for people who love science and biology and people who can appreciate biodiversity and care about endangered species.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr48qxKw&fid=0x0:0x141d274e9dbb7a8e"],"When":"2024-7-10"}]

[{"Name":"Madeleine Dieleman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVFk4NupipoXLc_9SNsxAKpEIJSwWCFtnLYo0zADDh-j2O5HF_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the spot if you like modern art or ceramics and old gentlemen house interior. It’s a perfect thing to do if you want a mix of history and new conceptual art. There was also a good collection of Bauhaus and some famous names likes Behrens, rietveld, etc. Dont miss this if you like musea and interior","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4vnc7EHYTjbwR68oPe9Vs&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"G Mac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfFY2KM7hfNlooonhvV8_u_Q6GiEzn9xdqejVwqehpMdOIKlCRug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is another of Madrid‘s fabulous museums. Set in over 60 rooms and several floors this museum, displays paintings, pottery, glassware, silverware furniture, and other items found in well to do family homes. Though the 17th and 18th centuries are featured on the ground floor there are temporary exhibitions, which include Contemporary works. Such a wonderful place and free entry. It’s highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_wwQhTlcwVWpc6N4_5qkw&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Lawana “Mitchi” Walker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKyssC3nkPp_pZqwmcbuNrVmcnOaoycZTYhTvAsDH-Ec2q8UARRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The pieces they have are great, but there are very few labels or descriptions of what the items are. For example, there are drawers in the textile room that you can open with beautiful pieces of textiles -- and not a single label. There's a small room with jewelry and other items, mostly clerical items, again, not a single label. The only things that are labeled are the larger pieces in glass cases, but even those are lacking in information. The temporary exhibits are usually much better explained. I really want to love this museum, as they do have wonderful pieces, but it appears that it is mostly designed for guided tours.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDSMMlHLLlq7sS-lX-2nRe&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"NYS Counselor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwuzsNPG9_q0me8YL3lQpOMkuA9iChayY37Fr-rJdc4F3Jcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The National Museum of Decorative Arts is a trip back in time, not only for the content of the displays, but for the way in which it is setup, which sometimes sadly reflects museum practice of an earlier era and no doubt a lack of funding to support upgrading the installations. While this is definitely not a museum designed for busloads of tourists, for those who love the decorative arts and have some knowledge of their history it is well worth a visit, particularly as it is very conveniently located only a short walk from the painting galleries of the famed Prado Museum.
We were there on a warm day which emphasized that the museum lacks air conditioning, presenting a hazard not only for the objects, but for staff and visitors as well. We were originally told that high temperatures did not allow opening the top floor, then, while were on the floor below, a staff member came over and graciously informed us there the top floor had been reopened on a very temporary basis. Fortunately, we moved with dispatch, as we had barely completed a circuit of the exhibitions upstairs before the heat forced it to be shut down again.
There are many fascinating pieces, some in vitrines, some in room-like displays, about which we would very much have liked to know more, as labels were minimal where they existed and largely of course in Spanish. Several fascinating pieces of furniture deserved far greater documentation, as did excellent displays of ceramics representing many centuries of Spanish skill and creativity and reflecting multiple different cultural influences. Noteworthy was a fine special exhibition devoted to glass, as well as a standing display of an historic kitchen featuring beautiful tile-work.
Although there were a handful of books on display in a case at the admissions desk, there is no gift shop and it isn't possible to preview their publications to determine if they may be of interest for purchase. In addition to historical displays, the Museum features changing special exhibitions, including while we were there one on fashion photography! Despite its limitations as a building, if time allows we will try to return on a cooler day to better explore the displays. There are certainly many fine works here that can't be found elsewhere, deserve more time, and will repay the attention of careful viewers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCk6SYwZQS0c9NrejYsJFBz&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Maria Deschamps","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsIezNK7zPsJnkjEI5S3rRD5EheuCShZN3_AZMI-uAuo_w-rXZxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic museum for interior or furniture designers - affordable entrance fee, easy to get around and good size.  Great selection of artifacts.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFk7uibE2BctCM71UvAGnI&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Slex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbct4Aw-rcigEXdVAdlVF8WX_LBRo5joBinKWc1okbNC59YCsR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really adored this museum! I love baroque, rococo, and romantic era furniture so this place was a dream for me. They also had a temporary Versace fashion exhibit that was very fun to walk through. The best part? For whatever reason, the day we went it was free! (And it was a Saturday!)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX65Ke8QE&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2024-10-20"},{"Name":"Itay Manor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLm3lTIQwxXHsHsVtGHc45jPJyC9jww5b-ehfTAohoE_zvJ0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A beautiful hidden museum! Located in a central location in the city! The entrance fee is ridiculous, the staff is so friendly and helpful! Inside the museum there is a great collection of arts & crafts from the early 20th century, combined with contemporary art! A recommended visit for design and aesthetics enthusiasts!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI8brlmwE&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2025-4-10"},{"Name":"Liyi Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX03rtkx5M-0EbDuTkg4U7jHV7uqxUissG-GYmKapa9llLf964Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tickets are cheap but they are free Thursdays 5-8 pm and Saturdays 2-3 pm. Be aware that exhibits are in Spanish or don't have much info. They also have some temporary exhibition space. I liked that the museum covered a good range of decorative arts from home goods to a whole replica kitchen or dining room. There's a Frank Lloyd Wright window (and chair), which is a shame to see not with light shining through it but a pleasant surprise anyway.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI2aj1CA&fid=0x0:0x33df589b692a24dc"],"When":"2025-4-11"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Lorenzo Berardinelli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQYZfs7aGmPhWV6GArevvBQrV3lL4dmCAQU_1872nRZD-NgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited the Museum of Illusions in Madrid with my girlfriend, and it was a fun experience overall. However, I think it’s more enjoyable if you go in a group of more than two people, since many of the photo spots are designed for pairs or groups. Inside, there aren’t that many interactive activities, but the main issue is definitely the number of children running around — though of course, you can’t really ask them not to come! Other than that, we had a good time. I’d recommend going with friends or people you know you can have fun with anywhere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmml8-lSdI7MJDcz6dCc1F\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Darren Beck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRfTQ5lzSivZGEcb4EWCur2uNoffJUe10rBNwzOdNobY-mUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A little small but worth an hour or so if you want a break from the heat. Note that it definitely skews more toward a younger crowd, and there were a lot of families with little kids there. As a group of two adults though, it was still a fun experience. I’m sure the kids had a great time as well. Staff were great also. Give it a try if you need a break from the sightseeing and just want some fun relaxation and air conditioning!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDZBKUvmAhb_LOAn8QK7LQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"rated by maryam • food critic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2rFU889_uyIosz_7bpffSFpmpz0-gKcaVKqZvHb7h1qD_qhXV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely entertaining from start to finish! The Museum of Illusions in Madrid kept us all fully engaged — we could’ve easily spent two hours exploring. The installations are clever, interactive, and truly high quality. My kids had a blast, and honestly, so did I. Every room is picture perfect, and the staff made sure the flow was easy and fun. Whether you’re going with kids or just want to play with perspective and be wowed, this spot delivers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvIn2cbOwD1xlT2Bju8D5l\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Alex S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuqMxZHWW4Q3oWg1MozJ5EDSP48AY-vf9ImsmDzcUsLKEKjbGa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! What a great museum! If you want to find where the magic is at in Madrid, look no further! Offering many illusions for you to try out and capture, this museum is incredibly fun for everyone of all ages except people who otherwise have vertigo, as some of the illusions you will have to walk through may not be good for people with vertigo.\nIf you are wanting a fun activity to do with your kids, it’s a great place! Depending on your pace, you could be at this museum for a while. My favourite illusion was the vortex, as it is a really cool experience and it really makes you feel like you are spinning in an actual vortex. If that’s your thing, it is the last illusion downstairs at the very end of the room. This museum is also not far from the train line, so you can travel here easily.\nIn sum, if you’re wanting something to do while you’re in Madrid, come here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiCzHJZBmXN2Y3VDQxPYol\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-7-7"},{"Name":"Michael Stockdale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIrWLzicQpgC3hAFUv5MqBQNE3eX1_sKxt7Pa3MR8iF60jyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was okay but l was hoping to see more than l did for the entry price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoNl4gi2TxojBRMWk7xy-N\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Rebecca Sirois","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVZzU3H_Gmj---yW_cc8WSqFd5G5oCZ4-hT-20m9bPEiVF3i3R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a fun experience with the kids. Definitely buy tickets in advance, they don't let you in early so show up right on time. Staff were helpful for picture taking otherwise a fun place to wander through at your leisure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCS7-Y2SbFgXGvCL3e_1CBg\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Joel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl5821tyzJrwoJ9WtZ4ckHFtm77vetb8svyUaCTvs_yjbDKrzH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had such a great time at the Museum of Illusions in Madrid! I went with my two kids and they absolutely loved it — from the mind-bending exhibits to all the fun photo ops, there was never a dull moment. A big shoutout to Roberto, who went above and beyond. He was incredibly kind and patient, explaining how the illusions worked in a way my kids could understand, and even helped us take some amazing photos. He showed us the best angles and made sure we got the most out of each exhibit. Definitely recommend for a fun, family-friendly outing. So much fun and lots of laughs!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA41UAbda0q4GHtxLgczpgq\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b2bd5a4ff4a7207"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"David Sargent","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNd7Vx1pxVZ2hd91K_Xk_NBWo4ZUDgz8hEItPBONm_A7r1mRme=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love finding unusual museums, and I read about this one on WikiTravel when I had some spare time on a recwnt business trip. This museum was an absolute delight! My only regret was that I was alone, as a lot of the displays are interactive and the couples and groups were having so much fun watching and photographing each other and srading places and such that I decided that someday I need to go back there with at least one other person who hasn't seen it before. Fingers crossed for another trip to Madrid one of these days!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Beautifully presented pieces from all over Latin America in an extensive exhibition.\nI was warned that part of the exhibit is closed. Didn't feel like I missed much. And at 3 Euro entry not sure what others are complaining about. Wanted 60 cent back as a 20% discount?!\nSide note, had the best Porras con chocolate at a cart outside the hospital, 5 min up the hill.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsp6cZ2M-5mrAHUqR8WJYs\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2025-9-7"},{"Name":"Daicai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHPWMWbA4YDyrOUIBiYgHsSryQ27wqTIK3_XUbNiI6ZuMDePaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The museum is big so there are a lot of people allowed to visit, not too many people because admission is free on Sundays, I like the sofas inside because I would not feel good if I see too many spooky exhibits inside. Many exhibits are full of negative energy, so the pavilion puts a lot of sacred paintings or holy objects to check and balance them. Similar situations are more common in museums, so you can just appreciate their appearance. The staff didn't look too energetic guess it had something to do with the exhibits having too much energy. Very special museum and well worth exploring for those with strong energy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCoofqmTQ\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"Neil Pearson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLoBoBg3nFw8kzBFVNuPr-Ns0V8K716E9E6tVoYbSh9cKnYjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Avoid. Very grumpy staff who will start strongly warning you about closing 30 mins before closing.  15 minutes before they will start physically ushering you out.  Lots of friendlier places to go in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0FFpn8At6dpBED4h5-Pn7\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Lissa Wolfe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMvYGaVYe9nQSkSToJer4qx3iRKXYYTycNR1svTzUW9NXtPLw7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good mix of pre and post colonial art. All signage in español.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDU4PE6le070ifTe-6Dhxk2\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Ioannes Paulus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbCPap65h4lqq34JTFIJ4n-pRF3uX4bVSTQNTvIlMnKjoqPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place to see indian artifacts in Madrid, not a huge collection but an interesting one nonetheless. Worth seeing even if only for one of the three remaining mayan codices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6uEvDsdbcLQitsODypqJC\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Debbi Thornhill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyXY-1F9wWOvFxtNynr0JSkbJ6fjqbEC__tTokZYmx88r-g95RLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Most beautiful museum I've ever been to","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAe4L6BMOs_cNeW_yEszhdf\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Guillermo Jose Aguirre Selvetti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZvDc7w7v7HGAl8KAtaupH5Gx9e14et398-CthFFTin5Qsv81t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Beautiful museum with a great collection of pieces of art from prehispanic American cultures. Easy to get to, and quite cheap. The Quimbayas treasures are amazing, but also the Madrid Codex, also known as the Tro-Cortesianus Codex, a significant and unique pre-Columbian Maya manuscript. The only problem is that the display is old fashioned and it turns the exhibition a bit boring. It desperately needs a new way to display the pieces of art to make it more engaging and interesting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYRTy6Q-yz71aDDRcU31ng\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Eduard Rudyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF37PlPjeUpRE5RfujIYFS7tbfN8QeZyMujrX-AMRdJgol3gnI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing museum! Great collection! Really enjoyed visiting. Have several rare artifacts from pre-Columbian and later periods both from South and North America. For example, Borgia codex. We were during the weekend and it wasn't crowded. Unfortunately the museum closed at 3pm. Very recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7kq-3Bw\u0026fid=0x0:0xbf952a474d8e0423"],"When":"2024-8-14"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jason Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUhLijp2eBzhzQCOL96vMfN8YxmQjlBZ5gqel7gvQfNtR67x5k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My 14 year old daughter enjoyed our trip to the museum on Saturday 11th November. It's less than a ten minute walk from Chamartín station and we used Google Maps to find our way there. On arrival there's an App you can download and can listen to all the info inside the museum in English (possibly other languages too). You can enter two of the buses inside the exhibition. All in all you're there for around an hour and it's good value for money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDF94jDNA&fid=0x0:0x805d8dabc5d1cdd7"],"When":"2023-11-11"},{"Name":"Manuel Gonzalez Vazquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7DEtHZo8-9cH9OphhBsTFwF_pw91tcJyp1d4OGjmYWJ_mo1KK2w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Museo de la EMT in Madrid is dedicated to the history of the city's municipal transport company. It features a collection of vintage buses and offers virtual visits and audio guides. The museum is open on weekends.
It is a nice collection of the different models that were seen in Madrid over the years as well as maintenance and operational material
For people like me, it is a nostalgic journey back in time to some of the coaches we rode as children.
You need to buy your tickets in advance on the museum's EMT website

Be aware that the museum only opens on weekends during some months. For 2025, the opening times are:

Opening calendar for 2025
Every Saturday, Sunday and public holiday from March 1 to July 13 and from September 6 to November 16
Visiting hours: 10:00 – 11:30 – 13:00 – 17:00 hours.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wai Kin Vinson Kong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxRNLlIIivUE1fHYHzwjU5pINcTjC85kcQ1nBwVdVzAEearttB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I went to the museum without buying a ticket beforehand. When I asked for assistance, the guard here rudely turned me down. I was told to purchase the ticket online, but unfortunately, the website was not functioning. Furthermore, I was informed that there was currently no one available to assist me. The overall experience was extremely unfriendly for tourists, and I left feeling greatly disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICToofKbQ&fid=0x0:0x805d8dabc5d1cdd7"],"When":"2024-5-12"},{"Name":"Yaraslau Zauharodni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKgK_E46dUv9VJihj1cdxhKAHIlLFGMzgRUu8v7oRb9kAAWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was closed on Wednesday. Actually we have been told it is only open on Weekend (Saturday and Sunday) with guided tours at 10, 11 and 13 o’clock. But you need to register in advance at official website of the museum. (Unfortunately web page was not available today so we didn’t know it was closed, while Google maps showed it was open). Still planning to visit the other day.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fábio Tanniguchi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWclxlm75XtqMzyaWgNZHXo4fYdrpEJ5NLvJCnTWwk5rxHQP4-0hw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Superb museum, especially for bus enthusiasts! user_reviews: [{"Name":"Alexandra Tomulescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8Xuqi8JffVoHqHShwr9IKKehrjwFKauAgTGPrbg0YDl0dowmISQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice view","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID23az3Wg\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2022-5-22"},{"Name":"puffi mars","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-lD_F1lVFt0o7W3X0HUSQGAkkbT1FDSrcbYKOYHFNqLIPvns=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"very pretty but a bit full","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Lucena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXAnbPEgO38IAgd5mIrYHf4QXKfnMypv1751f6z9U8cL9E_HQHDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Preciosa plaza de 1815 con 10 bustos de piedra y mármol,6 bustos de emperadores romano y 6 de filósofos griegos,son muy antiguos y aunque no se sabe su procedencia fueron colocados en círculo quedando una expectacular plaza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAad70wEBliKoHhtD_wpOC7\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"Tito Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQxmo6mQaJ-jpXRWak2CdDTM5wjRUdpYxV0TDYJj1nb75_p6dZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Espacio de planta en doble hemiciclo con unas dimensiones de 55 x 30 metros, delimitado por un seto de boj y decorado con 10 bustos de mármol, 6 de emperadores romanos y 4 de filósofos o escritores de la Antigüedad clásica, todos ellos con sus correspondientes peanas de mármol. Son obras de origen un tanto confuso, de procedencia antigua, quizá de época romana aunque no es descartable que sean renacentistas. Adquiridas en Italia por un antepasado de la duquesa, quien al tener noticia de su existencia, ordenó que los bustos fueran trasladados a El Capricho, donde se instalaron definitivamente en 1815.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDViYuXoAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2023-12-13"},{"Name":"Maria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhu5xtCySGkiKf46LvSsNP5oKiS6yZ7KUuN7AafOWI205NTCsd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Esta plaza se encuentra dentro del Parque del Capricho, de entrada gratuita y abierto únicamente fines de semana y festivos. Es una plaza muy bonita y casi el primer monumento que uno se encuentra cuando entra al parque.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWmpOGtwE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2022-2-24"},{"Name":"Maricarmen Blázquez De Jesús","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmZqvuPOoPia6VKv1vo-sYOC1UNuXou7G6hTjFg-0pMeZ0gg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Plaza cerca de la entrada del parque. Amplia pero sin sombra… los días calurosos eso es lo peor..🙈🙈🙈\nEl parque solo abre los fines de semana a las 9.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ-tPKvwE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2023-6-25"},{"Name":"Frecuencyconceptart7","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUjpSyN81d0US2s7sNCuJnX0JTAAmsZpt9Zd3-KQw95iPYqQs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Otro de los puntos que se deben visitar en el parque del Capricho","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDezYX9RA\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2022-10-16"},{"Name":"Adrian Reyes Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNI_7qF_N0Abe8tSeB0Z9I6dF8F0hlOi4TtrQsyH8NpIhXR-p4fw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bonito lugar para ocio y recreación al aire libre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXgM2YpgE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5d35367be43c6b48"],"When":"2024-10-12"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"James Brazier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXExyHDqgeVtyTfRwdYDNjhh92rDitOTYOTqH7gNmxYJi_DMmB9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The collection is very diverse: paintings, sculptures, jewelry, weapons, decorative arts, and rare books. You can see works by Goya, El Greco, and many European artists.

The Leonardo da Vinci painting is worth a look. The Adolescent Saviour is claimed to be an original by the great man however perhaps it was a pupil from his workshop. Either way it’s has to be considered a Leonardesque.

Overall, it’s a peaceful, high-quality museum with lots of interesting objects.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALZc-cMUzDXPXX-dK08vO6&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"eh m","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDc4S4npu6fVJbaYEi1ib1lumKNzCIEZg_ypimQordOgj_nw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have visited the Museo Lázaro Galdiano twice, and it continues to impress me each time. The museum offers an excellent price-to-value experience, given the extraordinary range of works on display. The beautifully designed rooms and the architecture of the building alone are worth a visit.

It is truly remarkable what José Lázaro Galdiano achieved in his lifetime and the exceptional collection he assembled. If you are in Madrid, it is without doubt a must-see.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD59cElIrKw5ykWjnB0Raw-&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Linda Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV13-ZLd5E8gbX7oVINRLkobXoW7aOrzbAdXFra4V8v2e0Q96I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible museum with the collection of José Lázaro Galdiano. It is a varied and amazing collection from Goya's to swords, Bosch's to stunning ceilings, medieval art to an El Greco that took our breath away. We spent 2 hours here and could have stayed half a day.

There are lockers before ticket booth but they seemed not so secure to us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCqp7OhhcM2qVuu-pdR4iWX&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Song","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhvoqfI6DYGerqYUa0bfmANUUJ7mMuHOF55sTOJDSNa_D1MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic collection in a stunningly beautiful building. I am glad I didn’t miss this hidden treasure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBT85E3GPBi34tpXYdwOZar&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Anton N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4TJjJDuMPiDu-_95c8DFbSUKPJ_ercGHl_xr2ZKQp1F_CYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely loved visiting the Lazaro Galdiano Museum! The atmosphere is truly authentic, allowing me to admire the exhibits up close without the hassle of crowded tourist areas. Each piece is beautifully presented, making the experience both relaxing and inspiring. The elegant interiors and friendly staff add to the charm, creating a perfect setting for art enthusiasts and casual visitors alike. Highly recommend for a peaceful and immersive cultural experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_6MWTuQE&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2025-1-12"},{"Name":"Juliana C M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYDWugloZlh79bbKifo16IVCS1CM67BsOBsP__7PPYAZBofac=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Well put together Museum with beautiful collection of art and objects. The palace is a piece of art by itself. There you will find dem medals, pottery from more then 2500 years ago to beautiful paintings from the XX century.  Note that the museum offers more then a visit but its agenda offers music, dance and poetry in the evenings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA7eqhqAE&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2025-2-3"},{"Name":"Robin Gadomski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPFpA3U8-ZNOJ94Ek-GmhSsuzPWPMZeKgjRqEiNRJi3B056XzU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fantastic little museum with wonderful artifacts and fine works of art from great masters. Quite hidden and not the most obvious pick for a day trip, I highly recommend visiting this museum if you have a few hours to spare in Madrid. Not too busy, and definitely worth it if you are in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDr-9PrggE&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2024-7-20"},{"Name":"Nikos Parastatidis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnS1-zp1TI8IMsHpYLlnZR3bKBlTsuIQ1X-s_RKwPIaEFk-0mR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small museum with an interesting collection of art and artefacts. Some masterpieces stand out but the whole collection is interesting. It took me an hour to wander through its rooms. The building itself is outstanding covered with wonderful frescoes full of colour.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjgNWi4wE&fid=0x0:0xaeee248571d949a9"],"When":"2024-4-16"}]

title: Madrid History Museum
address: Calle de Fuencarral, 78, Centro, 28004 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["10 am–8 pm"],"Monday":["Closed"],"Saturday":["10 am–8 pm"],"Sunday":["10 am–8 pm"],"Thursday":["10 am–8 pm"],"Tuesday":["10 am–8 pm"],"Wednesday":["10 am–8 pm"]}
descriptions: Old orphanage with Baroque exterior, now a museum on Madrid's history, with documents, art & models.
user_reviews: [{"Name":"G Mac","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfFY2KM7hfNlooonhvV8_u_Q6GiEzn9xdqejVwqehpMdOIKlCRug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An absolutely stunning museum explaining the history of Madrid. There is some work being done on the first side of the building, but even the covering which protects the restoration is a work of art. It is free admission for this museum and absolutely worth a visit. The collection is amazing and includes everything from paintings sculptures Drawings, models to clothing, fans, pottery, ceramics, and cartography. One of my favorite things was the model of the bullfighting Arena, which is incredibly detailed, including hundreds of miniature spectators. Some of the artists who have paintings include Velasquez and Madrazo. Absolutely worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPoeROWr4xtROzzg0Qv7b3\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"James Portoraro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8WmzUNP6L533WUatY6x3BCyqI-cKZMwaT2YdZbxxgRjbmMKNH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An underrated museum about the history of the city of Madrid - an intelligent display of urban history that really impressed. It's free to visit and I would recommend it for history/urbanist lovers. Plus there are some splendid historical paintings inside as well. It was one of my favourite museums in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyX3-XY3P06DENk6BDPsUR\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A little hidden gem in the centre of Madrid - it’s free entry and it takes about an hour (two if you are very thorough) to go through it. It has some incredible gems about the city, the royal family and the traditional stores, as well as an incredible photo exhibition on the ground floor!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0KRskbARKd_ou279kR8wL\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Ali Alkhateeb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5mgF-39klaKp4AgmFZpkNkmwIsir0Nu4JgfiXThbqujvtntQx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Museo de Historia de Madrid is a small but fascinating museum full of rich items that beautifully explain the history of Madrid. The entry is free, which is a great bonus! I recommend starting your visit by taking the elevator to the top floor and then using the stairs to explore each floor on your way down. This way, you won't miss anything. It's a wonderful place for anyone interested in learning more about the city's past. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFeb8pBBKmAvfXasnIwodi\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Miriam Noyola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgVIsUixO8fM_KsCIn71tKnKA89l1kvfxvNVIy384yY1fglsC2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wasn’t planning to go inside at first, but the moment I spotted the striking colors and ornate details of the building as we walked down Calle de Fuencarral, I had to take a second look. The old Hospicio de San Fernando that houses the museum has such a unique façade that it instantly has you make a full stop.. it’s a standout on this lively street in the heart of Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNj-HhngKGFQQCdX91ROgW\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"T-Rex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIydD6ck0vX_SpaU1ZFa9ujPDVjB5pULnd1fY5S6XR0VCZ6Fmna=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is easily one of the best free museums I’ve ever been. The layout in very good, there are four floors dividing the history of Madrid (obviously not Spain) with a deep dive on history, culture, arts, entertainment, clothing, diversity and woman empowerment.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHB71NhI41k9bZ0iXJr9YJ\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Mark S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgyBKr69KV_BIcwuITeI6pnEkilNMB9snbujsiCzFWxQnKoNqq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great museum! Nicely arranged and interesting things around every corner. Nice to see the history of the city presented in a easy and beautiful way. Painting and photos and sculpture and artifacts tell the story. Everything from beautiful laquered leather portraits on small daily items to clothing and dining items. This museum doesn't overwhelm but tells a lovely story. Great work Madrid!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7RcmbO-47SNABQnj2fP3m\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"Kevin Yeung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfr8VfoLnrWAatiNzspZuHOsAYPQ0rQ8QcqYSnL_8Cqky7zGB38w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"free entry with high varieties of collections.  Clear illustrations of the history of Madrid.  May take more than 3 hours for a thorough visit of all items.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVOfPoI4PNjQf2CePvtbQz\u0026fid=0x0:0x2d8bc9adb0ffc983"],"When":"2025-11-2"}]
